Zaidi ya theluthi moja ya watu waliohojiwa katika maeneo yote pia walibainisha vikwazo vinavyotokana na mambo ya kisheria na udhibiti, huku wakitambua umuhimu wa mfumo wa kisheria na udhibiti katika kuhakikisha upatikanaji salama.

translations.source: Unduly restrictive requirements could hamper patient access because they impede the flow of supply or make prescribing and dispensing difficult for health-care professionals. It is important to note that concerns about the potential harmful effects of opioids are valid, such as their potential to lead to opioid use disorder. For this reason, a certain amount of caution about the potential harms of opioid use (e.g. use in chronic non-cancer pain) is important for public health insofar as its use is well-informed and proportionate to risks. Such concerns should not undermine the benefits of opioid use when clinically indicated and when used safely by trained professionals. Opportunities for actionThe report presents a complementary set of areas for action that aim to improve safe access to morphine.
translations.reference: Mahitaji ya vikwazo visivyofaa vinaweza kuzuia ufikiaji wa magonjwa kwa sababu yanazuia mtiririko wa usambazaji au kufanya kuagiza na kutoa kuwa ngumu kwa wataalamu wa afya. Ni muhimu kutambua kwamba wasiwasi kuhusu madhara yanayoweza kusababishwa na afyuni ni halali, kama vile uwezo wao wa kusababisha matatizo ya matumizi ya Opioid. Kwa sababu hii, kiakisi fulani cha tahadhari kuhusu madhara yanayoweza kutokea kutokana na matumizi ya Opioid (m.f. hutumika katika maumivu ya muda mrefu yasiyo ya kansa) ni muhimu kwa afya ya umma kwa vile matumizi yake yana taarifa za kutosha na yanalingana na hatari. Wasiwasi kama huo haupaswi kudhoofisha manufaa ya matumizi ya Opioid inapoonyeshwa kimatibabu na inapotumiwa kwa usalama na inapotumiwa kwa usalama na wataalamu waliofunzwa. Fursa za kuchukua hatua ripoti inawasilisha seti inayosaidiana ya maeneo ya kuchukuliwa hatua ambayo yanalenga kuboresha ufikiaji salama wa Morphine.
translations.hypothesis: Mahitaji ambayo ni ya kiasi kikubwa sana yanaweza kuizuia wagonjwa kupata huduma kwa sababu yanaweza kusababisha ugumu katika usambazaji wa dawa au kufanya utoaji wa dawa na mapendekezo kuwa changamoto kwa wataalamu wa afya. Ni muhimu kukumbuka kwamba wasiwasi kuhusu madhara yanayoweza kutokana na matumizi ya dawa za opioid ni wa kweli, kama vile uwezekano wao wa kusababisha utegemezi wa dawa hizo. Kwa sababu hiyo, ni muhimu kuwa makini kuhusu madhara yanayoweza kutokana na matumizi ya dawa za opioid (kwa mfano, matumizi yao katika matibabu ya maumivu ya muda mrefu ambayo hayahusiani na saratani), ili kuhakikisha kuwa matumizi yao yanazingatiwa kwa makini na yanalingana na hatari zilizopo. Wasiwasi huo haupaswi kuathiri faida za matumizi ya dawa za opioid wakati zinahitajika kulingana na matibabu na zinapotumika kwa usalama na wataalamu waliofunzwa. Fursa za kuchukua hatuaRipoti hii inaangazia maeneo mbalimbali ambayo yanaweza kuchukuliwa ili kuboresha upatikanaji salama wa morphine.

translations.source: These include implementing small-scale regional or state-wide programmes on improving access to morphine for medical use with a package of essential services and products for palliative care that is formulated according to the WHO Model List of Essential Medicines and the WHO Essential Package of Palliative Care. They also include improving governance, streamlining procurement and supply processes to address any inefficiency, improving resourcing such as stable funding, enhancing competent skill sets of the health workforce, and raising awareness about both the benefits and potential harms of opioid use. The success of these actions will hinge on collaboration and cooperation among all stakeholders at national, regional, and global levels.
translations.reference: Haya ni pamoja na kutekeleza programu ndogo ndogo za kikanda au nchi nzima juu ya kuboresha upatikanaji wa Morphine kwa matumizi ya matibabu na kifurushi cha huduma muhimu na bidhaa kwa ajili ya matibabu shufaa ambayo imeundwa kulingana na orodha ya Dawa muhimu ya WHO na kifurushi muhimu cha WHO cha Palliative Care. pia ni pamoja na kuboresha usimamizi, kurahisisha michakato ya ununuzi na ugavi ili kushughulikia uzembe wowote, kuboresha rasilimali kama vile ufadhili thabiti, kuimarisha seti za ujuzi wa wahudumu wa afya, na kuongeza ufahamu kuhusu manufaa na madhara yanaweza kusababishwa na matumizi ya Opioid. Mafanikio ya hatua hizi yanategemea ushirikiano na mshikamano miongoni mwa wadau wote katika ngazi ya kitaifa, kikanda na kimataifa.
translations.hypothesis: Hizi ni pamoja na utekelezaji wa programu ndogo za kikanda au za kitaifa zenye lengo la kuongeza upatikanaji wa morphine kwa matumizi ya matibabu, pamoja na kutoa huduma na bidhaa muhimu za utunzaji wa wagonjwa ambao wameugua sana, ambazo zimeundwa kulingana na Orodha ya Manabati Muhimu ya WHO na Kifurushi Muhimu cha Utunzaji wa Wagonjwa Waliougua Sana cha WHO. Pia, ni pamoja na kuimarisha utawala, kuboresha taratibu za ununuzi na usambazaji ili kushughulikia upotevu wowote, kuongeza rasilimali kama vile ufadhili thabiti, kuimarisha ujuzi wa wafanyakazi wa afya, na kuongeza ufahamu kuhusu faida na hatari za matumizi ya dawa za opioid. Mafanikio ya hatua hizi yataegemea ushirikiano na utendaji kazi pamoja kati ya wadau wote katika ngazi ya kitaifa, kikanda, na kimataifa.

translations.source: Small islands agree bold plan of action on noncommunicable diseases and mental health Today, the 2023 Bridgetown Declaration on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health was launched, to address some of the world’s deadliest diseases in Small Island Developing States (SIDS), which are especially at risk. The Declaration is a key outcome of the SIDS Ministerial Conference on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health, running from 14 to 16 June, co-hosted by the World Health Organization (WHO), the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and the Government of Barbados. SIDS are disproportionately impacted by NCDs – which cause 74% of all deaths globally – due to their reliance on imported food, commercial influences and the climate crisis. A new WHO report shows that 8 of the 15 countries with more than a 30% risk of premature death from cardiovascular disease, cancer, diabetes, or chronic respiratory disease are SIDS.
translations.reference: Visiwa vidogo vinakubali mpango shupavu wa utekelezaji kuhusu magonjwa yasiyoambukiza na afya ya akili. Leo, Azimio la Bridgetown la 2023 kuhusu magonjwa yasiyoambukiza (NCDs) na afya ya akili lilizinduliwa, kushughulikia baadhi ya magonjwa hatari Duniani katika nchi zinazoendelea za visiwa vidogo (SIDS), ambavyo vipo hatarini zaidi. Azimio hilo ni matokeo muhimu ya mkutano wa mawaziri wa SIDS wa magonjwa yasiyo ambukiza (NCDs) na afya ya akili, unaoanza tarehe 14 hadi 16 Juni, ulioandaliwa kwa pamoja na shirika la afya Duniani (WHO), shirika la afya la Pan Amerika (PAHO) na serikali ya Barbados. SIDS zinaathiriwa kwa kiasi kikubwa na NCDs- ambayo husababisha 74% ya vifo vyote Ulimwenguni- kutokana na kutegemea chakula kutoka nje, athari za kibiashara na mgogoro wa hali ya hewa. Ripoti mpya ya WHO inaonyesha kuwa nchi 8 kati ya 15 zilizo na hatari zaidi ya 30% ya vifo vya mapema kutokana na magonjwa ya moyo na mishipa, saratani, kisukari, au ugonjwa wa kupumua kwa muda mrefu ni SIDS.
translations.hypothesis: Visiwa vidogo vimekubaliana mpango wa hatua muhimu kuhusu magonjwa ambayo hayasambazwi kupitia kuambukiza na afya ya akili. Leo, Azimio la Bridgetown la mwaka 2023 kuhusu Magonjwa Ambayo Hayasambazwi Kupitia Kuambukiza (NCDs) na Afya ya Akili limeanzishwa, ili kushughulikia baadhi ya magonjwa hatari zaidi duniani katika Visiwa Vidogo Vinavyoendelea (SIDS), ambayo yanakabiliwa na hatari kubwa. Azimio hilo ni matokeo muhimu ya Mkutano wa Mawaziri wa SIDS kuhusu Magonjwa Ambayo Hayasambazwi Kupitia Kuambukiza (NCDs) na Afya ya Akili, ambao ulifanyika kuanzia tarehe 14 hadi 16 Juni, na uliandaliwa pamoja na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), Shirika la Afya la Amerika ya Kusini (PAHO) na Serikali ya Barbados. SIDS zinaugua sana magonjwa ambayo hayasambazwi kupitia kuambukiza – ambayo husababisha vifo vya asilimia 74 ya vifo vyote duniani – kutokana na utegemezi wao kwa vyakula vilivyokunjwa, ushawishi wa biashara na tatizo la mabadiliko ya tabianchi. Ripoti mpya ya WHO inaonyesha kwamba nchi 8 kati ya nchi 15 ambazo zina hatari zaidi ya asilimia 30 ya kufa mapema kutokana na magonjwa ya moyo, saratani, kisukari au magonjwa ya mapafu, ni SIDS.

translations.source: The 10 countries with the highest obesity rates globally are all SIDS in the Pacific, where over 45% of adults live with obesity. Mental health conditions are common in SIDS countries, affecting an estimated 15.2% of the population in the Caribbean and 11.2% of the population in the Pacific. People with mental health conditions face a higher risk of premature mortality, including from unaddressed physical health conditions and from suicide. Stigma, specialized staff shortages and the impact of climate change contribute to a challenging situation in SIDS that requires immediate attention. The 2023 Bridgetown Declaration outlines bold steps to address the range of social, environmental, economic and commercial issues that lead to NCDs and mental health conditions.
translations.reference: Nchi 10 zilizo na viwango vya juu vya unene wa kupindukia Duniani zote ni SIDS katika pasifiki, ambapo zaidi ya 45% ya watu wazima wanaishi na unene uliokithiri. Hali ya afya ya akili ni ya kawaida katika nchi za SIDS, na kuathiri wastani wa 15.2% ya wakazi huko Karibiani na 11.2% ya wakazi katika Pasifiki. Watu walio na afya ya akili wanakabiliwa na hatari kubwa ya vifo vya mapema, ikiwemo kutokana na hali ya afya ya kimwili ambayo haijashughulikiwa na kutokana na kujiua. Unyanyapaa, uhaba wa wafanyakazi maalumu na athari za mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa huchangia hali yenye changamoto katika SIDS ambayo inahitaji uangalizi wa haraka. Azimio la Bridgetown la 2023 linaonyesha hatua thabiti za kushughulikia masuala mbalimbali ya kijamii, kimazingira, kiuchumi na kibiashara ambayo husababisha NCDs na hali ya afya ya akili.
translations.hypothesis: Nchi kumi zilizo na viwango vya juu zaidi vya utabaismu duniani ni zote nchi ndogo za kisiwa (SIDS) katika Bahari ya Pasifiki, ambapo zaidi ya asilimia 45 ya watu wazima wana utabaismu. Matatizo ya afya ya akili ni ya kawaida katika nchi za SIDS, na huathiri takriban asilimia 15.2 ya watu katika eneo la Karibi na asilimia 11.2 ya watu katika eneo la Pasifiki. Watu walio na matatizo ya afya ya akili wanakabiliwa na hatari kubwa ya kufa mapema, ikiwa ni pamoja na kutokana na matatizo ya kiafya ambayo hayapatikani tiba na pia kutokana na kujitua. Ubaguzi, upungufu wa wafanyakazi wataalamu, na athari za mabadiliko ya tabianchi huongeza changamoto katika nchi za SIDS, na hili linahitaji umakini wa haraka. Azimio la Bridgetown la mwaka 2023 linaeleza hatua muhimu za kukabiliana na masuala mbalimbali ya kijamii, ya mazingira, ya kiuchumi na ya kibiashara ambayo husababisha magonjwa sugu na matatizo ya afya ya akili.

translations.source: Developed through an inclusive process led ‘for’ and ‘by’ SIDS, the declaration highlights that NCDs and mental health conditions cannot be properly addressed without responding to the climate crisis. “Bold action for our climate, good health, and well-being relies on redressing and reorganizing global financing to unlock billions in investment, while making it less punishing for developing countries to pay their debts,” said Her Excellency Mia Amor Mottley, Prime Minister of Barbados. “Funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation in the most vulnerable countries is also key, with noncommunicable diseases and mental health accounted for.” "The challenges faced by Small Island Developing States are interconnected and multifaceted. Climate change, environmental degradation, social and economic inequalities, and the commercial determinants of health exacerbate the burden of NCDs and mental health conditions," said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General.
translations.reference: Kuendelezwa kupitia mchakato jumuishi unaoongozwa 'kwa' na 'na' SIDs, tamko hilo linaangazia kwamba NCDs na hali ya Afya ya akili haiwezi kushughulikiwa ipasavyo bila kukabiliana na mgogoro wa hali ya hewa. "Hatua ya ujasiri kwa hali ya hewa, afya njema, na ustawi wetu inategemea kurekebisha na kupanga upya ufadhili wa kimataifa ili kufungua mabilioni ya uwekezaji, na kuifanya iwe chini ya adhabu kwa nchi zinazoendelea kulipa madeni yao", alisema Mheshimiwa Mia Amor Mottley, waziri mkuu wa Barbados. "Ufadhili wa kukabiliana na mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa na kukabiliana na mabadiliko ya Tabianchi zilizo hatarini zaidi pia ni muhimu, huku magonjwa yasiyo ambukiza na afya ya akili yakichangia" "Changamoto zinazokabili nchi zinazoendelea za visiwa vidogo zimeunganishwa na zina pande nyingi. Mabadiliko ya Tabianchi, uharibifu wa mazingira, kukosekana kwa usawa wa kijamii na kiuchuni, na vigezo vya kibiashara vya afya vinazidisha mzigo wa NCDs na hali ya afya ya akili", alisema DK Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO.
translations.hypothesis: Tamko hilo, lililotungwa kupitia mchakato wa pamoja ulioongozwa na nchi za Visiwa Vidogo Vinavyoendelea (SIDS), linaangazia kwamba magonjwa sugu na matatizo ya afya ya akili hayawezi kushughulikiwa vizuri bila kushughulikia tatizo la mabadiliko ya tabianchi. "Hatua thabiti za kushughulikia mabadiliko ya tabianchi, afya bora, na ustawi wa watu hutegemea marekebisho na mpangilio mpya wa mfumo wa fedha wa kimataifa ili kufungua fursa za uwekezaji bilioni, huku ikifanya iwe rahisi kwa nchi zinazoendelea kulipa madeni yao," alisema Heri ya Ukuu Mia Amor Mottley, Waziri Mkuu wa Barbados. "Pia, ufadhili wa mageuzi na hatua za kupunguza athari za mabadiliko ya tabianchi katika nchi ambazo zinahusika zaidi ni muhimu, na kuingia kwa magonjwa sugu na matatizo ya afya ya akili katika mpango huo." "Changamoto zinazokumbana na nchi za Visiwa Vidogo Vinavyoendelea ni za pamoja na zenye mambo mengi. Mabadiliko ya tabianchi, uharibifu wa mazingira, tofauti za kijamii na kiuchumi, na mambo ya kibiashara yanayoathiri afya huongeza mzigo wa magonjwa sugu na matatizo ya afya ya akili," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO).

translations.source: "Despite their limited resources and geographical constraints, these nations have shown remarkable resilience in the face of adversity. Together, we must forge a path that is based on equity, resilience, and sustainability. We must strengthen health systems, enhance prevention and early detection measures, and prioritize the integration of NCD and mental health services into primary health care. "The Director-General also pledged that WHO would work to mobilize financial resources to develop climate resilient, environmentally sustainable health-care facilities in the SIDS. WHO will also continue to advocate for ‘loss and damage’ funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation investments in lower income countries.
translations.reference: "Licha ya rasilimali zao chache na vikwazo vya kijografia, mataifa haya yameonyesha ujasiri wa ajabu katika kikabiliana na shida. Kwa pamoja, lazima tutengeneze njia mbayo msingi wake ni usawa, uthabiti na uendelevu. Ni lazima tuimarishe mifumo ya afya, tuimarishe hatua za kuzuia na kugundua mapema, na kuweka kipaumbele katika ujumuishaji wa NCD na huduma ya afya ya akili katika huduma ya afya ya msingi. "Mkurugenzi mkuu pia aliahidi kwamba WHO itafanya kazi kuhamasisha rasilimali za kifedha ili kuendeleza vituo vya afya vinavyostahimili hali ya hewa, mazingira endelevu ndani ya SIDS. WHO pia itaendelea kutetea 'hasara na uharibifu' ufadhili wa kukabiliana na mabadiliko ya Tabianchi na uwekezaji wa kupunguza katika nchi za kipato cha chini.
translations.hypothesis: "Licha ya rasilimali zao ndogo na vizuizi vya kijiografia, mataifa haya yameonyesha uimara mkubwa katika kukabiliana na changamoto. Pamoja, lazima tuundee njia ambayo itategemea usawa, uimara, na uendelevu. Lazima tuimarisha mifumo ya afya, tuongeze juhudi za kuzuia magonjwa na kuzipata mapema, na tupangilie kuunganisha huduma za magonjwa sugu na afya ya akili katika huduma za afya za msingi. Mkurugenzi Mkuu pia aliahidi kwamba Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) litafanya kazi ya kuharakisha upatikanaji wa rasilimali za kifedha ili kuendeleza vituo vya afya vinavyostahimili mabadiliko ya tabianchi na endelevu kwa mazingira katika nchi ndogo za kisiwa (SIDS). WHO pia itaendelea kuendelea kuomba ufadhili wa "hasara na uharibifu" kwa ajili ya uwekezaji katika mageuzi na kupunguza athari za mabadiliko ya tabianchi katika nchi zenye kipato cha chini.

translations.source: As part of agreeing the Declaration, SIDS signed up to undertake a suite of actions, covering areas such as engaging all of society, accelerating implementation, securing investments, aligning across governments and accounting for progress. The conference also showcased specific commitments by SIDS on NCDs and mental health, including to improve access to mental health care in primary care facilities, update tobacco control legislation to cover e-cigarettes and vaping, and reduce populations’ salt and sugar intake. These commitments align with WHO’s ‘best buys’ – a set of cost-effective, evidence-based interventions to tackle NCDs. The list of best buys was recently updated at the World Health Assembly in May to include secondary prevention for rheumatic fever, acute and long-term management of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease as well as several interventions for cervical, breast, colorectal, liver and childhood cancer, and the comprehensive treatment of cancer for those living with HIV. “SIDS in the Americas remain overwhelmingly vulnerable to NCDs.
translations.reference: Kama sehemu ya kukabiliana na Azimio, SIDS ilijidhatiti kuchukua hatua kadhaa, ikijumuisha maeneo kama vile kushirikisha jamii yote, kuharakisha utekelezaji, kupata uwekezaji, kuoanisha serikali zote na uhasibu kwa maendeleo. Pia mkutano huo ulionyesha ahadi maalumu za SIDS kuhusu NCDs na afya ya akili, ikiwemo kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za afya ya akili katika vituo vya huduma za msingi, kusasisha sheria ya udhibiti wa Tumbaku ili kufidia sigara za kielektroniki na mvuke, na kupunguza ulaji wa chumvi na sukari. Ahadi hizi zinapatana na 'manunuzi bora' ya WHO- seti ya afua za gharama nafuu, zenye msingi wa ushahidi ili kukabiliana na NCDs. Orodha ya manunuzi bora ilisasishwa hivi karibuni katika Mkutano wa afya Ulimwenguni mnamo Mei ili kujumuisha kinga ya pili ya Homa ya Rheumatic, udhibiti wa papo hapo na wa muda mrefu wa ugonjwa wa pumu na ugonjwa sugu wa mapafu vile vile afua kadhaa za mlango wa kizazi, matiti, utumbo mpana na Ini, Saratani ya watoto, na matibabu ya kina ya saratani kwa wale wanaoishi na VVU. "SIDS katika bara la Amerika inasalia kuwa hatarini kwa NCDs.
translations.hypothesis: Katika muktadha wa makubaliano ya Azimio, nchi za Visiwa Vidogo vya Maendeleo (SIDS) zilikubali kuchukua hatua mbalimbali, ambazo zinahusu maeneo kama vile kushirikisha jamii nzima, kuongeza kasi ya utekelezaji, kuhakikisha uwekezaji, kuunganisha sera za serikali, na kufuatilia maendeleo. Mkutano huo pia uliwasilisha ahadi maalum za SIDS kuhusu magonjwa sugu na afya ya akili, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za afya ya akili katika vituo vya afya vya msingi, kusasisha sheria za udhibiti wa tumbaku ili kujumuisha sigara za kielektroniki na vifaa vya kuvuta sigara, na kupunguza ulaji wa chumvi na sukari katika idadi ya watu. Ahadi hizi zinaendana na "suluhu bora" za Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), ambazo ni seti ya hatua za gharama nafuu na zinazostahili, zilizoundwa ili kukabiliana na magonjwa sugu. Orodha ya suluhu bora ilisasishwa hivi karibuni katika Mkutano wa Jumuiya ya Afya ya Dunia mwezi Mei, ili kujumuisha hatua za kuzuia magonjwa ya moyo, udhibiti wa muda mfupi na wa muda mrefu wa pumu na ugonjwa wa mapafu unaosumbuliwa, pamoja na hatua kadhaa za kuzuia saratani ya shingo, matiti, utumbo, ini, na saratani ya watoto, pamoja na matibabu kamili ya saratani kwa watu wanaougua HIV. "Nchi za SIDS katika Amerika bado zina hatari kubwa ya kukumbwa na magonjwa sugu."

translations.source: This Ministerial Conference comes at a unique time and will be key to amplifying the voice and needs of SIDS, bringing NCDs and mental health to the forefront of our priority list,” said Dr Jarbas Barbosa, PAHO Director, and WHO Regional Director for the Americas. “To build on this momentum, we must act now. PAHO is ready to support accelerated implementation of interventions in our region, including mainstreaming care for these conditions into primary health services and taking advantage of innovations such as digital health tools.” SIDS countries have a track record of driving global decision-making; their Port of Spain and SAMOA pathway agreements paved the way for the first-ever UN political declaration on NCDs in 2018. The conference and the Declaration will inform and shape forthcoming UN General Assembly High-Level Meetings on universal health coverage in September 2023 and on NCDs in 2025.
translations.reference: Mkutano huu wa mawaziri unakuja katika wakati wa kipekee na utakuwa ufunguo wa kupaza sauti na mahitaji ya SIDS, na kuleta NCDs na afya ya akili mbele ya orodha yetu ya kipaumbele", alisema Dk Jarbas Barbosa, mkurugenzi wa PAHO, na mkurugenzi wa WHO wa kanda ya Amerika. "Ili kuendeleza kasi hii, lazima tuchukue hatua sasa. PAHO ipo tayari kusaidia utekelezaji wa kasi wa afua katika kanda yetu, ikiwa ni pamoja na kujumuisha utunzaji wa hali hizi katika huduma za afya ya msingi na kutumia fursa ya ubunifu kama vile zana za afya za kidijitali". Nchi za SIDS zina rekodi ya kuendesha maamuzi ya kimataifa; mikataba yao ya njia ya bahari ya uhispania na SAMOA ilifungua njia kwa Azimio la kwanza la kisiasa la umoja wa mataifa kuhusu NCDs mnamo 2018. Mkutano huo na Azimio zitafahamisha na kuunda mikutano ya ngazi ya juu ya Baraza kuu la umoja wa mataifa inayokuja kuhusu huduma ya afya kwa wote mwezi Sepemba 2023 na kuhusu NCDs mnamo 2025.
translations.hypothesis: Mkutano huu wa Mawaziri unafanyika katika wakati muhimu sana, na utakuwa muhimu katika kuongeza sauti na mahitaji ya nchi ndogo za kisiwa (SIDS), na kuweka magonjwa sugu na afya ya akili katika orodha yetu ya mambo muhimu. "Ili kuendeleza maendeleo haya, lazima tuwe na hatua sasa hivi," alisema Dkt. Jarbas Barbosa, Mkurugenzi wa PAHO na Mkurugenzi wa WHO kwa eneo la Amerika. "PAHO iko tayari kusaidia utekelezaji wa haraka wa hatua katika eneo letu, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuunganisha huduma za afya kwa wagonjwa wa magonjwa haya katika huduma za afya za msingi, na kutumia teknolojia mpya kama vile zana za afya za kidijitali." Nchi za SIDS zina historia ya kuongoza katika kufanya maamuzi ya kimataifa; makubaliano yao ya Port of Spain na SAMOA yaliweka msingi kwa tamko la kwanza la kisiasa la Umoja wa Mataifa kuhusu magonjwa sugu mnamo 2018. Mkutano huu na Tamko hilo vitatoa mwongozo na vitasaidia katika mikutano ya ngazi ya juu ya Baraza Kuu la Umoja wa Mataifa ambayo yatafanyika mnamo Septemba 2023 kuhusu huduma za afya kwa kila mtu, na mnamo 2025 kuhusu magonjwa sugu.

translations.source: WHO’s Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting ends with stirring call for worldwide action Delegates and representatives left the Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting with a stirring call to action from its director Dr Ibrahima Socé Fall. As the multinational meeting, attended by some 300 key partners, came to an end in Geneva on Tuesday 13 June, Dr Fall urged participants to take on board the message that, “if we do not challenge ourselves, we cannot evolve and improve”. In a wide-ranging event held to review progress against the WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 and generate a better understanding of global NTD operations from both disease-specific and cross-cutting perspectives, partners, donors, technical partners, institutions and country representatives reinforced their commitment to achieving an ambitious target: a world free from neglected tropical diseases by 2030. The meeting’s primary theme centred around the vision of “One community delivering one Global NTD Programme”.
translations.reference: Mkutano wa washirika wa mpango wa magonjwa ya Kitropiki yaliyosahaulika wa WHO unamalizika kwa wito wa kusisimua wa kuchukua hatua Duniani kote. Wajumbe na wawakilishi waliacha washirika wa mpango wa magonjwa ya Kitropiki yaliyopuuzwa, mkutano na mwito wa kuchukua hatua kutoka kwa mkurugenzi wake Dk Ibrahima Soce Fall. Kama mkutano wa kimataifa, ulihudhuriwa na baadhi ya washirika muhimu 300, ulifikia tamati huko Jeniva Jumanne 13 Juni, Dk Fall aliwataka washiriki kuchukua ujumbe kwamba, "kama hatujipi changamoto sisi wenyewe, hatuwezi kubadilika na kuboresha". Katika hafla kubwa iliyofanyika kukagua maendeleo dhidi ya mpango kabambe wa WHO wa magonjwa ya Kitropiki yaliyosahaulika 2024-2030 na kutoa uelewa mzuri wa shughuli za kimataifa za NTD kutoka kwa mitazamo mahususi ya magonjwa na mtambuko, washirika, wafadhili, washirika wa kiufundi, taasisi na wawakilishi wa nchi waliimarisha dhamira yao ya kufikia lengo kuu: Ulimwengu usio na magonjwa ya Kitropiki yaliyosahaulika ifikapo 2030. Mada kuu ya mkutano ilijikita katika maono ya "jumuia moja inayotoa mpango mmoja wa kimataifa wa NTD".
translations.hypothesis:
Mkutano wa Washirika wa Programu ya Kimataifa ya Magonjwa ya Tropiki Yaliyosahaulika ya WHO umekamilika kwa wito mkali wa kuchukua hatua duniani kote.

Wawakilishi na wajumbe wa mkutano huo, ambao ulihudhuriwa na washirika muhimu wapatao 300, waliondoka na wito wa kuchukua hatua kutoka kwa mkurugenzi wake, Dk. Ibrahima Socé Fall. Huku mkutano huo, uliofanyika Geneva siku ya Jumanne, Juni 13, ukifikia mwisho wake, Dk. Fall aliwaomba washiriki kuchukua ujumbe kwamba, "ikiwa hatajitahidi, hatuwezi kubadilika na kuboresha."

Katika mkutano huo, ambao ulikuwa na mada mbalimbali na ulilenga kukagua maendeleo kulingana na mpango wa WHO wa magonjwa ya tropiki yaliyosahaulika kwa mwaka 2021–2030, na kuongeza uelewa wa shughuli za kimataifa za magonjwa haya kutoka kwa mitazamo mbalimbali, washirika, wafadhili, washirika wa kiufundi, taasisi na wawakilishi wa nchi walirekebisha azimio lao la kufikia lengo kubwa: dunia isiyo na magonjwa ya tropiki yaliyosahaulika ifikapo mwaka 2030.

Mada kuu ya mkutano huo ilikuwa "jamii moja ikifanya programu moja ya kimataifa ya magonjwa ya tropiki yaliyosahaulika."

translations.source: Taking their cues from the three key strategic shifts advocated in the road map – greater country ownership, measuring impacts not process, and a commitment to cross-cutting activities and collaboration for greater efficiency – discussions were pragmatic, clear-sighted and suffused also with the need for health equity and justice to tackle NTDs. Only such an approach, the meeting heard, can bring about the change that is needed by some of the world’s poorest communities to achieve the United Nations 2030 Sustainable Development Goals. In the first such global meeting since the launch of the road map in January 2021, delegates heard also from WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Welcoming participants at the beginning of the two-day symposium, Dr Tedros said, “This gathering illustrates what WHO is all about – partners coming together to leverage their collective strength to address global health challenges that none of us could address alone. “A multifaceted challenge like neglected tropical diseases takes a multifaceted approach, and that is what we bring, together”.
translations.reference: Kuchukua vidokezo vyao kutoka kwa mabadiliko matatu muhimu ya kimkakati yaliyopendekezwa kwenye muongozo- umiliki mkubwa wa nchi, kupima athari si mchakato, na kujitolea kwa shughuli mtambuka na ushirikiano wa ufanisi zaidi- mijadala ilikuwa ya kisayansi, yenye kuona wazi na iliyoshinikizwa pia na haja ya usawa wa afya na haki ili kukabiliana na NTDs. Ni mtazamo kama huo pekee, mkutano ulisikika, unaweza kuleta mabadiliko ambayo yanahitajika kwa baadhi ya jamii maskini zaidi Duniani kufikia malengo ya maendeleo endelevu ya umoja wa mataifa 2030. Katika mkutano wa kwanza kama huu wa kimataifa tangu kuzinduliwa kwa mpango kabambe mnamo Januari 2021, wajumbe walisikika pia kutoka kwa mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Akiwakaribisha washiriki mwanzoni mwa kongamano la siku mbili, Dk Tedros alisema, "mkusanyiko huu unaonyesha kile ambacho WHO inahusu- washirika kuja pamoja ili kuongeza nguvu zao za pamoja kushughulikia changamoto za afya za kimataifa ambazo hata mmoja wetu angeweza kushughulikia peke yake. "Changamoto yenye mambo mengi kama vile magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyopuuzwa inachukua mtazamo wa pande nyingi, na hilo ndilo linalotuleta, pamoja".
translations.hypothesis: Kutokana na miongozo mitatu muhimu ya mabadiliko ya kimkakati iliyoainishwa katika mpango huo – kuongeza umiliki wa nchi, kupima matokeo badala ya taratibu, na kujitolea kwa shughuli za pamoja na ushirikiano ili kuongeza ufanisi – majadiliano yalikuwa ya vitendo, ya wazi, na pia yaliangazia umuhimu wa usawa na haki katika afya ili kukabiliana na magonjwa ya kaskazini. Mkutano huo ulibainisha kwamba, tu kwa njia hiyo ndiyo mabadiliko yanayohitajika yanaweza kufanikishwa katika baadhi ya jamii maskini zaidi duniani ili kufikia Malengo ya Maendeleo Endelevu ya Umoja wa Mataifa ya mwaka 2030. Katika mkutano huo wa kimataifa wa kwanza tangu uzinduzi wa mpango huo mnamo Januari 2021, wawakilishi walisikiliza pia kutoka kwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dk. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Akimkaribisha washiriki katika mwanzo wa semina hiyo ya siku mbili, Dk. Tedros alisema, “Mkutano huu unaonyesha ni nini ambacho WHO inalifanya – washirika wanakutana ili kuunganisha nguvu zao ili kushughulikia changamoto za afya duniani ambazo hakuna mtu wetu aliyeweza kushughulikia peke yake. “Changamoto kama ile ya magonjwa ya kaskazini inahitaji mbinu mbalimbali, na ndiyo kile tunachotoa, pamoja.”

translations.source: Delegates and participants spent the subsequent two days identifying the major gaps and challenges to achieving high-level goals and local, on-the-ground challenges. Those on-the-ground challenges include ensuring that people directly affected by NTDs, and those directly responsible for administering interventions against NTDs, are solicited and acknowledged, particularly in terms of communication and community engagement. The meeting noted also the importance of developing communities of practice, in order to build the capacity and confidence of the global NTD workforce. In further discussions, delegates agreed on principles and practical steps to implement action towards the stated targets and planned together for a Global Action Plan for 2025–2030. Key actions and decisions arising from the meeting included recommendations for strengthening and operationalizing national coordination platforms to ensure coordination for joint planning and for monitoring and evaluation, and to ensure more efficient supply chain management within national systems.
translations.reference: Wajumbe na washiriki walitumia siku mbili mfululizo kubainisha mapungufu na changamoto kuu za kufikia malengo ya hali ya juu na changamoto za ndani, za msingi. Changamoto hizo za msingi ni pamoja na kuhakikisha kwamba watu walioathirika moja kwa moja na NTDs, na wale wanaohusika moja kwa moja na kusimamia afua dhidi ya NTDs, wanaombwa na kutambuliwa, hususani katika suala la mawasiliano na ushirikishwaji wa jamii. Pia mkutano ulibainisha umuhimu wa kuendeleza jamii za mazoezi, ili kujenga uwezo na imani ya wafanyakazi wa kimataifa wa NTD. Katika majadiliano zaidi, wajumbe walikubaliana kuhusu kanuni na hatua za kivitendo za kutekeleza hatua kuelekea malengo yaliyotajwa na kupangwa pamoja kwa mpango wa utekelezaji wa kimataifa wa 2025-2030. Hatua hiyo muhimu na maamuzi yaliyotokana na mkutano huo yalijumuisha mapendekezo ya kuimarisha na kutekeleza majukwaa ya uratibu wa kitaifa ili kuhakikisha uratibu wa mipango ya pamoja na ufuatiliaji na tathmini, na kuhakikisha usimamizi bora wa ugavi ndani ya mifumo ya kitaifa.
translations.hypothesis: Wawakilishi na washiriki walitumia siku mbili zilizofuata kujadili pengo na changamoto kuu za kufanikisha malengo ya kitaifa na changamoto za kila siku zinazokutana katika eneo husika. Changamoto hizo za kila siku zinajumuisha kuhakikisha kwamba watu wanaowezwa na magonjwa ya tropikali (NTDs) na wale wanaohusika moja kwa moja katika utekelezaji wa hatua za kukabiliana na magonjwa hayo, husikilizwa na matakwa yao yanatambuliwa, hasa katika suala la mawasiliano na ushirikishwaji wa jamii. Mkutano huo pia ulitambua umuhimu wa kuunda vikundi vya wataalamu, ili kuimarisha uwezo na kujenga imani ya wafanyakazi wa kimataifa wanaoshughulikia magonjwa ya tropikali. Katika majadiliano zaidi, wawakilishi walikubaliana juu ya kanuni na hatua za vitendo za kutekeleza malengo yaliyotajwa, na walipanga pamoja kuhusu Mpango wa Kimataifa wa Hatua za 2025–2030. Hatua na maamuzi muhimu yaliyotokana na mkutano huo yaliwemo mapendekezo ya kuimarisha na kutekeleza mifumo ya kitaifa ya uratibu, ili kuhakikisha uratibu wa mipango ya pamoja, pamoja na ufuatiliaji na tathmini, na pia kuhakikisha usimamizi bora wa usambazaji wa dawa ndani ya mifumo ya kitaifa.

translations.source: The Partners’ Meeting took place also at the end of a major functional review process within WHO’s Department of Control of Neglected Tropical Diseases. Over the course of the past four months, WHO has been hearing contributions and testimony from all its partners and stakeholders, in order to ensure that it itself embodies the values of accountability, transparency and equity that it espouses and demands. Those values also include ensuring that NTDs are repositioned in the global health architecture. Meeting participants welcomed the emphasis on the key roles that the NTD community can and must play in contributing to wider challenges such as Universal Health Coverage, One Health and the increasing threat of global climate change. Delegates attending in person were also able to enjoy an exhibition dedicated to neglected tropical diseases at WHO headquarters.
translations.reference: Mkutano wa washirika ulifanyika pia mwishoni mwa mchakato mkubwa wa mapitio ya utendaji ndani ya idara ya WHO ya udhibiti wa magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyopuuzwa. Katika kipindi cha miezi minne iliyopita, WHO imekuwa ikisikiliza michango na ushuhuda kutoka kwa washirika na washikadau wake wote, ili kuhakikisha kwamba yenyewe inajumuisha maadili ya uwajibikaji, ukweli na uwazi ambayo inaunga mkono na kudai. Pia mabadiliko hayo ni pamoja na kuhakikisha kuwa NTDs zimewekwa upya katika usanifu wa kimataifa wa afya. Washiriki wa mkutano walikaribisha msisitizo juu ya majukumu muhimu ambayo jumuiya ya NTD inaweza na ni lazima kutekeleza katika kuchangia changamoto kubwa kama vile huduma ya afya kwa wote, afya moja na ongezeko la tishio la kilimwengu la mabadiliko ya Tabianchi. Wajumbe waliohudhuria ana kwa ana pia waliweza kufurahia maonyesho yanayohusu magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyosahaulika katika makao makuu ya WHO.
translations.hypothesis: Mkutano wa Washirika ulifanyika pia mwishoni mwa mchakato muhimu wa tathmini ya utendaji kazi ndani ya Idara ya Udhibiti wa Magonjwa ya Tropiki yasiyo ya kawaida ya Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO). Katika miezi minne iliyopita, WHO imekuwa sikiliza maoni na ushuhuda kutoka kwa washirika na wadau wake wote, ili kuhakikisha kwamba shirika hilo lilihutubu maadili ya uwajibikaji, uwazi na usawa ambayo linataka na yanayotarajiwa. Maadili hayo pia yanajumuisha kuhakikisha kwamba magonjwa ya tropiki yasiyo ya kawaida yamepangwa upya katika mfumo wa afya wa kimataifa. Washiriki wa mkutano walipenda umakini ulioelekezwa kwenye majukumu muhimu ambayo jamii inayoshughulikia magonjwa haya inaweza na inapaswa kucheza katika kukabiliana na changamoto kubwa kama vile huduma ya afya kwa kila mtu, "One Health" na hatari inayoongezeka ya mabadiliko ya tabianchi duniani. Wawakilishi waliohudhuria kwa kibinafsi pia walipata fursa ya kutembelea maonyesho yaliyotolewa kwa magonjwa ya tropiki yasiyo ya kawaida katika makao makuu ya WHO.

translations.source: A set of metal panels was commissioned to illustrate the 20 conditions that make up the NTD grouping, and these were accompanied by photographs and information illustrating the actions that have been put in place over the course of many decades to tackle them.
translations.reference: Seti ya paneli ya chuma iliagizwa ili kuonyesha kanuni 20 zinazounda kikundi cha NTD, na hizi ziliambatana na picha na taarifa zinazoonyesha hatua ambazo zimewekwa katika kipindi cha miongo mingi kukabilian nazo.
translations.hypothesis: Kundi la paneli za chuma lilitengenezwa ili kuonyesha hali 20 ambazo huunda kundi la magonjwa yasiyoambukiza (NTD), na paneli hizo ziliambatana na picha na taarifa zinazoelezea hatua ambazo zimetekelezwa kwa miongo mingi ili kukabiliana na magonjwa hayo.

translations.source: Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting, 12–13 June 2023 Representatives of the global NTD community will gather in Geneva next week to participate in the Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting, which takes place in headquarters’ auditorium on 12-13 June 2023. The objectives of the meeting are to review progress on the WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 and generate a better understanding of global NTD operations from both disease-specific and cross-cutting perspectives, as well as to engage in wide-ranging discussions around the vision for One WHO delivering on one Global NTD Programme. While previous global meetings of NTD partners were convened by WHO in 2007 and 2017, this third upcoming event is the first since the launch of the road map in January 2021. The WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 is a comprehensive framework that outlines targets, mechanisms for alignment with the Sustainable Development Goals and other global agendas and calls for strategic shifts in NTD approaches with the aim of ending the epidemic of neglected tropical diseases by 2030.
translations.reference: Mkutano wa washirika wa mpango wa magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyopuuzwa, 12-13 Juni 2023. Wawakilishi wa jumuia ya kimataifa ya NTD watakutana Jeniva wiki ijayo ili kushiriki katika mkutano wa washirika wa mpango wa magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyopuuzwa Duniani, ambao utafanyika katika ukumbi wa makao makuu tarehe 12-13 Juni 2023. Malengo ya mkutano huo ni kukagua maendeleo ya muongozo wa WHO wa magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyosahaulika 2021-2030 na kutoa uelewa mzuri wa operesheni za kimataifa za NTD kutoka kwa mitazamo mahususi ya magonjwa na mtambuka, pamoja na kushiriki katika nyanja mbali mbali mijadala kuhusu maono ya One WHO inayotoa mpango mmoja wa Global NTD. Wakati mikutano ya awali ya kimataifa ya washirika wa NTD iliitishwa na WHO mwaka 2007 na 2017, tukio hili la tatu lijalo ni la kwanza tangu kuzinduliwa kwa mpango kabambe mnamo Januari 2021. Mpango kabambe wa WHO wa magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyosahaulika 2021-2030 ni mfumo mpana unaoainisha malengo, taratibu za kupatanisha malengo ya maendeleo endelevu na ajenda nyingine za kimataifa na kutoa wito wa mabadiliko ya kimkakati katika mbinu za NTD kwa lengo la kukomesha jenga la magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyosahaulika ifikapo 2030.
translations.hypothesis: Mkutano wa Washirika wa Programu ya Kimataifa ya Magonjwa ya Tropiki Yaliyosahaulika, Juni 12-13, 2023. Wawakilishi wa jumuiya ya kimataifa ya magonjwa haya watakutana mjini Geneva wiki ijayo ili kushiriki katika Mkutano wa Washirika wa Programu ya Kimataifa ya Magonjwa ya Tropiki Yaliyosahaulika, ambao utafanyika katika ukumbi mkuu wa makao makuu, Juni 12-13, 2023. Lengo la mkutano huu ni kukagua maendeleo ya mpango wa WHO wa kukabiliana na magonjwa ya tropiki yaliyosahaulika kwa kipindi cha 2021-2030, na pia kukuza uelewa bora wa shughuli za kimataifa za magonjwa haya, kutoka kwa mtazamo wa magonjwa mahususi na pia mtazamo wa jumla. Pia, mkutano utalenga katika majadiliano mbalimbali kuhusu maono ya WHO moja, ambayo itatekeleza Programu moja ya Kimataifa ya Magonjwa ya Tropiki Yaliyosahaulika. Ingawa mikutano ya awali ya kimataifa ya washirika wa magonjwa haya ilikuwa imeandaliwa na WHO mwaka wa 2007 na 2017, tukio hili la tatu linakuja kama la kwanza tangu uzinduzi wa mpango huo mnamo Januari 2021. Mpango wa WHO wa kukabiliana na magonjwa ya tropiki yaliyosahaulika kwa kipindi cha 2021-2030 ni mfumo kamili ambao unaeleza malengo, njia za kuunganisha na Lengo la Maendeleo Endelevu na ajenda zingine za kimataifa, na pia unatoa wito wa mabadiliko muhimu katika mbinu za kukabiliana na magonjwa haya, kwa lengo la kumaliza janga la magonjwa ya tropiki yaliyosahaulika ifikapo mwaka wa 2030.

translations.source: The meeting will focus on: reviewing current progress to achieving the 2030 targets; identifying the major gaps and challenges to reaching those targets; agreeing principles and practical steps for how to implement action towards the targets; galvanizing support and commitment from NTD partners to operationalize the shifts advocated in the road map and to achieve its targets; and
translations.reference: Mkutano utazingatia: Kukagua maendeleo ya sasa ya kufikia malengo ya 2030; Kubainisha mapungufu na changamoto kubwa za kufikia malengo hayo; Kukubaliana na kanuni na hatua za kiutendaji za jinsi ya kutekeleza hatua kuelekea malengo; Kuimarisha msaada na kujitolea kutoka kwa washirika wa NTD kutekeleza mpango kabambe na kufikia malengo yake; na
translations.hypothesis: Mkutano huo utalenga: kupitia maendeleo ya sasa katika kufikia malengo ya mwaka wa 2030; kutambua pengo na changamoto kuu katika kufikia malengo hayo; kukubaliana kanuni na hatua za vitendo kuhusu jinsi ya kutekeleza programu za kufikia malengo hayo; kuhamasisha ushirikiano na kujitolea kutoka kwa washirika katika kupambana na magonjwa yasiyoambukiza (NTD) ili kutekeleza mabadiliko yaliyopendekezwa katika mpango huo na kufikia malengo yake; na.

translations.source: planning together for a Global Action Plan 2025–2030. Over 300 participants in the meeting are expected to attend, either in-person or online. They will include representatives of the global NTD community, from countries and donors to implementing and technical partners, from academia to patients’ associations and all other entities and institutions involved in the fight against NTDs. An exhibition on neglected tropical diseases will take place in the mezzanine of the B building, just above the cafeteria. A set of metal panels will illustrate the 20 conditions grouped under the NTD umbrella and provide information on actions implemented to tackle their burden.
translations.reference: Kupanga pamoja kwa mpango wa utekelezaji wa kimataifa wa 2025-2030. Zaidi ya washirika 300 katika mkutano wanatarajiwa kuhudhuria, ana kwa ana au mtandaoni. Watajumuisha wawakilishi wa jumuiya ya kitaifa ya NTD, kutoka nchi na wafadhili hadi watekelezaji na washirika wa kiufundi, kutoka mafunzoni hadi vyama vya wagonjwa na vyombo vyengine vyote na taasisi zinazohusika katika mapambano dhidi ya NTDs. Maonyesho ya magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyopuuzwa yatafanyika katika Mezzanine ya jengo B, juu kidogo ya mgahawa. Seti ya paneli za chuma itaonyesha kanuni 20 zilizowekwa chini ya mwamvuli wa NTD na kutoa taarifa kuhusu hatua zinazotekelezwa ili kukabiliana na mzigo wao.
translations.hypothesis: Tunapanga pamoja kwa ajili ya Mpango wa Kimataifa wa Hatua za Mwaka wa 2025–2030. Inatarajiwa kwamba zaidi ya watu 300 watashiriki katika mkutano huo, baikwa kwa uhalali au mtandaoni. Washiriki hao watajumuisha wawakilishi kutoka kwa jamii ya kimataifa inayoshughulikia magonjwa ya kaskazini, kutoka nchi na wafadhili, hadi washirika wanaotekeleza na wataalamu, kutoka taasisi za elimu hadi vyama vya wagonjwa, na pia mashirika na taasisi zote zinazohusika katika mapambano dhidi ya magonjwa hayo. Maonyesho kuhusu magonjwa ya kaskazini yatafanyika katika eneo la juu ya jengo la B, karibu na ukumbi wa chakula. Kundi la paneli za chuma litataja hali 20 ambazo zimepangwa chini ya kategoria ya magonjwa ya kaskazini, na kutoa taarifa kuhusu hatua zilizochukuliwa ili kukabiliana na athari za magonjwa hayo.

translations.source: WHO announces winners of the 4th Health for All Film Festival 7 winning short films, 4 special mentions from the jury The World Health Organization has announced the official selection of this year’s winning films at its 4th Annual Health for All Film Festival, held at WHO Headquarters, Geneva. The event, attended in person and online by actors, producers and public figures, saw winning films announced for 7 different categories, while 4 films received special mentions from the jury.
translations.reference: WHO inatangaza washindi wa Tamasha la 4 la Afya kwa wote 7 kushinda filamu fupi, 4 kutajwa maalumu kutoka Jury Shirika la afya Duniani limetangaza uteuzi rasmi rasmi wa filamu zilizoshinda mwaka huu katika tamasha lake la 4 la filamu la afya kwa wote, lililofanyika makao makuu ya WHO, Jeniva. Hafla hiyo, ilihudhuriwa ana kwa ana na mtandaoni na waigizaji, watayarishani na watu mashuhuri, ilishuhudia filamu zilizoshinda zikitangazwa kwa kategoria 7 tofauti, huku filamu 4 zikitajwa maalumu kutoka Jury.
translations.hypothesis: Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) limetangaza washindi wa tamasha la filamu la "Afya kwa Wote" la mwaka wa nne. Filamu saba za muda mfupi zimeshinda, na filamu nyingine nne zimepokea heshima maalum kutoka kwa jaji. Shirika la Afya Duniani limetangaza filamu ambazo zimechaguliwa kuwa washindi katika tamasha lake la mwaka la "Afya kwa Wote," ambalo limefanyika katika makao makuu ya WHO, mjini Geneva. Tukio hilo, ambalo limehudhuriwa na waigizaji, watayarishi, na watu maarufu, kwa njia ya moja kwa moja na mtandaoni, limeona filamu za washindi zikitangazwa katika makundi saba tofauti, huku filamu nne zikipokea heshima maalum kutoka kwa jaji.

translations.source: This is the fourth year of the film festival and competition was no less fierce, with some 93 shortlisted films covering issues ranging from anxiety and depression through to the effects of climate change on health, as well as the health challenges of people with disabilities. The films were judged by a panel of distinguished professionals, artists and activists, including the renown actors, Sharon Stone and Alfonso Herrera, dance choreographer, Sherrie Silver, climate activist, Sophia Kianni and media personality, Adelle Onyango. They were joined by senior United Nations officials and WHO staff. “The Health for All Film Festival brings a human face to WHO’s scientific work,” said WHO Director-General, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “Listening to the voices of people affected by health issues is a powerful way to raise awareness and improve our understanding of people’s experiences and this can help us advance towards health for all.”
translations.reference: Huu ni mwaka wa nne wa tamasha la filamu na ushindani ulikuwa mkali sana, na baadhi ya filamu 93 ziliorodheshwa zilizingatia masuala kuanzia wasiwasi hadi unyogovu hadi athari za mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa kwa afya, vile vile changamoto za afya za watu wenye ulemavu. Filamu zilihukumiwa na jopo la watalamu mashuhuri, wasanii na wanaharakati, wakiwemo waigizaji mashuhuri Sharon Stone na Alfonso Herrera, mwandishi wa densi, Sherrie Silver, mwanaharakati wa hali ya hewa, Sophia kianni na mtunzi wa vyombo vya habari, Adelle Onyango. Walijumuika na mafisa wakuu wa umoja wa mataifa na wafanyakazi wa WHO. "Tamasha la afya kwa wote la filamu huleta sura ya kibinadamu kwa kazi ya kisayansi ya WHO", mkurugenzi wa WHO, Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus alisema. "Kusikiliza sauti za watu walioathiriwa na masuala ya afya ni njia nzuri ya kuongeza ufahamu na kuboresha uelewa wetu wa uzoefu wa watu na hii inaweza kutusaidia kusonga mbele kuelekea afya kwa wote"
translations.hypothesis: Hii ni mwaka wa nne wa tamasha la filamu na ushindani ulikuwa mkali sana. Filamu 93 zilizochaguliwa zilifunika masuala mbalimbali, kuanzia wasiwasi na unyogovu hadi athari za mabadiliko ya tabianchi kwenye afya, pamoja na changamoto za kiafya zinazowakabili watu wenye ulemavu. Filamu hizo zilitathminiwa na jopo la wataalamu, wasanii na wanaharakati mashuhuri, ikiwa ni pamoja na waigizaji maarufu, Sharon Stone na Alfonso Herrera, mchoraji wa ngoma, Sherrie Silver, mwanaharakati wa mabadiliko ya tabianchi, Sophia Kianni, na mtu maarufu wa vyombo vya habari, Adelle Onyango. Wao walishirikiana na maafisa wakuu wa Umoja wa Mataifa na wafanyakazi wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO). "Tamasha la Filamu la Afya kwa Wote huleta mwangaza wa kibinadamu kwenye kazi ya kisayansi ya WHO," alisema Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dk. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Kusikiliza sauti za watu walioathirika na masuala ya afya ni njia yenye nguvu ya kuongeza uelewa na kuboresha ufahamu wetu kuhusu uzoefu wa watu, na hii inaweza kutusaidia kusonga mbele kuelekea afya kwa wote."

translations.source: From the official selection one “GRAND PRIX” is attributed for each of the three main competition categories: Universal Health Coverage, Health emergencies, and Better health and well-being, which align with WHO’s Triple Billion Targets. Sharon Stone, Golden Globe and Emmy Award-winning actress from the United States of America, producer and activist for health and humanitarian causes said: "I am delighted to be part of the Health for All Film Festival. This is about creating better awareness on crucial actions needed for reaching healthier living conditions around the world. The stories selected talk to us about the intrinsic value of good health and its access, and they advocate for universal health coverage.
translations.reference: Kutoka kwa uteuzi rasmi "GRAND PRIX" inahusishwa kwa kila moja ya kategoria kuu tatu za mashindano: Huduma ya afya kwa wote, dharura za afya, na afya bora na ustawi, ambayo inalingana na malengo ya bilioni tatu za WHO. Sharon Stone, Golden Globe na mwigizaji aliyeshinda tuzo ya Emmy kutoka Marekani, mtayarishaji na mwanaharakati alisema; "Nimefurahi kuwa sehemu ya tamasha la filamu la afya kwa wote. Hii ni kuhusu kujenga ufahamu bora juu ya hatua muhimu zinahitajika ili kufikia hali bora ya maisha Duniani kote. Simulizi zilizochaguliwa zinazungumza nasi kuhusu thamani ya asili ya afya bora na ufikiaji wake, na zinateteta huduma ya afya kwa wote.
translations.hypothesis: Kutoka katika orodha rasmi, tuzo moja ya "GRAND PRIX" hutolewa kwa kila moja ya makundi matatu makuu ya ushindani: Ufidhulizi wa Afya kwa Wote, Dhaifu za afya, na Afya bora na ustawi, ambayo yanaendana na Malengo matatu ya WHO. Sharon Stone, mwigizaji kutoka Marekani ambaye ameshinda tuzo za Golden Globe na Emmy, na pia mtayarishaji na mshiriki katika masuala ya afya na ubinadamu, alisema: "Ninafurahi kuwa sehemu ya Tamasha la Filamu la Afya kwa Wote. Hili ni kuhusu kuongeza ufahamu kuhusu hatua muhimu zinazohitajika ili kufikia hali bora za maisha duniani kote. Hadithi zilizochaguliwa zinatuambia kuhusu umuhimu wa afya nzuri na ufikivu wake, na zinaitetea ufidhulizi wa afya kwa wote."

translations.source: Universal Health Coverage is a very important right, it’s a human right for everyone around the world. "Four special prizes were also given for a Student-produced film, a film on Climate Change and Health, a film on Sexual and Reproductive Health and Rights and a Very Short Film. The theme of mental health featured heavily in this year’s winning entries, including a powerful and moving short film from Sweden about anxiety and depression. The film, set to a stirring soundtrack, featured a series of actors expressing different stages of anxiety and how it can manifest itself. The overall message was that you are not alone in experiencing negative thoughts and that it is okay to acknowledge such feelings.Another winning film, from Bangladesh, features a young boy who was exposed to lead from a local factory.
translations.reference: Huduma ya afya ya wote ni haki muhimu sana, ni haki ya Binadamu kwa kila mtu Duniani kote. "zawadi nne maalumu zilitolewa pia kwa filamu iliyotayarishwa na wanafunzi, filamu ya mabadiliko ya Tabianchi na afya, filamu ya afya na haki za jinsia na uzazi na filamu fupi sana. Mada ya afya ya akili iliangaziwa sana katika maingizo yaliyoshinda mwaka huu, ikijumuisha filamu fupi yenye nguvu na ya kusisimua kutoka Swideni kuhusu wasiwasi na mfadhaiko. Filamu hiyo, ikiwa na sauti ya kusisimua, iliangazia mfululizo wa waigizaji wakieleza hatua mbalimbali za wasiwasi na jinsi inavyoweza kujidhihirisha. Ujumbe wa jumla ulikuwa kwamba haupo peke yako katika uzoefu wa mawazo hasi na kwamba ni sawa kukiri hisia kama hizo. Filamu nyingine iliyoshinda, kutoka Bangladeshi, ina mvulana mdogo ambae alipata uongozi kutoka katika kiwanda cha ndani.
translations.hypothesis: Huduma ya afya kwa kila mtu ni haki muhimu sana, ni haki ya binadamu kwa kila mtu duniani. "Zawadi maalum nne pia zilitolewa kwa filamu iliyotengenezwa na mwanafunzi, filamu kuhusu mabadiliko ya tabianchi na afya, filamu kuhusu afya na haki za uzazi, na filamu fupi sana. Mada ya afya ya akili ilikuwa muhimu katika kazi zilizoshinda mwaka huu, ikiwa ni pamoja na filamu fupi yenye nguvu na ya kusisimua kutoka Sweden kuhusu wasiwasi na unyogovu. Filamu hiyo, iliyoambatana na muziki wa kuvutia, ilionyesha mfululizo wa waigizaji wakionyesha hatua tofauti za wasiwasi na jinsi linavyoweza kujidhihirisha. Ujumbe kuu ulikuwa kwamba huna peke yako katika kupata mawazo hasi, na ni sawa kutambua hisia hizo. Filamu nyingine iliyoshinda, kutoka Bangladesh, inaonyesha mvulana mdogo ambaye alifanyiwa madhara na sumu ya zebaki iliyotoka katika kiwanda cha eneo hilo."

translations.source: The moving film details the effects this has had on his educational development and the work that a local non-governmental organization has done to both highlight the issue and take action to prevent lead poisoning in the affected community. translations.source: Basic energy access lags amid renewable opportunities, new report shows Global energy access gap persists: 675 million people without electricity, 2.3 billion people reliant on harmful cooking fuels A new report by the International Energy Agency (IEA), the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA), the United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), the World Bank, and the World Health Organization (WHO), released today, finds that the world is not on track to achieve the Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 7 for energy by 2030. This year marks the halfway point for achieving SDGs by 2030. SDG 7 is to ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy.
translations.reference: Upatikanaji wa nishati ya msingi unachelewa huku kukiwa na fursa zinazoweza kurejeshwa, ripoti mpya inaonyesha Pengo la upatikanaji wa nishati Duniani linaendelea, watu milioni 675 bila umeme, watu bilioni 2.3 wanategemea nishati hatari za kupikia. Ripoti mpya ya wakala wa kimataifa wa nishati (IEA), wakala wa kimataifa wa nishati mbadala (IRENA), idara ya takwimu ya Umoja wa mataifa (UNSD), Benki ya Dunia, na shirika la afya Duniani (WHO), iliyotolewa leo, inaonyesha kuwa Dunia haipo kwenye njia ya kufikia lengo la maendeleo endelevu (SDG) 7 la nishati ifikiapo 2030. Mwaka huu ni ishara ya nusu ya kufikia SDGs ifikapo 2030. SDG 7 ina hakikisha upatikanaji wa nishati nafuu, inayotegemewa, endelevu na ya kisasa.
translations.hypothesis:
Upatikanaji wa nishati bado ni mdogo licha ya fursa za nishati mbadala, ripoti mpya inaonyesha.

Upungufu wa nishati duniani bado unaendelea: watu milioni 675 hawana umeme, na watu bilioni 2.3 wanategemea mafuta hatari ya kupikia.

Ripoti mpya iliyotolewa leo na Shirika la Kimataifa la Nishati (IEA), Shirika la Kimataifa la Nishati Mbadala (IRENA), Idara ya Takwimu ya Umoja wa Mataifa (UNSD), Benki ya Dunia, na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), inaonyesha kwamba dunia bado haiko kwenye mstari wa kufanikisha Lengo la Maendeleo Endelevu (SDG) la namba 7 kuhusu nishati ifikapo mwaka 2030.

Mwaka huu ni nusu ya muda wa kufanikisha malengo hayo ifikapo mwaka 2030. Lengo la SDG la namba 7 ni kuhakikisha upatikanaji wa nishati ya bei nafuu, ya kuaminika, endelevu, na ya kisasa.

translations.source: The goal includes reaching universal access to electricity and clean cooking, doubling historic levels of efficiency improvements, and substantially increasing the share of renewables in the global energy mix. Attaining this goal will have a deep impact on people’s health and well-being, helping to protect them from environmental and social risks such as air pollution, and expanding access to primary health care and services. The 2023 edition of Tracking SDG 7: The Energy Progress Report warns that current efforts are not enough to achieve the SDG 7 on time. There has been some progress on specific elements of the SDG 7 agenda – for example, the increased rate of using renewables in the power sector – but progress is insufficient to reach the targets set forth in the SDGs. The global energy crisis is expected to stimulate the deployment of renewables and improve energy efficiency with several government policies pointing to increasing investment.
translations.reference: Lengo ni pamoja na kufikia upatikanaji wa umeme na upikaji salama kwa wote, kuongeza mara dufu viwango vya kihistoria vya uboreshaji wa ufanisi, na kuongeza kwa kiasi kikubwa sehemu ya vitu vinavyoweza kufanywa upya katika mchanganyiko wa nishati Duniani. Kufikia lengo hili kutakuwa na athari kubwa kwa afya na ustawi wa watu, kusaidia kuwalinda kutokana na hatari za kimazingira na kijamii kama vile uchafuzi wa hewa, na kupanua ufikiaji wa huduma za afya ya msingi na huduma. Toleo la 2023 la ufuatiliaji SDG 7: Ripoti ya maendeleo ya nishati inaonya kuwa juhudi za sasa hazitoshi kufikia SDG 7 kwa wakati. Kumekuwa na baadhi ya maendeleo katika vipengele maalumu vya ajenda ya 7 ya SDG- kwa mfano, kasi ya kuongezeka kwa matumizi mbadala katika sekta ya nishati- lakini maendeleo hayatoshi kufikia malengo yaliyowekwa ndani ya SGDs. Msukosuko wa nishati Duniani unatarajiwa kuchochea uwekaji wa vifaa vinavyoweza kutumika upya na kuboresha ufanisi wa nishati huku sera kadhaa za serikali zikielekeza katika kuongeza uwekezaji.
translations.hypothesis: Lengo hilo linajumuisha kufikia upatikanaji wa umeme na teknolojia za kupikia salama kwa kila mtu, kuongeza maradufu mafanikio yaliyopatikana hapo awali katika ufanisi wa matumizi ya nishati, na kuongeza sana asilimia ya nishati mbadala katika mfumo wa nishati duniani. Kukamilisha lengo hili kutakuwa na athari kubwa kwa afya na ustawi wa watu, na kusaidia kuwalinda dhidi ya hatari za mazingira na kijamii, kama vile uchafuzi wa hewa, na kupanua upatikanaji wa huduma za afya za msingi. Toa la mwaka 2023 la ripoti ya "Kufuatilia Lengo la 7 la Maendeleo Endelevu: Ripoti ya Maendeleo ya Nishati" linaonya kwamba juhudi za sasa hazitoshi kufanikisha Lengo la 7 la Maendeleo Endelevu kwa wakati uliopangwa. Kuna maendeleo fulani katika sehemu muhimu za mpango wa Lengo la 7 la Maendeleo Endelevu – kwa mfano, ongezeko la matumizi ya nishati mbadala katika sekta ya umeme – lakini maendeleo hayo hayatoshi kufikia malengo yaliyowekwa katika Lengo la 7 la Maendeleo Endelevu. Inatarajiwa kwamba mgogoro wa nishati duniani utahimiza matumizi ya nishati mbadala na kuboresha ufanisi wa matumizi ya nishati, huku sera mbalimbali za serikali zikiashiria ongezeko la uwekezaji katika sekta hiyo.

translations.source: However, IRENA estimates show that international public financial flows in support of clean energy in low- and middle-income countries have been decreasing since before the COVID-19 pandemic and funding is limited to a small number of countries. To meet SDG 7 targets and to ensure that people fully benefit from the socio-economic gains of the shift to sustainable energy, it is necessary to structurally reform international public finance and define new opportunities to unlock investments. The report also finds that mounting debt and rising energy prices are worsening the outlook for reaching universal access to clean cooking and electricity. Current projections estimate that 1.9 billion people will be without clean cooking and 660 million without electricity access in 2030 if we do not take further action and continue with current efforts. These gaps will negatively impact the health of our most vulnerable populations and accelerate climate change.
translations.reference: Hata hivyo, makadirio ya IRENA yanaonyesha kuwa mtiririko wa fedha za umma wa kimataifa katika kuunga mkono nishati safi katika nchi za kipato cha chini na cha kati umekuwa wa kupungua tangu kabla ya janga la UVIKO-19 na ufadhili unapatikana kwa idadi ndogo ya nchi. Ili kufikia malengo ya SDG 7 na kuhakikisha kuwa watu wanafaidika kikamilifu kutokana na mafanikio ya kijamii na kiuchumi na mabadiliko ya nishati endelevu, ni muhimu kurekebisha muundo wa fedha za kimataifa za umma na kufafanua fursa mpya za kufungua uwekezaji. Pia ripoti hiyo inagundua kuwa kuongezeka kwa deni na kupanda kwa bei ya nishati kunazidisha mtazamo mbaya wa kufikia upatikanaji wa upikaji salama na umeme kwa wote. Makadirio ya sasa yanakadiria kuwa watu bilioni 1.9 watakosa upikaji salama na milioni 660 bila ya huduma ya umeme mnamo 2030 kama hatutochukua hatua zaidi na kuendelea na juhudi za sasa. Mapungufu haya yataathiri vibaya afya ya watu wetu walio hatarini na kuharakisha mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa.
translations.hypothesis: Hata hivyo, makadirio ya IRENA yanaonyesha kwamba fedha za umma za kimataifa zinazotumika kuunga mkono nishati safi katika nchi za kipato cha chini na cha kati zimekuwa zikipungua tangu kabla ya janga la COVID-19, na ufadhili huo unapatikana kwa idadi ndogo tu ya nchi. Ili kufikia malengo ya SDG 7 na kuhakikisha kwamba watu wanapata manufaa kamili ya faida za kijamii na kiuchumi za mabadiliko kuelekea nishati endelevu, ni muhimu kufanya mageuzi makubwa katika mfumo wa fedha za umma za kimataifa na kuangazia fursa mpya za kuongeza uwekezaji. Ripoti hiyo pia inaonyesha kwamba ongezeko la madeni na ongezeko la bei za nishati vinaongeza changamoto katika kufikia upatikanaji wa vyakula na umeme safi kwa kila mtu. Makadirio ya sasa yanaonyesha kwamba watu bilioni 1.9 watakuwa hawapati vyakula safi na milioni 660 watakuwa hawapati umeme ifikapo mwaka wa 2030, ikiwa hatuchukue hatua zaidi na tuendelee na juhudi zetu za sasa. Mapungufu haya yataathiri vibaya afya ya makundi yetu yenye hatari kubwa na yatasisimua mabadiliko ya tabianchi.

translations.source: According to WHO, 3.2 million people die each year from illness caused by the use of polluting fuels and technologies, which increase exposure to toxic levels of household air pollution. Key findings of the report In 2010, 84% of the world’s population had access to electricity. This increased to 91% in 2021, meaning more than a billion people gained access over that period. However, the growth pace of access slowed in 2019–2021 compared to previous years.
translations.reference: Kulingana na WHO, watu milioni 3.2 hufariki kila mwaka kutokana na ugonjwa unaosababishwa na matumizi ya mafuta na teknolojia chafu, ambayo huongeza kufichuliwa kwa viwango vya sumu vya uchafuzi wa hewa wa kaya. Matokeo muhimu ya ripoti Mwaka 2010, 84% ya watu Duniani walipata umeme. Hii iliongeza hadi 91% mwaka 2021, ikimaanisha zaidi ya watu Bilioni moja walipata ufikiaji katika kipindi hicho. Hata hivyo, kasi ya ukuaji wa ufikiaji ilipungua mwaka 2019-2021 ikilinganishwa na miaka iliyopita.
translations.hypothesis: Kulingana na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), watu milioni 3.2 hufa kila mwaka kutokana na magonjwa yanayosababishwa na matumizi ya mafuta na teknolojia zinazochafua, ambazo huongeza hatari ya kuwepo kwa viwango vya juu vya uchafuzi wa hewa ndani ya nyumba. Matokeo muhimu ya ripoti hiyo: Mnamo mwaka wa 2010, asilimia 84 ya watu duniani walikuwa na upatikanaji wa umeme. Hii iliongezeka hadi asilimia 91 mnamo mwaka wa 2021, ambayo inamaanisha kwamba zaidi ya watu bilioni moja walipata upatikanaji huo katika kipindi hicho. Hata hivyo, kasi ya ongezeko la upatikanaji ilipungua katika kipindi cha 2019–2021 ikilinganishwa na miaka iliyopita.

translations.source: Rural electrification efforts contributed to this progress, but a large gap within urban areas remains. In 2021, 567 million people in sub-Saharan Africa did not have access to electricity, accounting for more than 80% of the global population without access. The access deficit in the region stayed almost the same as in 2010. The world remains off track to achieve universal access to clean cooking by 2030. Up to 2.3 billion people still use polluting fuels and technologies for cooking, largely in sub-Saharan Africa and Asia.
translations.reference: Juhudi za kusambaza umeme vijijini zilichangia maendeleo haya, lakini pengo kubwa katika maeneo ya mijini bado linabaki. Mwaka 2021, watu milioni 567 huko Afrika Kusini mwa Jangwa la Sahara hawakupata umeme, na hivyo kuchangia zaidi ya 80% ya watu Duniani kote bil kupata umeme. Nasiki ya ufikiaji katika eneo hilo ilibaki karibu sawa na mwaka 2010. Ulimwengu bado hauko sawa kufikia ufikiaji wa wote wa upikaji salama ifikapo 2030. Hadi watu bilioi 2.3 bado wanatumia nishati na teknolojia chafuzi kwa kupikia, hasa barani Afrika kusini mwa jangwa la Sahara.
translations.hypothesis: Majaribio ya kupeleka umeme katika maeneo ya vijijini yamechangia maendeleo haya, lakini bado kuna pengo kubwa katika maeneo ya mijini. Mnamo mwaka wa 2021, watu milioni 567 katika Afrika ya Kusini mwa Jangwa la Sahara hawakuwa na upatikanaji wa umeme, na hii inawakilisha zaidi ya asilimia 80 ya idadi ya watu duniani ambao hawana upatikanaji wa umeme. Upungufu wa upatikanaji wa umeme katika eneo hilo ulibaki karibu sawa na ule wa mwaka wa 2010. Ulimwengu bado haujafikia lengo la kutoa upatikanaji wa teknolojia safi za kupikia kwa kila mtu ifikapo mwaka wa 2030. Hadi watu bilioni 2.3 bado wanatumia mafuta na teknolojia zinazochafua kwa ajili ya kupikia, hasa katika Afrika ya Kusini mwa Jangwa la Sahara na Asia.

translations.source: The use of traditional biomass also means households spend up to 40 hours a week gathering firewood and cooking, which prohibits women from pursuing employment or participating in local decision-making bodies and children from going to school. According to the 2019 WHO estimates, 3.2 million premature deaths each year were attributable to household air pollution created by using polluting fuels and technologies for cooking. Renewable electricity use in global consumption has grown from 26.3% in 2019 to 28.2% in 2020, the largest single-year increase since the start of tracking progress for the SDGs. Efforts to increase renewables’ share in heating and transport, which represent more than three quarters of global energy consumption, remain off target to achieve 1.5oC climate objectives. Energy intensity – the measure of how much energy the global economy uses per dollar of GDP – improved from 2010–2020 by 1.8% annually.
translations.reference: Pia matumizi ya majani asilia yanamaanisha kuwa kaya hutumia hadi masaa 40 kwa wiki kukusanya kuni na kupika, jambo ambalo linazuia wanawake kupata ajira au kushiriki katika vyombo vya maamuzi vya ndani na watoto kwenda shule. Kulingana na makadirio ya WHO ya 2019, vifo vya mapema milioni 3.2 kila mwaka vilichangiwa na uchafuzi wa hewa wa kaya unaotokana na kutumia nishati na teknolojia chafuzi za kufikia. Matumizi ya umeme mbadala katika matumizi ya kimataifa yameongezeka kutoka 26.3% mwaka 2019 hadi 28.2% mwaka 2020, ongezeko kubwa zaidi la mwaka mmoja tangu kuanza kwa ufikiaji wa mendeleo ya SDGs. Jitihada za kuongeza renewables kushiriki katika upashaji joto na usafiri, ambayo inawakilisha zaidi ya robo tatu ya matumizi ya nishati Duniani, bado hazijalengwa kufikia malengo ya hali ya hewa ya 1.5oC. Nguvu ya nishati- kipimo cha kiasi gani cha nishati ambacho uchumi wa Dunia hutumia kwa kila Dola ya pato la taifa- kuboreshwa kutoka 2010-2020 kwa 1.8% kila mwaka.
translations.hypothesis: Matumizi ya biomass ya jadi pia yana maana kwamba familia hutumia hadi saa 40 kwa wiki kukusanya kuni na kupika, jambo ambalo huwafanya wanawake wasiweze kupata ajira au kushiriki katika vyombo vya uamuzi vya eneo, na pia huwafanya watoto wasiweze kwenda shuleni. Kulingana na makadirio ya WHO ya mwaka 2019, vifo milioni 3.2 kila mwaka vilisababishwa na uchafuzi wa hewa katika nyumba, unaotokana na matumizi ya mafuta na teknolojia zenye madhara kwa ajili ya kupika. Matumizi ya umeme endelevu katika matumizi ya kimataifa yameongezeka kutoka asilimia 26.3 mwaka 2019 hadi asilimia 28.2 mwaka 2020, ambayo ni ongezeko kubwa zaidi katika mwaka mmoja tangu kuanza kufuatilia maendeleo ya Malengo ya Maendeleo Endelevu (SDGs). Juhudi za kuongeza asilimia ya nishati endelevu katika mchakato wa inapokota na usafirishaji, ambayo inawakilisha zaidi ya theluthi tatu ya matumizi ya nishati duniani, bado hazijafikia malengo ya kupunguza joto la dunia hadi nyuzi 1.5 Celcius. Ufanisi wa nishati – kipimo cha kiasi cha nishati ambacho uchumi wa dunia hutumia kwa kila dola ya Pato la Taifa (GDP) – umeboreshwa kwa asilimia 1.8 kila mwaka kuanzia mwaka 2010 hadi 2020.

translations.source: This is higher than the 1.2% improvement from the previous decades. However, the rate of energy intensity improvement has slowed in recent years and dropped to 0.6% in 2020. This makes it the worst year for energy intensity improvement since the global financial crisis, albeit largely due to pandemic-related restrictions, which may indicate only a temporary setback. Annual improvements through 2030 must now average 3.4% to meet the SDG target 7.3. International public financial flows in support of clean energy in developing countries stand at US$ 10.8 billion in 2021, 35% less than the 2010–2019 average and only about 40% of the 2017 peak of US$ 26.4 billion. In 2021, 19 countries received 80% of the commitments.The report will be presented to top decision-makers at a special launch event on 11 July 2023 at the High-Level Political Forum (HLPF) on Sustainable Development, ahead of the second SDG Summit in September 2023 in New York.
translations.reference: Hii ni ya juu kuliko uboreshaji wa 1.2% kutoka kwa miongo iliyopita. Hata hivyo, kasi ya uboreshaji wa nishati imepungua katika miaka ya hivi karibuni na imeshuka hadi 0.6% mwaka 2020. Huu unaufanya kuwa mwaka mbaya zaidi wa uboreshaji wa nguvu ya nishati tangu mzozo wa kifedha Duniani, ingawa kwa kiasi kikubwa kutokana na vikwazo vinavyohusiana na janga, ambayo inaweza kuonyesha tu kurudi nyuma kwa muda. Maboresho ya kila mwaka hadi 2030 lazima sasa wastani wa 3.4% kufikia lengo la SDG 7.3. Mtiririko wa fedha za umma wa kimataifa katika kusaidia nishati safi katika nchi zinazoendelea unafikia Dola za Kimarekani Bilioi 10.8 mwaka 2021, 35% chini ya wastani wa 2010-2019 na karibu 40% tu ya kilele cha 2017 cha Dola za kimarekani Bilioni 26.4. Mwaka 2021, nchi 19 zilipokea 80% ya ahadi. Ripoti itawsilishwa kwa watoa maamuzi wakuu kwenye hafla maalumu ya uzinduzi mnamo tarehe 11 Julai 2023 katika jukwaa la ngazi ya juu la kisiasa (HLPF) kuhusu maendeleo endelevu, kabla ya SDG ya pili mkutano wa kilele mnamo Septemba 2023 huko New York.
translations.hypothesis: Hii ni ongezeko kubwa kuliko ongezeko la 1.2% lililopatikana katika miongo iliyopita. Hata hivyo, kasi ya ongezeko la ufanisi wa nishati imepungua katika miaka ya hivi karibuni na ilifikia 0.6% mwaka wa 2020. Hii inafanya mwaka wa 2020 kuwa mwaka mbaya zaidi kwa ongezeko la ufanisi wa nishati tangu msukosuko wa kifedha wa kimataifa, ingawa hii inatokana hasa na vizuizi vilivyotokana na janga hilo, ambavyo vinaweza kuashiria kikwazo cha muda mfupi tu. Ili kufikia lengo la SDG la 7.3, ongezeko la kila mwaka hadi mwaka wa 2030 lazima litakuwa wastani wa 3.4%. Mfumo wa fedha za umma za kimataifa zinazotumika kuunga mkono nishati safi katika nchi zinazoendelea ulikuwa wa dola za Kimarekani bilioni 10.8 mwaka wa 2021, ambayo ni asilimia 35 chini ya wastani wa miaka ya 2010 hadi 2019, na ni takriban asilimia 40 tu ya kiwango cha juu cha dola za Kimarekani bilioni 26.4 kilichorekodiwa mwaka wa 2017. Mwaka wa 2021, nchi 19 zilipewa asilimia 80 ya ahadi zilizotolewa. Ripoti hii itawasilishwa kwa viongozi wakuu katika hafla maalum ya uzinduzi mnamo tarehe 11 Julai, 2023, katika Mkutano wa Kimataifa wa Sera (HLPF) kuhusu Maendeleo Endelevu, kabla ya Mkutano wa Pili wa SDG utakaofanyika mnamo Septemba 2023 huko New York.

translations.source: The authors urge the international community and policymakers to safeguard the gains made toward achieving SDG 7, to advance structural reforms, and to maintain a strategic focus on the vulnerable countries needing the most support. Quotes: “The energy crisis sparked by Russia’s invasion of Ukraine continues to have a profound impact on people all around the world. High energy prices have hit the most vulnerable hard, particularly those in developing economies. While the clean energy transition is moving faster than many think, there is still a great deal of work needed to deliver sustainable, secure and affordable access to modern energy services for the billions of people who live without it. Successful energy transitions rely on effective policies and technological innovation combined with large-scale mobilisation of investment capital.
translations.reference: Waandishi wanahimiza juhudi ya kimataifa na watunga sera kulinda mafanikio yaliyopatikana kuelekea kufikia SDG7, kuendeleza mageuzi ya kimuundo, na kudumisha mtazamo wa kimataifa kwa nchi zilizo hatarini zinahitaji msaada zaidi. Nukuu: "Mgogoro wa nishati uliosababishwa na uvamizi wa Urusi nchini Ukraini unaendelea kuwa na athari kubwa kwa watu ulimwenguni kote. Bei ya juu ya nishati imeathiri sana walio hatarini zaidi, hususani wale walio katika nchi zinazoendelea kiuchumi. Wakati mpito wa nishati safi ukiendelea kwa kasi zaidi kuliko wengi wanavyofikiria, bado kuna kazi kubwa inayohitajika ili kutoa ufikiaji endelevu, salama na wa bei nafuu wa huduma za kisasa za nishati kwa mabilioni ya watu wanaoishi bila hiyo. Mabadiliko ya nishati yenye ufanisi yanategemea sera bora na uvumbuzi wa kiteknolojia pamoja na uhamishaji mkubwa wa mtaji wa uwekezaji.
translations.hypothesis: Waandishi wanasisitiza kwa jamii ya kimataifa na watunga sera kuhifadhi mafanikio yaliyopatikana katika kufikia Lengo la 7 la Maendeleo Endelevu, kuendeleza mageuzi ya kimuundo, na kuendeleza umakini wa kimkakati kwa nchi ambazo zinahitaji msaada mkubwa. Nukuu: "Mgogoro wa nishati uliozuka kutokana na uvamizi wa Urusi nchini Ukraine unaendelea kuwa na athari kubwa kwa watu ulimwenguni kote. Bei za juu za nishati zimeathiri sana watu walio katika hali ngumu, hasa wale katika uchumi unaoendelea. Ingawa mabadiliko ya nishati safi yanaendelea kwa kasi kuliko ilivyodhaniwa, bado kuna kazi nyingi ambazo zinahitajika ili kutoa upatikanaji endelevu, salama, na wa bei nafuu wa huduma za nishati ya kisasa kwa mabilioni ya watu ambao hawana huduma hizo. Mabadiliko ya nishati yaliyofanikiwa yanategemea sera bora na uvumbuzi wa kiteknolojia, pamoja na uhamishaji mkubwa wa mtaji wa uwekezaji.

translations.source: The international community must leverage all these tools to meet the Sustainable Development Goals by the end of this decade.” Fatih Birol, Executive Director, International Energy Agency “Cost-competitive renewable energy has yet again demonstrated remarkable resilience, but the poorest in the world are still largely unable to fully benefit from it. To realise SDG7 without compromising climate goals, we must bring about systemic change in the way international cooperation works. It is crucial that multilateral financial institutions direct financial flows more equitably around the world to support renewables deployment and related physical infrastructure development.” Francesco La Camera, Director-General, International Renewable Energy Agency “Despite advances towards sustainable energy targets at the mid-point of Agenda 2030, Goal 7 seems harder to reach than it was in 2015 and scaled-up action is necessary if we are to ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy for all by 2030.
translations.reference: Jumuia ya kimataifa lazima itumie zana hizi zote kufikia malengo ya maendeleo endelevu ifikapo mwisho mwa muongo huu", Fatih Birol, mkurugenzi mtendaji, shirika la kimataifa la nishati "Nishati mbadala inayoshindana kwa gharama bado imeonyesha uthabiti wa ajabu, lakini maskini zaidi Duniani bado hawawezi kufaidika nayo kikamilifu. Ili kufikia SDG7 bila kuathiri malengo ya hali aya hewa, laziama tulete mabadiliko ya kimfumo katika jinsia ushirikiano wa kimataifa unavyofanya kazi. Ni muhimu kwamba taasisi za fedha za kimataifa zielekeze mtiririko wa fedha kwa usawa zaidi Duniani kote ili kusaidia uwekezaji wa vifaa vinavyoweza kurejeshwa na maendeleo yanayohusiana na miundombinu halisia" lisema Francesco La Camera, mkurugenzi mkuu, wakala wa kimataifa wa nishati mbadala. "Licha ya maendeleo kuelekea malengo ya nishati endelevu katikati mwa ajenda 2030, lengo la 7 linaloonekana kuwa gumu kufikiwa kuliko ilivyokuwa mwaka 2015 na hatua ya kuongeza ni muhimu kama tunataka kuhakikisha upatikanaji wa nishati nafuu, inayotegemewa, endelevu na ya kisasa kwa wote ifikapo 2030.
translations.hypothesis:
"Jamii ya kimataifa lazima itumie zana zote hizi ili kufanikisha Malengo ya Maendeleo Endelevu ifikapo mwisho wa muongo huu." - Fatih Birol, Mkurugenzi Mtendaji, Shirika la Kimataifa la Nishati.

"Nishati mbadala ambayo ina bei nafuu imeonyesha tena uimara mkubwa, lakini bado watu masikini zaidi duniani hawana uwezo mkubwa wa kuenea faida zake. Ili kufanikisha Lengo la 7 la Maendeleo Endelevu bila kuhatarisha malengo ya mazingira, lazima tuwe na mabadiliko makubwa katika jinsi ushirikiano wa kimataifa unaofanywa. Ni muhimu kwamba taasisi za kifedha za kimataifa zielekeze miradi ya kifedha kwa usawa zaidi duniani ili kusaidia utekelezaji wa nishati mbadala na uendelezaji wa miundombinu inayohusiana." - Francesco La Camera, Mkurugenzi Mkuu, Shirika la Kimataifa la Nishati Mbadala.

"Ingawa kumekuwa na maendeleo kuelekea malengo ya nishati endelevu katika nusu ya pili ya Mipango ya 2030, Lengo la 7 linaonekana kuwa vigumu kufikiwa kuliko ilivyokuwa mwaka wa 2015, na hatua za ziada zinahitajika ili kuhakikisha kuwa kila mtu atapata nishati ya nafuu, ya kuaminika, endelevu na ya kisasa ifikapo mwaka wa 2030."

translations.source: Access to electricity and clean cooking still display great regional disparities and should be the focus of action to ensure that no one is left behind. Investment needs to reach the least-developed countries and sub-Saharan Africa to ensure more equitable progress toward Goal 7.” Stefan Schweinfest, United Nations Statistics Division “Despite a recent slowdown in the global pace of electrification, the number of people without electricity almost halved over the past decade, from 1.1 billion in 2010 down to 675 million in 2021. Nonetheless, additional efforts and measures must urgently be put in place to ensure that the poorest and hardest-to-reach people are not left behind. To reach universal access by 2030, the development community must scale up clean energy investments and policy support.” Guangzhe Chen, Vice President for Infrastructure, World Bank
translations.reference: Upatikanaji wa umeme na upikaji salama bado unaonyesha tofauti kubwa za kikanda na inapaswa kuwa lengo la kuchukua hatua ili kuhakikisha kuwa hakuna anaeachwa nyuma.
