Uwekezaji unahitaji kufikia nchi zenye maendeleo duni na Afrika kusini mwa jangwa la Sahara ili kuhakikisha maendeleo ya usawa kuelekea lengo la 7" alisema Stefan Schweinfest, idara ya takwimu ya Umoja wa mataifa. "Licha ya kupungua kwa kasi ya nchi hivi karibuni ya usambazaji wa umeme ulimwenguni, idadi ya watu wasio na umeme karibu ilipungua nusu katika muongo mmoja uliopita, kutoka Bilioni 1.1 mwaka 2010 hai milioni 675 mwaka 2021. Hata hivyo, juhudi za ziada na hatu lazima ziwekwe kwa haraka ili kuhakikisha kwamba watu maskini zaidi na waliongumu kuwafikia hawaachwi nyuma. Ili kufikia ufikiaji wa watu watu wote ifikapo 2030, jumuia ya maendeleo lazima iongeze uwekezaji wa nishati safi na usaidizi wa sera" Guangzhe Chen, makamu wa Rais wa miundombinu, Benki ya Dunia.
translations.hypothesis:
Upatikanaji wa umeme na njia salama za kupika bado una tofauti kubwa katika maeneo mbalimbali, na hivyo unapaswa kuwa lengo kuu la juhudi za kuhakikisha kwamba hakuna mtu anayeachwa nyuma. Uwekezaji unahitaji kufikia nchi zilizoendelea kidogo na Afrika ya Kusini mwa Sahara ili kuhakikisha maendeleo yenye usawa zaidi kuelekea Lengo la 7.” – Stefan Schweinfest, Idara ya Takwimu ya Umoja wa Mataifa.

“Ingawa kuna kupungua kwa kasi ya uendelezaji wa umeme duniani kwa sasa, idadi ya watu ambao hawana umeme imepungua takriban nusu katika muongo uliopita, kutoka kwa watu bilioni 1.1 mnamo 2010 hadi milioni 675 mnamo 2021. Hata hivyo, juhudi na hatua za ziada lazima zianzishwe haraka ili kuhakikisha kwamba watu maskini zaidi na wale ambao ni vigumu kuwafikia hawachwa nyuma. Ili kufikia upatikanaji wa umeme kwa kila mtu ifikapo mwaka wa 2030, jamii ya maendeleo lazima iongeze uwekezaji katika nishati safi na msaada wa sera.” – Guangzhe Chen, Makamu wa Rais wa Miundombinu, Benki ya Dunia.

translations.source: “We must protect the next generation by acting now. Investing in clean and renewable solutions to support universal energy access is how we can make real change. Clean cooking technologies in homes and reliable electricity in health-care facilities can play a crucial role in protecting the health of our most vulnerable populations.” Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General, World Health Organization About the report This report is published by the SDG 7 custodian agencies, the International Energy Agency (IEA), the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA), the United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), the World Bank, and the World Health Organization (WHO) and aims to provide the international community with a global dashboard to register progress on energy access, energy efficiency, renewable energy and international cooperation to advance SDG 7.
translations.reference: "Lazima tulinde kizazi kijacho kwa kuchukua hatua sasa. Kuwekez katika suluhu nzuri na zinazoweza kufanywa upya ili kusaidia ufikiaji wa nishati kwa wote ni jinsi tunavyoweza kufanya mabadiliko ya kweli. Teknolojia salama ya kupikia majumbani na umeme wa kutegemewa katika vituo vya kutolea huduma za afya unaweza kuchukua jukumu muhimu katika kulinda afya ya watu wetu walio hatarini zaidi" Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO, shirika la afya Duniani. Kuhusu ripoti hiyo Ripoti hii imechapishwa na mashirika ya walezi ya SDG7, wakala wa kimataifa wa Nishati (IEA), wakala wa kimataifa wa nishati mbadala (IRENA), idara ya takwimu ya umoja wa mataifa (UNSD), Benki ya Dunia, na shirika la afya Duniani (WHO) na inalenga kuipa jumuia ya kimataifa dashibodi ya kimataifa ya kusajili maendeleo kuhusu upatikanaji wa nishati, ufanisi wa nishati, nishati mbadala na ushirikiano wa kimataifa ili kuendeleza SDG7.
translations.hypothesis:
"Tunapaswa kulinda kizazi kijacho kwa kuchukua hatua sasa. Kuwekeza katika teknolojia safi na endelevu ili kusaidia upatikanaji wa nishati kwa kila mtu ndiyo njia ambayo tunaweza kuleta mabadiliko halisi. Teknolojia za kupikia salama katika nyumba na umeme wa kuaminika katika vituo vya afya zinaweza kucheza jukumu muhimu katika kulinda afya ya makundi yetu yenye hatari kubwa." - Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Shirika la Afya Duniani.

Kuhusu ripoti hii:
Ripoti hii imechapishwa na mashirika yanayosimamia Lengo la 7 la Maendeleo Endelevu (SDG 7), ambayo ni Shirika la Kimataifa la Nishati (IEA), Shirika la Kimataifa la Nishati Mbadala (IRENA), Idara ya Takwimu ya Umoja wa Mataifa (UNSD), Benki ya Dunia, na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO). Ripoti hii inalenga kutoa taarifa kamili kwa jamii ya kimataifa kuhusu maendeleo katika upatikanaji wa nishati, ufanisi wa nishati, nishati mbadala, na ushirikiano wa kimataifa ili kukuza Lengo la 7 la Maendeleo Endelevu.

translations.source: This is the ninth edition of this report, formerly known as the Global Tracking Framework (GTF). This year’s edition was chaired by the World Health Organization (WHO). The report can be downloaded here Funding for the report was provided by the World Bank’s Energy Sector Management Assistance Program (ESMAP).
translations.reference: Hili ni toleo la tisa la ripoti hii, ambayo zamani ilijulikana kama mfumo wa ufuatiliaji ulimwenguni (GTF). Toleo la mwaka huu liliongozwa na shirika la afya Duniani (WHO). Ripoti inaweza kupakuliwa hapa Ufadhili wa ripoti hiyo ulitolewa na mpango wa usaidizi wa kusimamia sekta ya nishati wa Benki ya Dunia (ESMAP).
translations.hypothesis: Hii ndiyo toleo la tisa la ripoti hii, ambayo hapo awali ilijulikana kama Mfumo wa Ufuatiliaji wa Kimataifa (GTF). Toleo la mwaka huu limeongozwa na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO). Ripoti hii inaweza kupakuliwa hapa. Fedha za kuandaliwa kwa ripoti hii zimetolewa na Programu ya Msaada wa Usimamizi wa Sekta ya Nishati ya Benki ya Dunia (ESMAP).

translations.source: The European Commission and WHO launch landmark digital health initiative to strengthen global health security The World Health Organization (WHO) and European Commission have announced today the launch of a landmark digital health partnership. In June 2023, WHO will take up the European Union (EU) system of digital COVID-19 certification to establish a global system that will help facilitate global mobility and protect citizens across the world from on-going and future health threats, including pandemics. This is the first building block of the WHO Global Digital Health Certification Network (GDHCN) that will develop a wide range of digital products to deliver better health for all. “Building on the EU’s highly successful digital certification network, WHO aims to offer all WHO Member States access to an open-source digital health tool, which is based on the principles of equity, innovation, transparency and data protection and privacy,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General.
translations.reference: Tume ya Umoja wa Ulaya na WHO zazindua mpango wa kihistoria wa afya ya kidijitali ili kuimarisha usalama wa afya ya Dunia. Shirika la afya Duniani (WHO) na Tume ya Umoja wa Ulaya zimetangaza leo kuzindua ushirikiano wa kihistoria wa afya ya kidijitali. Mnamo Juni 2023, WHO itatumia mfumo wa Umoja wa Ulaya (EU) wa udhibitishaji wa kidijitali wa UVIKO-19 ili kuanzisha mfumo wa kimataifa ambao utsaidia kuwezesha uhamaji wa kimataifa na kulinda raia kote ulimwenguni dhidi ya matishio yanayoendelea na yajayo ya kiafya, ikiwemo milipuko. Hili ni jengo la kwanza la mtandao wa udhibitishaji wa afya ya kidijitali wa WHO (GDHCN) ambao utatengeneza bidhaa mbalimbali za kidijitali ili kutoa afya bora kwa wote. "Kwa kuzingatia mtandao wa uidhinishaji wa vyeti wa kidijitali wa umoja wa Ulaya wenye mafanikio makubwa, WHO inalenga kuzipa nchi wanachama wa WHO fursa ya kupata nyenzo huria ya afya ya kidijitali, ambayo inategemea kanuni za usawa, uvumbuzi, uwazi na ulinzi wa Data na faragha", alisema Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO.
translations.hypothesis: Tume ya Ulaya na Shirika la Afya la Dunia (WHO) zanzisha mpango muhimu wa afya ya kidijitali ili kuimarisha usalama wa afya duniani. Shirika la Afya la Dunia (WHO) na Tume ya Ulaya zimetangaza leo uzinduzi wa ushirikiano muhimu wa afya ya kidijitali. Mnamo Juni 2023, WHO itaanza kutumia mfumo wa Ulbia wa Ulaya (EU) wa uthibitisho wa kidijitali wa COVID-19 ili kuunda mfumo wa kimataifa ambao utasaidia kuwezesha uhamaji wa watu duniani na kuwalinda wananchi kote ulimwenguni dhidi ya hatari za kiafya za sasa na za baadaye, ikiwa ni pamoja na magonjwa ya kuambukiza makubwa. Hii ndiyo hatua ya kwanza katika uundaji wa Mtandao wa Kimataifa wa WHO wa Uthibitisho wa Afya ya Kidijitali (GDHCN), ambao utatengeneza bidhaa mbalimbali za kidijitali ili kutoa huduma bora za afya kwa wote. "Kwa kutumia mfumo wa uthibitisho wa kidijitali wa Ulbia wa Ulaya, ambao umefanikiwa sana, WHO inalenga kutoa nchi zote wanachama za WHO fursa ya kupata zana ya afya ya kidijitali ya chanzo huru, ambayo inategemea kanuni za usawa, ubunifu, uwazi, na ulinzi wa data na faragha," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO.

translations.source: “New digital health products in development aim to help people everywhere receive quality health services quickly and more effectively”. Based on the EU Global Health Strategy and WHO Global strategy on digital health, the initiative follows the 30 November 2022 agreement between Commissioner Kyriakides and Dr Tedros to enhance strategic cooperation on global health issues. This further bolsters a robust multilateral system with WHO at its core, powered by a strong EU.“This partnership is an important step for the digital action plan of the EU Global Health Strategy. By using European best practices we contribute to digital health standards and interoperability globally—to the benefit of those most in need. It is also a powerful example of how alignment between the EU and the WHO can deliver better health for all, in the EU and across the world.
translations.reference: "Bidhaa mpya za afya za kidijitali katika maendeleo zinajenga kusaidia watu kila mahali kupokea huduma bora za afya haraka zaidi na kwa ufanisi zaidi". Kulingana na mkakati wa afya wa Umoja wa Ulaya na mkakati wa kimataifa wa WHO kuhus afya ya kidijitali, mpango huo unafuatia makubaliano ya tarehe 30 Novemba 2022 kati ya Kamishna Kyriakides na Dk Tedros ili kuimarisha ushirikiano kuhusu masuala ya afya Duniani. Hii inaimarisha zaidi mfumo thabiti wa kimataifa na WHO katika msingi wake,unaoendeshwa na umoja wa Ulaya wenye nguvu. "Ushirikiano huu ni hatua muhimu kwa mpango wa utekelezaji wa mkakati wa afya wa umoja wa Ulaya. Kwa kutumia mbinu bora za Ulaya tunachangia viwango vya afya vya kidijitali na ushirikiano Duniani kote- kwa manufaa ya wale wanaohitaji zaidi. Pia ni mfano mzuri wa jinsi upatanishi katika ya EU na WHO unavyoweza kutoa afya bora kwa wote, ndani ya EU na Duniani kote.
translations.hypothesis: "Bidhaa mpya za afya za kidijitali ambazo ziko katika hatua za maendeleo zinalenga kusaidia watu kila mahali kupata huduma bora za afya kwa haraka na kwa ufanisi zaidi." Kulingana na Mkakati wa Afya Duniani wa Umoja wa Ulaya na mkakati wa kimataifa wa WHO kuhusu afya ya kidijitali, mpango huu unafuata makubaliano ya tarehe 30 Novemba, 2022, kati ya Kamishna Kyriakides na Dkt. Tedros, ambayo yanalenga kuimarisha ushirikiano wa kimkakati katika masuala ya afya ya kimataifa. Hii inaongeza nguvu mfumo imara wa ushirikiano wa kimataifa, ambapo WHO ndiyo msingi wake, na unaendeshwa na Umoja wa Ulaya wenye nguvu. "Ushirikiano huu ni hatua muhimu katika mpango wa hatua za kidijitali wa Mkakati wa Afya Duniani wa Umoja wa Ulaya. Kwa kutumia mbinu bora za Ulaya, tunachangia katika viwango vya afya ya kidijitali na uoanifu duniani kote—kwa manufaa ya wale ambao wanahitaji sana. Pia, ni mfano bora wa jinsi muunganisho kati ya Umoja wa Ulaya na WHO unaweza kutoa afya bora kwa wote, ndani ya Umoja wa Ulaya na ulimwenguni kote."

translations.source: As the directing and coordinating authority on international health work, there is no better partner than the WHO to advance the work we started at the EU and further develop global digital health solutions,” said Stella Kyriakides, Commissioner for Health and Food Safety. This partnership will include close collaboration in the development, management and implementation of the WHO GDHCN system, benefitting from the European Commission’s ample technical expertise in the field. A first step is to ensure that the current EU digital certificates continue to function effectively.“ With 80 countries and territories connected to the EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate, the EU has set a global standard. The EU certificate has not only been an important tool in our fight against the pandemic, but has also facilitated international travel and tourism.
translations.reference: Kama mamlaka inayowekeza na kuratibu kazi ya kimataifa ya afya, hakuna mshirika bora zaidi kuliko WHO kuendeleza kazi tuliyoanza katika EU na Kuiendeleza Duniani", alisema Stella Kyrikides, Kamishna wa afya na usalama wa chakula. Ushirikiano huu utajumuisha ushirikiano katika maendeleo, usimamizi na utekelezaji wa mfumo wa WHO wa GDHCN, kufaidika na utaalamu wa kutosha wa kiufundi wa tume ya Ulaya katika uga huo. Hatua ya kwanza ni kuhakikisha kwamba vyeti vya kidijitali vya umoja wa ulaya vinaendelea kufanya kazi kwa ufanisi" "Ikiwa na nchi na maeneo 80 yaliyounganishwa kwa cheti cha kidijitali cha UVIKO-19 cha EU, EU imeweka kiwango cha kimataifa. Cheti cha EU sio tu kuwa chombo muhimu katika mapamabano yetu dhidi ya janga hili, lakini pia kuwezesha usafiri wa kimataifa na utalii.
translations.hypothesis: Kama taasisi inayoelekeza na kuratibu masuala ya afya ya kimataifa, hakuna mshirika bora kuliko Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) katika kuendeleza kazi ambayo tulianza katika Umoja wa Ulaya na kukuza zaidi suluhisho za kimataifa za afya ya kidijitali,” alisema Stella Kyriakides, Kamishna wa Afya na Usalama wa Chakula. Ushirikiano huu utajumuisha ushirikiano wa karibu katika maendeleo, usimamizi, na utekelezaji wa mfumo wa WHO wa Afya ya Kidijitali (GDHCN), na utatumia utaalamu mkubwa wa kiufundi wa Tume ya Ulaya katika eneo hilo. Hatua ya kwanza ni kuhakikisha kwamba vyeti vya kidijitali vya sasa vya Umoja wa Ulaya vinaendelea kufanya kazi vizuri. "Kwa nchi na maeneo 80 yaliyounganishwa na Cheti cha Kidijitali cha COVID-19 cha Umoja wa Ulaya, Umoja wa Ulaya umeanzisha kiwango cha kimataifa. Cheti cha Umoja wa Ulaya hakijakuwa tu zana muhimu katika mapambano yetu dhidi ya janga hilo, lakini pia limefanya iwe rahisi kusafiri na utalii kimataifa."

translations.source: I am pleased that the WHO will build on the privacy-preserving principles and cutting-edge technology of the EU certificate to create a global tool against future pandemics,” added Thierry Breton, Commissioner for Internal Market. A global WHO system building on EU legacy One of the key elements in the European Union’s work against the COVID-19 pandemic has been digital COVID-19 certificates. To facilitate free movement within its borders, the EU swiftly established interoperable COVID-19 certificates (entitled ‘EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate’ or ‘EU DCC’). Based on open-source technologies and standards it allowed also for the connection of non-EU countries that issue certificates according to EU DCC specifications, becoming the most widely used solution around the world.
translations.reference: Nina furaha kwamba WHO itajenga kanuni za kuhifadhi faragha na teknolojia ya kisasa ya cheti ya EU ili kuunda zana ya kimataifa dhidi ya magonjwa ya mlipuko ya siku zijazo", aliongezea Thierry Breton, Kamishna wa soko la ndani. Mfumo wa kimataifa wa WHO unaojenga juu ya urithi wa EU Moja wapo ya vipengele muhimu katika kazi ya umoja wa Ulaya dhidi ya janga la UVIKO-19 imekuwa vyeti vya kidijitali vya UVIKO-19. Ili kuwezesha watu kusafiri bila malipo ndani ya mipaka yake, umoja wa Ulaya ulianzisha upesi vyeti vinavyoweza kushirikiana vya UVIKO-19 (Vinaitwa 'Cheti cha EU cha Dijitali cha UVIKO-19', au 'EUDCC'). Kulingana na teknolojia ya chanzo huria na viwango vilivyoruhusu pia kwa muunganisho wa nchi zisizo za umoja wa Ulaya zinazotoa vyeti kulingana na vipimo vya EU DCC, na kuwa suluhisho linalotumiwa zaidi Duniani kote.
translations.hypothesis:
"Nimefurahi kwamba Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) litatumia kanuni za ulinzi wa faragha na teknolojia ya kisasa iliyotumika katika cheti cha Umoja wa Ulaya ili kuunda zana ya kimataifa dhidi ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza yatakayotokea siku zijazo," alisema Thierry Breton, Kamishna wa Masoko ya Ndani.

Mfumo wa WHO wa kimataifa unaojengwa juu ya mafanikio ya Umoja wa Ulaya.

Mojawapo ya vipengele muhimu katika juhudi za Umoja wa Ulaya za kupambana na janga la COVID-19 ni cheti za kidijitali za COVID-19. Ili kuwezesha uhamaji huru ndani ya nchi zake, Umoja wa Ulaya ulianzisha haraka cheti za COVID-19 ambazo zinaweza kufanya kazi pamoja (zinazojulikana kama 'Cheti cha Kidijitali cha COVID-19 cha Umoja wa Ulaya' au 'EU DCC'). Kwa kutumia teknolojia na viwango vya wazi, cheti hizi ziliruhusu pia nchi za nje za Umoja wa Ulaya, ambazo zinatoa cheti kulingana na vipimo vya EU DCC, kuunganishwa, na hivyo kuwa suluhisho linalotumika zaidi duniani kote.

translations.source: From the onset of the pandemic, WHO engaged with all WHO Regions to define overall guidelines for such certificates. To help strengthen global health preparedness in the face of growing health threats, WHO is establishing a global digital health certification network which builds upon the solid foundations of the EU DCC framework, principles and open technologies. With this collaboration, WHO will facilitate this process globally under its own structure with the aim to allow the world to benefit from convergence of digital certificates. This includes standard-setting and validation of digital signatures to prevent fraud. In doing so, WHO will not have access to any underlying personal data, which would continue to be the exclusive domain of governments.
translations.reference: Tangua kuanza kwa janga hili, WHO ilishirikiana na kanda zote za Who kufafanua miongozo ya jumla ya vyeti hivyo. Ili kusaidia kuimarisha utayari wa afya Duniani katika kukubaliana na vitisho vinavyoongezeka vya kiafya, WHO inaanzisha mtandao wa kimataifa wa uidhinishaji wa afya wa kidijitali ambao unajengwa juu ya misingi imara ya mfumo wa EU DCC, kanuni na teknolojia huria. Kwa ushirikiano huu, WHO itawezesha mchakato huu wa kimataifa chini ya muundo wake kwa lengo la kuruhusu ulimwengu kufaidika kutokana na muunganiko wa vyeti vy a kidijitali. Hii inajumuisha kuweka viwango na uthibitishaji wa sahihi za kidijitali ili kuzuia Ulaghai. Kwa kufanya hivyo, WHO haitakuwa na ufikiaji wa Data yoyote ya kibinafsi ya msingi, ambayo itaendelea kuwa kikoa cha kipekee cha serikali.
translations.hypothesis: Tangu mwanzo wa janga hilo, Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) limekuwa likishirikiana na maeneo yote ya WHO ili kuainisha miongozo ya jumla kwa ajili ya vyeti hivyo. Ili kusaidia kuimarisha utayari wa afya duniani dhidi ya hatari za kiafya zinazoongezeka, WHO inapanua mtandao wa kimataifa wa uthibitishaji wa afya wa kidijitali, ambao unajengwa juu ya msingi thabiti wa mfumo, kanuni, na teknolojia wazi za EU DCC. Kupitia ushirikiano huu, WHO itasaidia mchakato huu duniani kote kupitia muundo wake mwenyewe, kwa lengo la kuruhusu dunia kunufaika kutokana na muunganisho wa vyeti vya kidijitali. Hii inajumuisha kuweka viwango na uthibitishaji wa saini za kidijitali ili kuzuia udanganyifu. Katika kufanya hivyo, WHO haitatoa upendeleo kwa data yoyote ya kibinafsi, ambayo itabaki kuwa jambo la kipekee la serikali.

translations.source: The first building block of the global WHO system becomes operational in June 2023 and aims to be progressively developed in the coming months. A long-term digital partnership to deliver better health for all To facilitate the uptake of the EU DCC by WHO and contribute to its operation and further development, WHO and the European Commission have agreed to partner in digital health. This partnership will work to technically develop the WHO system with a staged approach to cover additional use cases, which may include, for example, the digitisation of the International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis. Expanding such digital solutions will be essential to deliver better health for citizens across the globe.
translations.reference: Jengo la kwanza la mfumo wa kimataifa wa WHO litaanza kufanya kazi Juni 2023 na linalenga kuendelezwa hatua kwa hatua katika miezi ijayo. Ushirikiano wa muda mrefu wa kidijitali ili kutoa afya bora kwa wote ili kuwezesha kuchukuliwa kwa EU DCC na WHO na kuchangia katika utendakazi wake na maendeleo zaidi, WHO na tume ya Ulaya wamekubali kushirikiana katika afya ya kidijitali. Ushirikiano huu utafanya kazi ili kuendeleza kitaalamu mfumo wa WHO kwa mbinu ya hatua ya kushughulikia kesi za ziada za matumizi, ambayo inaweza kujumuisha, kwa mfano, uwekaji kidijitali cheti cha kimataifa cha chanjo au kuzuia. Kupanua masuluhisho haya ya kidijitali itakuwa muhimu ili kutoa afya bora kwa wananchi kote ulimwenguni.
translations.hypothesis: Sehemu ya kwanza ya mfumo wa WHO duniani itaanza kufanya kazi mwezi Juni mwaka wa 2023, na lengo ni kuendeleza mfumo huo hatua kwa hatua katika miezi ijayo. Ushirikiano wa muda mrefu wa kidijitali ili kutoa huduma bora za afya kwa kila mtu. Ili kusaidia Shirika la WHO kukubali na kutumia mfumo wa EU DCC, na kuchangia katika uendeshaji na maendeleo yake zaidi, Shirika la WHO na Tume ya Ulaya wamekubaliana kushirikiana katika sekta ya afya ya kidijitali. Ushirikiano huu utalenga katika kuendeleza mfumo wa WHO kwa njia ya hatua, ili kufunika matumizi mengine, ambayo yanaweza kujumuisha, kwa mfano, ubadilishaji wa kidijitali wa Cheti cha Kimataifa cha Chanjo au Kinga. Kuongeza suluhisho kama hizo za kidijitali kutakuwa muhimu ili kutoa huduma bora za afya kwa wananchi ulimwenguni.

translations.source: This cooperation is based on the shared values and principles of transparency and openness, inclusiveness, accountability, data protection and privacy, security, scalability at a global level, and equity. The WHO and the European Commission will work together to encourage maximum global uptake and participation. Particular attention will be paid to equitable opportunities for the participation by those most in need: low and middle-income countries.
translations.reference: Ushirikiano huu unatokana na maadili na kanuni zinazoshirikiwa wa uhuru na uwazi, ushirikishwaji, uwajibikaji, ulinzi wa Data na faragha, usalama, hatari katika ngazi ya kimataifa, na usawa. WHO na Tume ya Ulaya watafanya kazi pamoja ili kuhimiza ushiriki wa juu zaidi wa kimataifa. Umakini mahususi utalipwa kwa fursa sawa za ushiriki wa wale wanaohitaji zaidi: nchi za kipato cha chini na cha kati.
translations.hypothesis: Ushirikiano huu unatokana na maadili na kanuni za pamoja za uwazi na ufunguzi, ushirikishwaji, uwajibikaji, ulinzi wa data na faragha, usalama, uwezo wa kupanuka katika ngazi ya kimataifa, na usawa. Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) na Tume ya Ulaya watashirikiana ili kuhimiza ushiriki na utekelezaji mpana zaidi ulimwenguni. Makini maalum itatoa kwa kuhakikisha kwamba kuna fursa sawa za ushiriki kwa wale ambao wanahitaji zaidi: nchi zilizo na kipato cha chini na cha kati.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly – Daily update: 30 May 2023 WHO’s annual assembly ends with agreement on funding, and array of health topics WHO’s 76th health assembly closed today, having addressed a vast array of issues, including behavioural sciences; best buys for non-communicable diseases; diagnostics; disabilities; drowning prevention; emergency, critical and operative care; food micronutrients; indigenous health; infection prevention and control; maternal and child health; medical oxygen; primary health care; refugee and migrant health;
translations.reference: Mkutano wa Sabini na sita wa Afya Duniani - Sasisho la kila siku: 30 Mei 2023 Mkutano wa kila mwaka wa WHO unaisha kwa makubaliano juu ya ufadhili, na msululu wa mada za Afya. Mkutano wa Afya wa 76 wa WHO umefungwa leo, baada ya kushughulikia masuala mengi, ikiwemo sayansi ya tabia. Bora kununua kwa magonjwa yasiyo ya kuambukiza; uchunguzi; Ulemavu; Kuzuia kuzama; huduma ya dharura; muhimu na ya Upasuaji; Cakula cha virutibisho; kinga ya asili; kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi; afya ya mama na mtoto; Oksijeni ya matibabu; huduma ya afya ya msingi; afya ya wakimbizi na wahamiaji;
translations.hypothesis: Mkutano wa 76 wa Baraza la Afya la Dunia – Taarifa ya kila siku: Mei 30, 2023. Mkutano wa kila mwaka wa WHO unaisha kwa makubaliano kuhusu ufadhili, na mada mbalimbali za afya. Mkutano wa 76 wa afya wa WHO umefungwa leo, baada ya kujadili masuala mengi, ikiwa ni pamoja na sayansi ya tabia; suluhisho bora kwa magonjwa yasiyoambukiza; uchunguzi; ulemavu; kuzuia ajali za maji; huduma za dharura, muhimu na za upasuaji; virutubishi muhimu katika vyakula; afya ya makabila; kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi; afya ya mama na watoto; oksijeni ya matibabu; huduma za afya za msingi; afya ya wakimbizi na wahamiaji.

translations.source: rehabilitation; traditional medicine, and WHO’s work in responding to dozens of emergencies while working with Member States to be better prepared to face new ones. Earlier in the day, delegates in Committee A agreed to note the roadmap towards the Global Health and Peace Initiative (along with a slight change in name from “Global Health for Peace Initiative”), and requested that the Director-General report on progress in strengthening the roadmap. In plenary, as the final approval step of the assembly, delegates adopted the resolutions and decisions of the two committees, and adopted their reports. This included approval of the budget for 2024-25, and a 20% increase in assessed contributions. The committee chairs and representatives from two regions spoke to recognize the work and progress of this Assembly.
translations.reference: Ukarabati; dawa za kitamaduni, na kazi ya WHO katika kukabiliana na dharura kadhaa huku ikifanya kazi na nchi wanachama ili kujitayarisha vyema kukabiliana na dharura mpya. Mapema katika siku hiyo, wajumbe katika kamati A walikubali kuzingatia Mwongozo kuelekea mpango wa afya na amani wa ulimwengu (Pamoja na mabadiliko kidogo ya jina kutoka "Mpango wa afya Duniani kwa amani"), na kumuomba mkurugenzi mkuu aripoti maendeleo katika kuimarisha muongozo. Katika kikao, kama hatua ya mwisho ya idhini ya baraza, wajumbe walipitisha maazimio na maamuzi ya kamati hizo mbili, na kupitisha ripoti zao. Hii ilijumuisha kuidhinishwa kwa bajeti ya 2024-2025, na ongezeko la 20% la michango iliyotathminiwa. Wenyeviti wa kamati na wawakilishi kutoka kanda mbili walizungumza kutambua kazi na maendeleo ya Baraza hili.
translations.hypothesis: Rehabistia; tiba za jadi, na kazi ya Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) katika kukabiliana na dharura nyingi, huku shirika hilo likifanya kazi na nchi wanachama ili kuwa tayari zaidi kukabiliana na dharura mpya. Mapema siku hiyo, wawakilishi katika Kamati A walikubaliana kutambua mpango wa hatua unaelekea mpango wa Kimataifa wa Afya na Amani (pamoja na mabadiliko madogo katika jina, kutoka "Mpango wa Afya kwa Amani"), na walitaka Mkurugenzi Mkuu aripoti kuhusu maendeleo katika kuimarisha mpango huo. Katika kikao kikubwa, kama hatua ya mwisho ya kuidhinishwa na mkutano huo, wawakilishi walipitisha azimio na maamuzi ya kamati hizo mbili, na pia ripoti zao. Hii ilijumuisha kuidhinishwa kwa bajeti ya mwaka wa 2024-25, na ongezeko la asilimia 20 katika michango iliyopangwa. Mwenyekiti wa kamati na wawakilishi kutoka katika maeneo mawili walizungumza ili kutambua kazi na maendeleo ya mkutano huo.

translations.source: In his closing remarks, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO’s Director-General, noted that “the increase in assessed contributions and the investment round are historic and a huge milestone.” He spoke about the year ahead, with high-level meetings on universal health coverage, tuberculosis and pandemic preparedness and response at this year’s UN General Assembly. He pointed to the continuing negotiations on the pandemic accord and amendments to the International Health Regulations as unprecedented—“generational”—opportunities to learn from the mistakes of the COVID-19 pandemic and ensure they are not repeated. Delegates also had the chance to hear from former WHO staff Gwen Carnelley, who turned 100 this year, who began working with WHO in 1949, just a year after WHO was founded 75 years ago. Video of Closing of the 76th World Health Assembly.
translations.reference: Katika hotuba yake ya mwisho, Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO, alibainisha kuwa "ongezeko la michango iliyotathminiwa na mzunguko wa uwekezaji ni wa kihistoria na hatua kubwa" Alizungumza kuhusu mwaka ujao, na mikutano ya ngazi ya juu ya huduma ya afya kwa wote, kifua kikuu na kujiandaa na janga na majibu katika mkutano mkuu wa Umoja wa mataifa wa mwaka huu. Aliashiria mazungumzo yanayoendelea juu ya makubaliano ya janga na marekebisho ya kanuni za afya za kimataifa kama fursa ambazo haziwahi kutokea- "za kizazi" za kujifunza kutokana makosa ya janga la UVIKO-19 na kuhakikisha kuwa hayarudiwi tena,. Pia wajumbe walipata fursa ya kusikia kutoka kwa mfanya kazi wa zamani wa WHO Gwen Carnelley, ambae alitimiza miaka 100 mwaka huu, amabe alianza kufanya kazi na WHO mwaka 1949, mwaka mmoja tu baada ya WHO kuanzishwa miaka 75 iliyopita. Video ya kufungwa kwa mkutano wa 76 wa afya Duniani.
translations.hypothesis: Katika hotuba yake ya mwisho, Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, alisema kwamba "ongezeko la michango iliyopangwa na mzunguko huu wa uwekezaji ni jambo muhimu sana na hatua kubwa." Alizungumzia mwaka ujao, ambao utaongozwa na mikutano ya kiwango cha juu kuhusu huduma za afya kwa kila mtu, kifua kikuu, na uandaaji na utendaji katika kukabiliana na janga, ambayo yatafanyika katika Mkutano Mkuu wa Umoja wa Mataifa mwaka huu. Alibainisha kuwa mazungumzo yanayoendelea kuhusu makubaliano ya janga na marekebisho ya Kanuni za Kimataifa za Afya ni fursa zisizo na kifani—"za kizazi"—za kujifunza kutoka makosa ya janga la COVID-19 na kuhakikisha kwamba hayatarudiwa. Wawakilishi pia walipata fursa ya kusikiliza Gwen Carnelley, ambaye ni mfanyakazi wa zamani wa WHO na ambaye amefikia umri wa miaka 100 mwaka huu, na ambaye alianza kufanya kazi na WHO mwaka wa 1949, mwaka mmoja tu baada ya WHO kuanzishwa miaka 75 iliyopita. Video ya kumalizika kwa Mkutano wa 76 wa Baraza la Afya la Dunia.

translations.source: Gwen Carnelley is introduced at 54:37 and speaks shortly afterwards. Starting tomorrow, the 153rd meeting of Executive Board begins, where the outcomes of the Assembly will be discussed, among other things.
translations.reference: Gwen Carnelley anatambulishwa saa 54:37 na anazungumza muda mfupi baadae. Kuanzia kesho, mkutano wa 153 wa Bodi ya wakurugenzi unaanza, ambapo matokeo ya Baraza yatajadiliwa, pamoja na mambo mengine.
translations.hypothesis: Gwen Carnelley anawasilishwa saa 54:37 na anaongea muda mfupi baadaye. Kuanzia kesho, mkutano wa 153 wa Bodi ya Utendaji utaanza, ambapo matokeo ya mkutano mkuu yatajadiliwa, pamoja na mambo mengine.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly – Daily update: 29 May 2023 Landmark resolution for strengthening Indigenous Peoples’ health globally The World Health Assembly today approved an unprecedented resolution on the health of Indigenous Peoples, which requests the Director-General to develop a global action plan for the health of indigenous peoples and to present it to the Seventy-ninth World Health Assembly in 2026. Indigenous Peoples, although representing diverse population groups and communities, in general have considerably lower life expectancy than non-indigenous populations. They also have a higher prevalence of many diseases and adverse health conditions, including diabetes, maternal and infant mortality and malnutrition.
translations.reference: Mkutano wa Sabini na sita wa Baraza la afya Duniani- sasisho la kila siku: 29 Mei 2023 Azimio muhimu la kuimarisha afya ya watu wa kiasili Duniani kote Baraza la Afya Ulimwenguni leo limeidhinisha Azimio ambalo halijawahi kushuhudiwa kuhusu watu wa kiasili, ambalo linamtaka mkurugenzi mkuu kubuni mpango wa utekelezaji wa kimataifa kwa ajili ya afya ya watu wa kiasili na kuuwasilisha kwenye mkutano wa Sabini na sita wa Baraza la Afya Duniani mwaka 2026. Ingawa, watu wa kiasili wanawakilisha makundi na jumuia mbalimbali za watu, kwa ujumla wana muda mdogo sana wa kuishi kuliko watu wasio wenyeji. Pia wana kiwango kikubwa cha maambukizi ya magonjwa mengi na hali mbaya ya afya, ikiwemo kisukari, vifo vya uzazi na watoto wachanganya na utapiamlo.
translations.hypothesis: Mkutano wa 76 wa Baraza la Afya la Dunia – Taarifa ya kila siku: Mei 29, 2023. Azimio muhimu kwa ajili ya kuimarisha afya ya Watu wa Makabila ya Asili ulimwenguni. Leo, Baraza la Afya la Dunia limeidhinisha azimio la kipekee kuhusu afya ya Watu wa Makabila ya Asili, ambalo linaomba Mkurugenzi Mkuu kuandaa mpango wa kimataifa wa hatua za kuboresha afya ya watu hao, na kutoa mpango huo kwa Mkutano wa 79 wa Baraza la Afya la Dunia mnamo mwaka wa 2026. Watu wa Makabila ya Asili, ingawa wawakilisha makundi na jamii mbalimbali, kwa ujumla wana muda wa maisha mfupi kuliko makundi mengine ya watu. Pia, wana ukubwa mkubwa wa magonjwa na hali mbaya za kiafya, ikiwa ni pamoja na ugonjwa wa kisukari, vifo vya mama na watoto wachanga, na lishe mbaya.

translations.source: The Assembly requested the action plan be developed in consultation with Indigenous Peoples; that WHO provide support to Member States, upon request, for improving indigenous health; and that the improvement of Indigenous Peoples’ health be included in the development of the Fourteenth WHO General Programme of Work. In the same resolution, the Health Assembly urged Member States to, among other tasks, develop knowledge about the health situation of Indigenous Peoples, with their free, prior and informed consent; develop, fund and implement national health plans, strategies or other measures for Indigenous Peoples;
translations.reference: Baraza liliomba mpango wa utekelezaji uandaliwe kwa mashauriano na watu wa kiasili Kwamab WHO hutoa msaada kwa nchi wanachama, kwa ombi, kwa ajili ya kuboresha afya ya wenyeji; na Kwamba uboreshaji wa Afya ya watu wa kiasili ujumuishwe katika uundaji wa mpango wa kazi wa kumi na nne wa WHO. Katika Azimio hilohilo, Baraza la Afya lilizitaka nchi wanachama, miongoni mwa kazi nyingine, kuendeleza ujuzi kuhusu hali ya afya ya watu wa asili, kwa ridhaa yao ya bure, ya awali na ya taarifa; Kuendeleza, kufadhili na kutekeleza mipango ya kitaifa ya afya, mikakati au hatua nyingine kwa ajili ya watu wa asili;
translations.hypothesis: Baraza lilitaka mpango huo wa hatua uundwe kwa kushirikisha makabila ya asili; kwamba Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) lipe usaidizi kwa nchi wanachama, kwa ombi, ili kuboresha afya ya makabila ya asili; na kwamba uboreshaji wa afya ya makabila ya asili ujumuishwe katika maendeleo ya Mpango Mkuu wa Kumi na Nne wa WHO. Katika azimio hilo hilo, Baraza la Afya lilihimiza nchi wanachama, miongoni mwa majukumu mengine, kukuza maarifa kuhusu hali ya afya ya makabila ya asili, kwa ridhaa yao huru, ya awali na iliyoeleweka; kuandaa, kuwekeza na kutekeleza mipango, mikakati au hatua nyingine za kitaifa za afya kwa ajili ya makabila ya asili.

translations.source: encourage the attraction, training, recruitment and retention of Indigenous Peoples as health workers taking into account the traditional knowledge and practices. Related document: A76/A/CONF./1 - Health of Indigenous Peoples First-ever resolution to accelerate action on drowning preventionThe delegates at the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly agreed a resolution to accelerate action on global drowning prevention. The resolution requests Member States to assess their national drowning situation and to develop and implement multisectoral drowning prevention programmes. Drowning causes 236 000 deaths every year.
translations.reference: Kuhimiza mvuto, mafunzo, kuajiri na kubaki kwa watu wa kiasili kama wahudumu wa afya kwa kuzingatia maarifa na desturi za jadi. Hati inayohusiana: A76/A/ CONF./ 1- Afya ya watu wa kiasili Azimio la kwanza kabisa la kuharakisha hatua za kuzuia kuzama kwa maji Wajumbe katika mkutano wa Sabini na sita wa Baraza la Afya Ulimwenguni walikubaliana Azimio la kuharakisha hatua za kuzuia kuzama kwa maji Duniani. Azimio hilo linaziomba nchi wanachama kutathmini hali yao ya kitaifa ya kuzama majini na kuendeleza kutekeleza mipango ya sekta mbalimbali ya kuzuia kuzama maji. Kuzama husababisha vifo 236,000 kila mwaka.
translations.hypothesis: hamasisha utaratibu wa kuvutia, kutoa mafunzo, kuajiri na kuendeleza kazi ya watu wa asili kama wafanyakazi wa afya, huku ikizingatiwa maarifa na mila yao. Hati husika: A76/A/CONF./1 - Afya ya Watu wa Asili. Azimio la kwanza kabisa la kuongeza kasi ya juhudi za kuzuia ajali za maji. Mawaziri waliohudhuria Mkutano wa 76 wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) walikubali azimio la kuongeza kasi ya juhudi za kimataifa za kuzuia ajali za maji. Azimio hilo linaomba nchi wanachama kuchunguza hali ya ajali za maji katika nchi zao na kuandaa na kutekeleza programu za kuzuia ajali za maji zinazohusisha sekta mbalimbali. Ajali za maji husababisha vifo vya watu 236,000 kila mwaka.

translations.source: It is a leading global cause of injury-related child deaths. Over the past decade, 2.5 million people died from drowning, and over 90% of those occurred in low- and middle-income countries. At the invitation of the United Nations (UN) General Assembly, WHO will coordinate actions within the UN system on drowning prevention and facilitate the observance of World Drowning Prevention Day on 25 July each year. WHO will also set up a Global Alliance for Drowning Prevention with organizations of the UN system, international development partners and nongovernmental organizations. To better understand the true burden and impact of drowning, the resolution further requests WHO to prepare a global status report on drowning prevention.
translations.reference: Ni sababu kuu ya kimataifa ya vifo vya watoto vinavyohusiana na majeraha. Katika muongo mmoja uliopita, watu milioni 2.5 walikufa kutokana na kufa maji, na zaidi ya 90% ya hao walitokea katika nchi za kipato cha chini na cha kati. Kwa mualiko wa Baraza kuu la umoja wa mataifa (UN), WHO itaratibu hatua ndani ya mfumo wa umoja wa mataifa kuhusu kuzuia kuzama na kuwezesha maadhimisho ya siku kuzuia kuzama Duniani tarehe 25 Julai kila mwaka. Pia WHO itaanzisha ushirikiano wa kimataifa wa kuzuia kuzama na mashirika ya mfumo wa umoja wa mataifa, washirika wa maendeleo wa kimataifa na mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali. Ili kuelewa vyema mzigo na kweli wa athari za kuzama, Azimio hilo linaiomba zaidi WHO kuandaa ripoti ya hali ya kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia kuzama.
translations.hypothesis: Ni mojawapo ya sababu kuu za vifo vya watoto duniani ambavyo husababishwa na majeraha. Katika muongo uliopita, watu milioni 2.5 wamefariki dunia kutokana na kuzama, na zaidi ya asilimia 90 ya vifo hivyo yamefanyika katika nchi zilizo na kipato cha chini na cha kati. Kwa mwaliko wa Baraza Kuu la Umoja wa Mataifa (UN), Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) litakuwa na jukumu la kuunganisha juhudi ndani ya mfumo wa UN kuhusu kuzuia ajali za kuzama, na pia kusaidia katika kuadhimisha Siku ya Kimataifa ya Kuzuia Ajali za Kuzama, ambayo huadhimishwa kila mwaka mnamo tarehe 25 Julai. WHO pia itaunda Muungano wa Kimataifa wa Kuzuia Ajali za Kuzama, ambao utajumuisha mashirika ya mfumo wa UN, washirika wa kimataifa wa maendeleo, na mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali. Ili kuelewa vizuri athari na ukubwa wa tatizo la kuzama, azimisho hilo pia inaomba WHO kuandaa ripoti ya kimataifa kuhusu hali ya sasa ya juhudi za kuzuia ajali za kuzama.

translations.source: Related document: EB152/CONF./2 - Accelerating action on global drowning prevention Read more about the resolution World Drowning Prevention Day 2023 Member States mobilize behind resolution to tackle chemicals, waste and pollution Member States welcomed the resolution addressing environmental determinants, including management of chemicals and waste. The efforts can help prevent up to one fifth of all suicide-related deaths from highly hazardous pesticides.
translations.reference: Hati inayohusiana: EB 152/CONF./2- Kuharakisha hatua ya kuzuia kuzama Duniani Soma zaidi kuhusu Azimio hilo Siku ya kuzuia kuzama Duniani 2023 Nchi wanachama zinahamasishana nyuma ya Azimio la kukabilina na kemikali, taka na uchafuzi wa mazingira Nchi wanachama zilikaribisha Azimio linaloshughulikia viashiria vya mzingira, ikiwa ni pamoja na usimamizi wa kemkali na taka. Jitihada hizo zinaweza kusaidia kuzuia hadi moja ya tano ya vifo vyote vinavyohusiana na kujiua kutokana na viuatilifu hatari.
translations.hypothesis: Hati inayohusiana: EB152/CONF./2 - Kuongeza kasi ya juhudi za kuzuia ajali za maji duniani. Soma zaidi kuhusu azimio hilo. Siku ya Kimataifa ya Kuzuia Ajali za Maji, 2023. Nchi wanachama zimeunga mkono azimio hilo ili kukabiliana na kemikali, taka, na uchafuzi. Nchi wanachama zimepokelewa vizuri azimio hilo ambalo linahusu mambo yanayoathiri mazingira, ikiwa ni pamoja na usimamizi wa kemikali na taka. Juhudi hizi zinaweza kusaidia kuzuia hadi theluthi moja ya vifo vyote vinavyohusiana na kujitua, ambavyo husababishwa na kemikali hatari sana.

translations.source: Member States were urged to bolster the implementation of existing WHO strategies including implementation of the WHO Chemicals Roadmap which outlines key roles of the health sector in implementing the Strategic Approach to International Chemicals Management. The resolution also encourages the Ministries of Health to engage in efforts to prepare proposals for an intergovernmental science policy panel and negotiations for a treaty to end plastic pollution. The resolution called upon the Director-General to undertake several actions, including: publishing a report on the health implications of chemicals, waste and pollution from a "One Health" perspective; updating the 2012 document on the State of the Science of Endocrine Disrupting Chemicals jointly with the United Nations Environment Programme; and
translations.reference: Nchi wanachama zilihimizwa kuimarisha utendaji wa mikakati iliyopo ya WHO ikijumuisha utekelezaji wa muongozo wa kemikali wa WHO unaoainisha majukumu muhimu ya sekta ya afya katika kutekeleza mkakati wa kudhibiti kemikali za kimataifa. Pia Azimio linahimiza wizara za afya kushiriki katika juhudi za kuandaa mapendekezo ya jopo la sera za sayansi kati ya serikali na mazungumzo ya makataba wa kukomesha uchafuzi wa plastiki. Azimio hilo lilimtaka mkurugenzi mkuu kuchukua hatua kadhaa, zikiwemo: Kuchapisha ripoti juu ya athari za kiafya za kemikali, takataka na uchafuzi wa mazingira kutoka kwa mtazamo wa "Afya Moja"; Kusasisha waraka wa 2012 kuhusu hali ya sayansi ya Endocrine kuharibu kemikali kwa pamoja na mpango wa mazingira wa umoja wa mataifa; na
translations.hypothesis: Nchi wanachama zilitakiwa kuimarisha utekelezaji wa mikakati iliyopo ya Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), ikiwa ni pamoja na utekelezaji wa Mfumo wa Kimkakati wa Kemikali za WHO, ambao unaeleza majukumu muhimu ya sekta ya afya katika utekelezaji wa Mbinu ya Kimkakati ya Usimamizi wa Kimataifa wa Kemikali. Azimizo hilo pia linahimiza Wizara za Afya kushiriki katika juhudi za kuandaa mapendekezo kwa ajili ya jopo la kisayansi na sera la serikali, na pia katika mazungumzo ya mkataba wa kukomesha uchafuzi wa plastiki. Azimizo hilo pia liliomba Mkurugenzi Mkuu kuchukua hatua kadhaa, ikiwa ni pamoja na: kuchapisha ripoti kuhusu athari za kiafya za kemikali, taka na uchafuzi kutoka kwa mtazamo wa "Afya ya Jumla"; kusasisha hati ya mwaka 2012 kuhusu hali ya sayansi ya kemikali zinazoharibu homoni, kwa kushirikiana na Mpango wa Mazingira wa Umoja wa Mataifa; na.

translations.source: supporting countries in developing national or regional human biomonitoring programmes for chemicals of concern. Related document: A76/A/CONF./2 - The impact of chemicals, waste and pollution on human health WHO’s work on chemical safety and health Achieving well-being: a global frameworkMember States agreed to adopt the "Global framework for integrating well-being into public health utilizing a health promotion approach", which strives to enable all people to flourish and achieve their full physical and mental health potential throughout their lives and across generations. The Global framework recommends six key strategic directions that focus on: universal health coverage, equitable economies, protecting the planet, social protection systems, digital systems to enable health, and measuring and monitoring well-being.
translations.reference: Kusaidia nchi katika kuendeleza programu za kitaifa au kikanda za uchunguzi wa binadamu kwa kemikali zinazohusika. Hati inayohusiana: A76/A/ CONF./ 2 - Athari za kemikali, takataka na uchafuziwa mazingira kwa Afya ya Binadamu WHO inafanya kazi juu ya usalama wa kemikali na afya kufikia ustawi: Nchi wanachama za mfumo wa kimataifa zilikubali kupitisha "mfumo wa kitaifa wa kuunganisha ustawi katika afya ya umma kwa kutumia mbinu ya kukuza afya", ambayo inajitahidi kuwawezesha watu wote kustawi na kufikia uwezo wao kamili wa afya ya kimwili na kiakili katika maisha yao yote na katika vizazi vyote. Mfumo wa kimataifa unapendekeza maelekezo sita muhimu ya kimkakati ambayo yanazingatia: Huduma ya afya kwa wote, Uchumi sawa, mifumo ya kidijitali kuwezesha afya, na kupima na kufuatilia ustawi.
translations.hypothesis: Kusaidia nchi katika kuendeleza programu za kitaifa au za kikanda za kufuatilia afya ya binadamu kwa kutumia vipimo vya kemikali hatari. Hati husika: A76/A/CONF./2 - Athari za kemikali, taka na uchafuzi kwenye afya ya binadamu. Kazi za Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) kuhusu usalama wa kemikali na afya. Kuchochea ustawi: mfumo wa kimataifa. Nchi wanachama zilikubali kutekeleza "Mfumo wa kimataifa wa kuunganisha ustawi katika afya ya umma, kwa kutumia mbinu ya kukuza afya," ambao unalenga kuwezesha watu wote kustawi na kufikia uwezo wao kamili wa kimwili na kiakili katika maisha yao yote na katika vizazi tofauti. Mfumo wa kimataifa unatoa mapendekezo sita muhimu ya kimkakati ambayo yanazingatia: huduma ya afya kwa kila mtu, uchumi wa haki, ulinzi wa sayari, mifumo ya usalama wa kijamii, mifumo ya kidijitali ili kusaidia afya, na kupima na kufuatilia ustawi.

translations.source: The framework proposes close collaboration with sectors outside the health sector to promote and protect health. It serves as a guide for all stakeholders to engage in a coherent and coordinated manner around a common purpose: promoting the health of people and planet in a sustainable and equitable manner. promoting the health of people and planet in a sustainable and equitable manner. The Assembly requests the Director-General to report on implementation of the global framework in 2024, 2026 and 2031. Related document: A76/7 Add.2 - Well-being and health promotion
translations.reference: Mfumo unapendekeza ushirikiano wa karibu na sekta zilizo nje ya afya ili kukuza na kulind afya. Inatumika kama muongozo kwa washikadau wote kushiriki kwa njia iliyounganishwa na ilivyoratibiwa kwa madhumuni ya pamoja: kukuza afya ya watu na sayari kwa njia endelevu na ya usawa. Kukuza afya ya watu na sayari kwa njia endelevu na yenye usawa. Baraza linamtaka mkurugenzi mkuu kuripoti kkuhusu utekelezaji wa mfumo wa kimataifa wa mwaka 2024, 2026 na 2031. Hati inayohusiana: A76/ 7 Add.2 - Ustawi na kukuza Afya
translations.hypothesis: Mfumo huu unapendekeza ushirikiano wa karibu na sekta nyingine nje ya afya ili kukuza na kulinda afya. Huwa kama mwongozo kwa wadau wote ili kushiriki kwa njia iliyounganishwa na imeandaliwa vizuri, kwa lengo moja: kukuza afya ya watu na sayari kwa njia endelevu na yenye usawa. Mkutano huo unaomba Mkurugenzi Mkuu aripoti kuhusu utekelezaji wa mfumo huu wa kimataifa katika miaka ya 2024, 2026 na 2031. Hati husika: A76/7 Add.2 - Ustawi na kukuza afya.

translations.source: New resolution to accelerate efforts on food micronutrient fortification The delegates approved a resolution on accelerating efforts to prevent micronutrient deficiencies through safe and effective food fortification. Deficiencies in vitamin and mineral status, particularly of folate, iron, vitamin A, and zinc, affect 50% of all preschool aged children and 67% of all women of reproductive age worldwide. Micronutrient deficiencies can have serious consequences, including spina bifida and other neural tube defects.Large scale food fortification is part of the solution. By adding essential vitamins and minerals to staple foods and condiments, such as wheat and maize flours, rice, cooking oil and salt in accordance with national consumption patterns and deficiencies, countries can correct and further prevent a demonstrated micronutrient deficiency.
translations.reference: Azimio jipya la kuharakisha juhudi za urutubishaji wa virutubisho vya chakula Wajumbe waliidhinisha Azimio la kuongeza kasi ya juhudi za kuzuia upungufu wa virutubisho kupitia urutubishaji wa chakula. Upungufu katika hali ya vitamini na madini,, hasa ya folate, chuma, vitamini A, na Zinki huathiri 50% ya watoto wote wenye umri wa shule ya awali na 67% ya wanawake wote wa umri wa uzazi Duniani kote. Upungufu wa virutubisho unaweza kuwa na madhara makubwa, ikiwemo uti wa mgongo na Kasoro nyingine za mirija ya Neva. Urutubishaji wa chakula kwa kiwango kikubwa ni sehemu ya suluhisho. Kwa kuongezea vitamini na madini muhimu katika vyakula na vitoweo, kama vile unga wa ngano na mahindi, mchele, mafuta ya kupikia na chumvi kwa mujibu wa mifumo ya matumizi ya kitaifa na upungufu, nchi zinaweza kurekebisha na kuzuia zaidi upungufu wa virutubisho unaonekana.
translations.hypothesis: Azimio jipya ili kuongeza kasi ya juhudi za kuimarisha vyakula kwa kuongeza virutubisho muhimu. Wawakilishi walipitisha azimio kuhusu kuongeza kasi ya juhudi za kuzuia upungufu wa virutubisho muhimu kupitia utumiaji salama na bora wa virutubisho katika vyakula. Upungufu wa vitamini na madini, hasa folate, chuma, vitamini A, na zinki, huathiri asilimia 50 ya watoto wote wa umri wa awali na asilimia 67 ya wanawake wote wa umri wa kuzaa duniani kote. Upungufu wa virutubisho muhimu unaweza kuwa na matokeo mabaya, ikiwa ni pamoja na ugonjwa wa spina bifida na kasoro nyingine za mishipa ya neva. Kuongeza virutubisho muhimu katika vyakula kwa wingi ni sehemu ya suluhisho. Kwa kuongeza vitamini na madini muhimu katika vyakula vya msingi na viungo, kama vile unga wa ngano na mahindi, mchele, mafuta ya kupika na chumvi, kulingana na mlo wa kitaifa na upungufu uliopo, nchi zinaweza kurekebisha na kuzuia zaidi upungufu wa virutubisho muhimu uliothibitishwa.

translations.source: The resolution urges Member States to develop policies on food fortification with micronutrients and/or supplementation, and to consider ways of strengthening financing and monitoring mechanisms. The resolution was agreed under the umbrella of the United Nations Decade of Action on Nutrition (2016-2025) report. Related document: EB152/CONF./5 Accelerating efforts for preventing micronutrient deficiencies and their consequences, including spina bifida and other neural tube defects, through safe and effective food fortification Related links
translations.reference: Azimio hilo linahimiza nchi wanachma kubuni sera kuhusu urutubishaji wa chakula kwa virutubishi vidogo na/ au kuongeza, na kuzingatia njia za kuimarisha mifumo ya ufadhili na ufuatiliaji. Azimio hilo lilikubaliwa chini ya mwamvuli wa ripoti ya muongo wa utekelezaji wa umoja wa mataifa kuhusu Lishe (2016-2025). Hati inayohusiana: EB 152/CONF./5 Kuongeza kasi ya juhudi za kuzuia upungufu wa virutubisho na madhara yake, ikiwemo uti wa mgongo na kasoro nyingine za mirija ya Neva kupitia urutubishaji wa chakula salama na bora Viunganishi vinavyohusiana
translations.hypothesis: Azimizo hilo inawahimiza nchi wanachama kuunda sera kuhusu kuongeza virutubisho vidogo kwenye vyakula na/au kuongeza virutubisho kupitia mchanganyiko, na pia kuchunguza njia za kuimarisha mifumo ya ufadhili na ufuatiliaji. Azimizo hilo lilipitishwa chini ya mkakati wa Umoja wa Mataifa wa Miaka Kumi ya Hatua kwenye Lishe (2016-2025). Hati husika: EB152/CONF./5 Kuongeza juhudi za kuzuia upungufu wa virutubisho vidogo na madhara yake, ikiwa ni pamoja na ugonjwa wa spina bifida na kasoro nyingine za mishipa ya neva, kupitia kuongeza virutubisho kwenye vyakula kwa njia salama na yenye ufanisi. Viungo vinavyohusiana.

translations.source: Read more about the resolution WHO's work on food fortification Member States approve actions to counter substandard and falsified medicines On 27 May, the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly approved a resolution to conduct an independent review of the Member State Mechanism (MSM) for incidents, substandard and falsified medicines, reinforcing the Director-General’s January 2023 call for increased vigilance and action in this important area. The review will be initiated at the next MSM steering committee meeting later in 2023.
translations.reference: Soma zaidi kuhusu Azimio hilo WHO inafaya kazi ya kuimarisha chakula Nchi wanachama zimeidhinisha hatua za kukabiliana na dawa zisizo na viwango na zilizounganishwa Tarehe 27, Mei, Bunge la Sabini na sita la Afya Duniani liliidhinisha Azimio la kufanya mapitio huru ya mfumo wa nchi wanachama (MSM) kwa matukio, Dawa Duni, na zilizoghushiwa, na kutilia mkazo wito wa mkurugenzi mkuu wa Januari 2023 wa kuongeza umakini na hatua katika eneo hili muhimu. Uhakiki utaanzishwa katika kikao kijacho cha kamati ya uongozi ya MSM baadae mwaka 2023.
translations.hypothesis:
Soma zaidi kuhusu azimio hilo, kuhusu kazi ya Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) katika kuongeza virutubisho kwenye vyakula, na kuhusu nchi wanachama ambazo zimeidhinisha hatua za kukabiliana na dawa za ubora duni na za bandia.

Mnamo tarehe 27 Mei, Mkutano wa 76 wa Baraza la Afya Duniani uliidhinisha azimio la kufanya tathmini huru ya Mfumo wa Nchi Wanachama (MSM) unaohusiana na matukio, dawa za ubora duni na za bandia, na hivyo kuunga mkono ombi la Mkurugenzi Mkuu lililotoa mnamo Januari 2023, la kuongeza uangalifu na hatua katika eneo hili muhimu. Tathmini hiyo itaanza katika mkutano ujao wa kamati ya uongozi ya MSM, ambao utafanyika baadaye mwaka wa 2023.

translations.source: The Assembly established the MSM in 2012 to tackle substandard and falsified medical products from a public health perspective and in a transparent and inclusive way. The goal of the MSM is to protect public health and promote access to affordable, safe, efficacious and quality medical products. Noting recent events of contaminated medicines found on various markets and related preventable deaths, Member States emphasized the support needed to improve their capacity to prevent, detect and respond to substandard and falsified medical products through access to appropriate technologies, including laboratory testing facilities, along with improved oversight on informal markets and advertising, and the online sale of medical products. Member States called for embracing and implementing track and trace technologies for market control and surveillance, as well as the need for formal collaboration by relevant local and global partners such as law enforcement and customs administrations. Member States were encouraged to align with conventions aimed at improvement of legislation and imposition of prohibitive sanctions for wrongful dealing in substandard and falsified medical products.
translations.reference: Baraza lilianzisha MSM mwaka 2012 ili kukabiliana na bidhaa za matibabu duni na potofu kutoka kwa mtazamo wa afya ya umma na kwa njia ya uwazi na inayojumuisha wote. Lengo la MSM ni kulinda afya ya umma na kukuza upatikanaji wa bidhaa za matibabu za bei nafuu, salama, zinazofaa na bora. Zikibainisha matukio ya hivi karibuni ya dawa zilizochafuliwa zilizopatikana na hiyo zilisisitiza usaidizi unaohitajika ili kuboresha uwezo wao wa kuzuia, kugundua na kukubaliana na bidhaa duni na potofu kupitia upatikanaji wa teknolojia zinazofaa, ikiwemo vifaa vya kupimia maabara, pamoja na uangalizi ulioboresha kwenye masoko na utangazaji usio rasmi, na uuzaji wa mtandaoni wa bidhaa za matibabu. Nchi wanachama zilitoa wito wa kukumbatia na kutekeleza teknolojia ya kufuatilia na kugundua kwa ajili ya kudhibiti na ufuatiliaji wa soko, vilevile hitaji la ushirikiano rasmi na washirika husika wa ndani na kimataifa kama vile utekelezaji wa sheria na tawala za forodha. Nchi wanachama zilihimizwa kupatana na mikataba inayolenga uboreshaji wa sheria na uwekaji vikwazo vizuizi kwa kushughulika kimakosa katika bidhaa za kimatibabu zilizo duni na zilizoghushiwa.
translations.hypothesis: Mkutano Mkuu uliunda Shirika la Usalama wa Madawa (MSM) mwaka wa 2012 ili kushughulikia madawa ya matibabu ya ubora duni na yasiyo halali kutoka kwa mtazamo wa afya ya umma, na kwa njia ya uwazi na inayojumuisha. Lengo la MSM ni kulinda afya ya umma na kukuza upatikanaji wa madawa ya matibabu ya bei nafuu, salama, yenye ufanisi, na ya ubora. Ikizingatia matukio ya hivi karibuni ya madawa ya matibabu yaliyochafuliwa yaliyopatikana katika masoko mbalimbali na vifo vilivyoweza kuepukika, nchi wanachama zilisisitiza umuhimu wa msaada unaohitajika ili kuimarisha uwezo wao wa kuzuia, kutambua, na kukabiliana na madawa ya matibabu ya ubora duni na yasiyo halali, kupitia upatikanaji wa teknolojia zinazofaa, ikiwa ni pamoja na vifaa vya majaribio, pamoja na ufuatiliaji ulioimarishwa wa masoko yasiyo rasmi na matangazo, na uuzaji wa madawa ya matibabu mtandaoni. Nchi wanachama ziliomba kutumia teknolojia za kufuatilia na kutambua bidhaa ili kudhibiti na kufuatilia masoko, pamoja na umuhimu wa ushirikiano rasmi wa washirika husika wa ndani na wa kimataifa, kama vile idara za polisi na mamlaka za forodha. Nchi wanachama zilitakiwa kuungana na makubaliano yanayolenga kuboresha sheria na kuweka adhabu kali kwa ubadhirifu wowote katika uuzaji wa madawa ya matibabu ya ubora duni na yasiyo halali.

translations.source: The Secretariat is requested to report on progress in this area to the Executive Board in 2025. Related document: EB152/9 - Substandard and falsified medical products Related links WHO Member State Mechanism on incidents, substandard and falsified medical products WHO's work on substandard and falsified medical products
translations.reference: Sekretarieti inaombwa kutoa taarifa ya maendeleo katika eneo hili kwa halmashauri kuu mwaka 2025. Hati inayohusiana: EB 152/ 9 - Bidhaa za matibabu zisizo na viwango na za kughushi Viunganishi vinavyohusiana Uratibu wa nchi mwanachama wa WHO kuhusu matukio, bidhaa za matibabu zisizo na viwango na za kughushi Kazi ya WHO juu ya bidhaa za matibabu duni na za kughushi
translations.hypothesis: Kanuni inataka kwamba Katibu Mkuu aripoti kuhusu maendeleo katika eneo hili kwa Bodi ya Utendaji mnamo mwaka wa 2025. Hati husika: EB152/9 - Bidhaa za matibabu zisizo na ubora na za bandia. Viungo vinavyohusiana: Mradi wa WHO unaohusiana na mataifa wanachama kuhusu matukio, bidhaa za matibabu zisizo na ubora na za bandia. Kazi ya WHO kuhusu bidhaa za matibabu zisizo na ubora na za bandia.

translations.source: First ever resolution on behavioural sciences for better health is adopted Today Member States adopted the behavioural sciences for better health resolution with Member States showing broad consensus towards the need for integrating systematically behavioural science theory, methods and approaches across health topics and public health functions. The resolution urges Member States to acknowledge the role of behavioural science in achieving better health outcomes, to identify opportunities for increased use and, to establish functions and units for generating and translating evidence to inform policies and programmes. It also requests the Director-General to mainstream the use of behavioural science within the organization and to provide support to Member States through the development of guidance and the provision of technical assistance. Member States recognized the achievement of the Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative led by the secretariat, congratulated Malaysia, sponsor of the resolution, as well as the other 19 countries that joined as co-sponsors, and thanked the Director-General for the report.
translations.reference: Azimio la kwanza kabisa juu ya sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora limepitishwa Leo nchi wanachama zimepitisha sayansi ya tabia kwa ajili ya utatuzi bora wa afya huku nchi wanachama zikionyesha maafikiano mapana kuhusu hitaji la kuunganisha kwa utaratibu nadharia ya asayansi ya tabia, njia na mbinu katika mada zote za afya na kazi za afya ya umma. Azimio hilo linahimiza nchi wanachama kutambua jukumu la sayansi ya tabia katika kufikia matokeo bora ya afya, kutambua fursa za kuongezeka kwa matumizi na, kuanzisha kazi na vitengo vya kuzalisha na kitafsiri ushahidi ili kufahamisha sera na programu. Pia linamuomba mkurugenzi mkuu kujumuisha matumizi ya sayansi ya tabia ndani ya shirika na kutoa usaidizi kwa nchi wanachama kupitia uundaji wa muongozo na utoaji wa usaidizi wa kiufundi. Nchi wanachama zilitambua mafanikio ya mpango wa sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora unaoongozwa na sekretarieti, ziliipongeza Malaysia, mdhamini wa Azimio hilo, vilevile nchi nyingine 19 zilizojiunga kama ufadhili wenza, na kumshukuru mkurugenzi mkuu kwa ripoti hiyo.
translations.hypothesis: Leo, nchi wanachama zimepitisha azimio la kwanza kuhusu sayansi ya tabia kwa ajili ya afya bora. Nchi wanachama zimeonesha makubaliano mapana kuhusu umuhimu wa kuunganisha nadharia, mbinu, na mbinu za sayansi ya tabia katika masuala ya afya na utendaji wa afya ya umma. Azimio hilo linaelekeza nchi wanachama kutambua jukumu la sayansi ya tabia katika kufanikisha matokeo bora ya afya, kutambua fursa za kuongeza matumizi yake, na kuanzisha vitengo na kazi za kuchanganua na kutumia ushahidi ili kuunda sera na programu. Pia, azimio hilo linaomba Mkurugenzi Mkuu kuweka sayansi ya tabia kama sehemu muhimu ya shughuli za shirika na kutoa msaada kwa nchi wanachama kupitia uundaji wa mwongozo na utoaji wa usaidizi wa kiufundi. Nchi wanachama zimetambua mafanikio ya Mpango wa Sayansi ya Tabia kwa Ajili ya Afya, ambao unasimamiwa na sekretarieti, zimepongeza Malaysia, ambayo ilikuwa mchochezi wa azimio hilo, pamoja na nchi nyingine 19 ambazo ziliunga mkono, na zimeishukuru Mkurugenzi Mkuu kwa ripoti yake.

translations.source: They stressed the importance of building capacity in this area, particularly in regional offices, and of creating a repository of evidence and synergies between sectors, including with academia and the private sector. Related documents: EB152(23) - Behavioural sciences for better health EB152/25 - Behavioural sciences for better health, Report by the Director-General Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative The above items were discussed as part of the document A76/7 Rev.1 - Consolidated report by the Director-General.
translations.reference: Walisisitiza umuhimu wa kujenga uwezo katika eneo hili, hususani katika ofisi za kikanda, na kuunda hifadhi ya ushahidi na ushirikiano kati ya sekta, zikiwemo vyuo na sekta binafsi. Hati zinazohusiana: EB 152 (23) - sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora. EB 152/ 25 - Sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora, ripoti ya mkurugenzi mkuu. Sayansi ya tabia kwa mpango wa afya bora vipengee vilivyotajwa hapo juu vilijadiliwa kama sehemu ya waraka A76/7 Rev.1 - Ripoti iliyounganishwa na Mkurugenzi Mkuu.
translations.hypothesis: Walisisitiza umuhimu wa kuimarisha uwezo katika eneo hili, hasa katika ofisi za kikanda, na wa kuunda mkusanyiko wa ushahidi na ushirikiano kati ya sekta mbalimbali, ikiwa ni pamoja na taasisi za elimu na sekta binafsi. Nyaraka zinazohusiana: EB152(23) - Sayansi za tabia kwa afya bora EB152/25 - Sayansi za tabia kwa afya bora, Ripoti ya Mkurugenzi Mkuu Mpango wa Sayansi za Tabia kwa Afya Bora. Mambo yaliyojadiliwa hapo juu yilionekana katika hati A76/7 Rev.1 - Ripoti iliyounganishwa ya Mkurugenzi Mkuu.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly – Daily update: 27 May 2023 First global strategy on infection prevention and controlThe World Health Assembly agreed today on the first-ever global strategy on infection prevention and control (IPC), which builds on almost two decades of efforts led by WHO and partners. The strategy provides Member States with strategic directions to substantially reduce the ongoing risk of health care-associated infections (HAIs), including those that exhibit antimicrobial resistance. HAIs are among the most frequent adverse events occurring in the context of health service delivery. The COVID-19 pandemic and recent major disease outbreaks such as Ebola virus disease, the Middle East respiratory syndrome and the Sudan virus disease have clearly exposed the existing gaps in IPC programmes in all countries.
translations.reference: Mkutano wa Sabini na sita wa afya Duniani - Taarifa ya kila siku: 27 Mei 2023. Mkakati wa kwanza wa kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi, mkutano wa afya Ulimwenguni umekubaliana leo kuhusu mkakati wa kwanza kabisa wa kimataifa wa kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi (IPC), ambao unatokana karibu miongo miwili ya juhudi zinazoongozwa na WHO na washirika. Mkakati huo unazipa nchi wanachama maelekezo ya kimkakati ya kupunguza kwa kiasi kikubwa hatari inayoendelea ya magonjwa yanayohusiana na huduma ya afya (HAIs), ikiwemo yale ambayo yanaonyesha ukinzani wa viua vijasumu. HAIs ni miongoni mwa matukio mabaya ya mara kwa mara yanatokea katika muktadha wa utoaji wa huduma za afya. Janga la UVIKO-19 na milipuko ya hivi karibuni ya magonjwa kama vile virusi vya Ebola, ugonjwa wa kupumua huko mashariki ya kati na virusi vya sudani vimefichua dhahiri mapungufu yaliyopo katika programu za IPC katika nchi zote.
translations.hypothesis:
Mkutano wa 76 wa Baraza la Afya la Dunia – Taarifa ya kila siku: Mei 27, 2023.

Mkakati wa kwanza wa kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi.

Leo, Baraza la Afya la Dunia limekubaliana juu ya mkakati wa kwanza wa kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi (IPC), ambao unatokana na juhudi za miaka takriban miwili zilizokuwa zikiendeshwa na Shirika la Afya la Dunia (WHO) na washirika wake. Mkakati huu unatoa mwelekeo wa kimkakati kwa nchi wanachama ili kupunguza sana hatari ya maambukizi yanayohusiana na huduma za afya (HAIs), ikiwa ni pamoja na yale ambayo yanaonyesha upinzani wa dawa za kuzuia maambukizi. Maambukizi haya yanayohusiana na huduma za afya ni miongoni mwa matukio mabaya yanayotokea mara kwa mara katika utoaji wa huduma za afya. Janga la COVID-19 na mlipuko mkuu wa hivi karibuni wa magonjwa kama vile ugonjwa wa virusi vya Ebola, ugonjwa wa mapafu wa Mashariki ya Kati, na ugonjwa wa virusi vya Sudan, yameonyesha wazi pengo zilizopo katika programu za IPC katika nchi zote.

translations.source: The strategy sets a clear vision: by 2030, everyone accessing or providing health care is safe from associated infections. Its three key objectives are: to prevent infection in health care; act to ensure IPC programmes are in place and implemented; and coordinate IPC activities with other areas and sectors. The strategy is focused on any setting where health care is delivered, across the health system; it is based on the principle of clean and safe care as a fundamental component of the right to health, which is equity driven, and which should ensure accountability and sustainability. The global IPC strategy will be complemented by, and used in conjunction with, an associated global action plan and monitoring framework, that will be developed in 2023–2024. Related document EB152/9 - Draft global strategy on infection prevention and control, Executive summary Report by the Director-General
translations.reference: Mkakati unaweka dira wazi: Ifikapo 2030, kila mtu anaepata au kutoa huduma ya afya yupo salama kutokana na maambukizi yanayohusiana. Malengo yake makuu matatu ni: Kuzuia maambukizi katika huduma ya afya; kuchukua hatua ili kuhakikisha mipango ya IPC ipo na inatekelezwa; na kuratibu shughuli za IPC na maeneo na sekta nyinginezo. Mkakati unalenga katika mazingira yoyote ambapo huduma ya afya inatolewa, katika mfumo wa afya; inatokana na kanuni ya utunzaji safi na salama kama sehemu ya msingi ya haki ya afya, ambayo inaendeshwa na usawa, na ambayo inapaswa kuhakikisha uwajibikaji na uendelevu. Mkakati wa kimataifa wa IPC utakamilishwa na, na kutumiwa pamoja na, mpango wa utekelezaji wa kimataifa unaohusishwa na mfumo wa ufuatiliaji, ambao utatengenezwa mwaka 2023- 2024. Hati inayohusiana EB 152/9- Rasimu ya mkakati wa kimataifa juu ya kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi, muhtasari wa mtendaji ripoti ya mkurugenzi mkuu
translations.hypothesis: Mkakati huu unaweka malengo wazi: ifikapo mwaka wa 2030, kila mtu anayepokea au kutoa huduma za afya atakuwa salama kutokana na maambukizi yanayohusiana. Lengo lake kuu ni tatu: kuzuia maambukizi katika huduma za afya; kuchukua hatua kuhakikisha programu za udhibiti wa maambukizi zimeanzishwa na zinafanywa; na kuunganisha shughuli za udhibiti wa maambukizi na maeneo na sekta nyingine. Mkakati huu unalenga kila eneo ambapo huduma za afya zinatolewa, katika mfumo mzima wa afya; unategemea kanuni ya utunzaji safi na salama kama sehemu muhimu ya haki ya afya, ambayo inazingatia usawa, na ambayo inapaswa kuhakikisha uwajibikaji na uendelevu. Mkakati wa kimataifa wa udhibiti wa maambukizi utaunganishwa na, na utatumika pamoja na, mpango wa kimataifa unaohusiana na hatua na mfumo wa ufuatiliaji, ambao utatengenezwa kati ya mwaka wa 2023 na 2024. Hati husika: EB152/9 - Rasimu ya mkakati wa kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi, Muhtasari wa ripoti ya Mkurugenzi Mkuu.

translations.source: WHO's work on infection prevention and control Historic resolution paves the way for strengthening rehabilitation in health systemsToday the World Health Assembly agreed a landmark resolution on strengthening rehabilitation in health systems. Rehabilitation services play a key role in ensuring the enjoyment of human rights including the highest attainable standard of physical and mental health. It also promotes sexual and reproductive health, and recognizes the right to work and the right to education. This landmark resolution aims to address the challenges in rehabilitation such as the need to: increase awareness of rehabilitation when setting health priorities and research agendas, allocating resources, promoting cooperation and enabling technology transfer;
translations.reference: Kazi ya WHO kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi Azimio la kihistoria linatayarisha njia ya kuimarisha urekebishaji katika mifumo ya afya leo. Baraza la afya la ulimwenguni limekubali Azimio muhimu kuhusu kuimarisha urekebishaji katika mifumo ya afya. Huduma za urekebishaji zina jukumu muhimu katika kuhakikisha kufurahia haki za binadamu ikiwa ni pamoja na kiwango cha juu kinachoweza kufikiwa cha afya ya kimwili na kiakili. Pia inakuza afya ya uzazi na jinsia, na inatambua haki ya kufanya kazi na haki ya kupata elimu. Azimio hili muhimu linalenga kutatua changamoto katika ukarabati kama vile haja ya: Kuongeza ufahamu wa ukarabati wakati wa kuweka vipaumbele vya afya na ajenda za utafiti, ugawaji wa rasilimali, kukuza ushirikiano na kuwezesha uhamisho wa teknolojia.;
translations.hypothesis: Kazi ya Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) katika kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi. Azimio muhimu linasaidia kuimarisha huduma za tiba katika mifumo ya afya. Leo, Baraza la Afya la Dunia limepitisha azimio muhimu kuhusu kuimarisha huduma za tiba katika mifumo ya afya. Huduma za tiba zina jukumu muhimu katika kuhakikisha kwamba watu wanapata haki zao, ikiwa ni pamoja na afya bora ya kimwili na ya akili. Pia, huduma hizi zinakuza afya ya uzazi na kingono, na zinatambua haki ya kufanya kazi na haki ya elimu. Azimio hili muhimu linakusudia kushughulikia changamoto zinazokabili huduma za tiba, kama vile: kuongeza ufahamu kuhusu umuhimu wa tiba wakati wa kuweka vipaumbele vya afya na mipango ya utafiti, kutenga rasilimali, kukuza ushirikiano, na kuwezesha uhamishaji wa teknolojia.

translations.source: ensure countries are better equipped to respond to the sudden increase in rehabilitation needs including assistive technology due to health emergencies; ensure persons in marginalized and vulnerable situations have access to affordable, quality and appropriate rehabilitation services including assistive technology; avoid high out-of-pocket costs for people to access rehabilitation services and assistive technology that can cause financial hardships; and address the current insufficient level of rehabilitation workforce to serve the needs of the population. The resolution lists a range of actions to be taken by the WHO Secretariat such as:
translations.reference: Kuhakikisha nchi zina vifaa vya kutosha kukabiliana na ongezeko la ghafla la mahitaji ya ukarabati ikijumuisha teknolojia ya usaidizi kutokana na dharura za kiafya.; Kuhakikisha watu walio katika mazingira magumu na walio katika mazingira hatarishi wanapata huduma nafuu, bora na zinazofaa na ukarabati ikiwa ni pamoja na teknolojia saidizi; Kuepuka gharama kubwa za nje kwa watu kupata huduma za ukarabati na teknolojia saidizi ambayo inaweza kusababisha ugumu wa kifedha; na Kushughulikia kiwango cha sasa kisichotosha cha wafanyakazi wa ukarabati kuhudumia mahitaji ya watu. Azimio hilo linaorodhesha anuwai ya hatua zinazopaswa kuchukuliwa na sekretarieti ya WHO kama vile:
translations.hypothesis: Hakikisha kwamba nchi zina uwezo bora wa kukabiliana na ongezeko la ghafla la mahitaji ya tiba na urekebishaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na teknolojia ya kusaidia, kutokana na dharura za kiafya; hakikisha kwamba watu walio katika hali ambazo wamepingwa na wanaoishi katika hali hatari wana upataji wa huduma za tiba na urekebishaji za bei nafuu, za ubora na zinazofaa, ikiwa ni pamoja na teknolojia ya kusaidia; epuka gharama kubwa ambazo watu wanazoweza kuhitaji ili kupata huduma za tiba na urekebishaji na teknolojia ya kusaidia, ambazo zinaweza kusababisha shida za kifedha; na kushughulikia kiwango cha sasa cha upungufu wa wafanyakazi katika sekta ya tiba na urekebishaji ili kuendeleza mahitaji ya idadi ya watu. Azimizo hilo yanaorodhesha hatua mbalimbali ambazo Ofisi Kuu ya WHO itachukua, kama vile:

translations.source: publishing a baseline report by the end of 2026 with information on the capacity of Member States to respond to rehabilitation needs; developing targets and indicators for effective coverage of rehabilitation services by 2030; ensuring appropriate resources are allocated at WHO to support Member States in implementing technical guidance and resources; and supporting Member States to integrate rehabilitation and assistive technology in their emergency preparedness and response plan. The WHO Secretariat will report on progress in the implementation of this resolution to the Health Assembly in 2026, 2028 and 2030.
translations.reference: Kuchapisha ripoti ya msingi kufikia mwishoni mwa 2026 yenye taarifa juu ya uwezo wa nchi wanachama kujibu mahitaji ya urekebishaji; Kuendeleza shabaha na viashirio kwa ajili ya utoaji wa huduma bora za ukarabati ifikapo 2030; Kuhakikisha rasilimali zinazofaa zimelengwa katika WHO kusaidia nchi wanachama katika kutekeleza muongozo wa kiufundi na rasilimali; na kusaidia nchi wanachama kujumuisha urekebishaji na teknolojia ya usaidizi katika maandalizi yao ya dharura na mpango wa kukabiliana. Sekretarieti ya WHO itatoa taarifa kuhusu maendeleo katika utekelezaji wa Azimio hili kwa Baraza la Afya mwaka 2026, 2028 na 2030.
translations.hypothesis: Kutayarisha ripoti ya msingi ifikapo mwisho wa mwaka wa 2026, ambayo itatoa taarifa kuhusu uwezo wa nchi wanachama wa kutoa huduma za urekebishaji; kuweka malengo na viashiria vya kuhakikisha kuwa huduma za urekebishaji zinapatikana kwa ufanisi ifikapo mwaka wa 2030; kuhakikisha kuwa rasilimali zinazofaa zinatega katika Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) ili kusaidia nchi wanachama katika utekelezaji wa mwongozo na rasilimali za kiufundi; na kusaidia nchi wanachama kuunganisha huduma za urekebishaji na teknolojia za kusaidia katika mipango yao ya utayaraji na utendaji katika hali za dharura. Kanuni ya WHO itatoa ripoti kuhusu maendeleo katika utekelezaji wa azimizo hili kwa Mkutano wa Afya mwaka wa 2026, 2028 na 2030.

translations.source: Related document: EB152/8 - Strengthening rehabilitation in health systems, Report by the Director-General Related link WHO's work on rehabilitation The items above were discussed as part of the document A76/7 Rev.1 - Consolidated report by the Director-General. Resolution on strengthening diagnostics capacity
translations.reference: Hati inayohusiana: EB 152/ 8 - Kuimarisha ukarabati katika mfumo ya afya, ripoti ya mkurugenzi mkuu. Kiunganishi kinachohusiana Kazi ya WHO kuhusu ukarabati Mambo yaliyopo hapo juu yalijadiliwa kama sehemu ya waraka A76/7 Rev.1 - Ripoti jumuishi ya mkurugenzi mkuu. Azimio la kuimarisha uwezo wa uchunguzi
translations.hypothesis:
Hati inayohusiana: EB152/8 - Kuimarisha utoaji wa huduma za uponyaji katika mifumo ya afya, Ripoti ya Mkurugenzi Mkuu.
Kiungo kinachohusiana: Kazi za Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) kuhusu utoaji wa huduma za uponyaji.
Mambo yaliyotajwa hapo juu yilionekana katika hati ya A76/7 Rev.1 - Ripoti iliyounganishwa ya Mkurugenzi Mkuu.
Azimio kuhusu kuimarisha uwezo wa utambuzi.

translations.source: On 26 May Member States endorsed a resolution to strengthen diagnostics capacity in countres and to improve access to diagnostic services. The broad ranging resolution recognizes that diagnostic services are vital for the prevention, surveillance, diagnosis, case management, monitoring and treatment of communicable, noncommunicable, neglected tropical and rare diseases, injuries, and disabilities. Diagnostics allow for the precise identification of diseases, and therefore the timely initiation of the correct treatments for better health outcomes. The resolution considers the full spectrum of “diagnostics”, thus including both “in vitro” laboratory tests e.g. rapid diagnostic tests and polymerase chain reaction (PCR) and “non in vitro” diagnostics e.g. imaging or blood pressure measurement devices. It covers actions for research and development, manufacturing (including local production and technology transfer), regulation, selection and procurement, awareness, advocacy and addressing access barriers in general.
translations.reference: Tarehe 26 Mei nchi wanachama ziliidhinisha Azimio la kuimarisha uwezo wa uchunguzi katika nchi na kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za uchunguzi. Azimio pana linatambua kuwa huduma za uchunguzi ni muhimu kwa ajili ya kuzuia, ufuatiliaji na uchunguzi, udhibiti wa visa, ufuatiliaji na matibabu ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza, yasiyo ya kuambukiza, yaliyopuuzwa na ya kawaida, majeraha na ulemavu. Uchunguzi huruhusu utambuzi sahihi wa magonjwa, na hivyo kuanzishwa kwa matibabu sahihi kwa matokeo bora ya kiafya kwa wakati unaofaa. Azimio hilo linazingatia wigo kamili wa "Uchunguzi", hivyo kujumuisha vipimo vya maabara vya "in vitro" m.f vipimo vya haraka vya uchunguzi na mmenyuko wa mnyororo wa Polymerase (PCR) na uchunguzi wa "non in vitro" m.f picha au vifaa vya kupima shinikizo la damu. Linashughulikia hatua za utafiti na maendeleo, utengenezaji (ikijumuishi uzalishaji wa ndani na uhamishaji wa teknolojia), udhibiti, uteuzi na ununuzi, uhamishaji, utetezi na kushughulikia vizuizi vya ufikiaji kwa ujumla.
translations.hypothesis: Mnamo tarehe 26 Mei, nchi wanachama zilikubali azimio la kuimarisha uwezo wa utambuzi wa magonjwa katika nchi na kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za utambuzi.
