Azimio hilo, ambalo linahusu masuala mengi, linatambua kwamba huduma za utambuzi ni muhimu kwa ajili ya kuzuia, kufuatilia, kutambua, kusimamia, kufuatilia na kutibu magonjwa yanayoenezwa, magonjwa yasiyoenezwa, magonjwa ya kaskazini yaliyosahaulika na magonjwa adimu, majeraha na ulemavu. Utambuzi wa magonjwa huruhusu utambuzi sahihi wa magonjwa, na hivyo kuwezesha kuanza matibabu sahihi kwa wakati ili kupata matokeo bora ya afya. Azimio hilo linazingatia kila aina ya "utambuzi," na hivyo kujumuisha vipimo vya maabara kama vile vipimo vya haraka na teknolojia ya mmenyuko wa minyororo (PCR), na pia utambuzi usiofanyika katika maabara, kama vile vifaa vya uchunguzi au vifaa vya kupima shinikizo la damu. Linashughulikia hatua za utafiti na maendeleo, utengenezaji (pamoja na uzalishaji wa ndani na uhamishaji wa teknolojia), udhibiti, uteuzi na ununuzi, uhamasishaji, utetezi na kuondoa vikwazo vya upatikanaji kwa ujumla.

translations.source: The implementation of the resolution will build and expand on previous and current work at three levels of WHO to help countries improve access to diagnostic services. The Secretariat is requested to report on implementation progress in 2025. Related document EB152/6 Strengthening diagnostics capacity
translations.reference: Utekelezaji wa Azimio hilo utajenga na kupanua kasi ya awali na ya sasa katika ngazi tatu za WHO ili kuzisaidia nchi kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za uchunguzi. Sekretarieti imeombwa kutoa taarifa ya maendeleo ya utekelezaji mwaka 2025. Hati inayohusiana EB 152/6 Kuimarisha uwezo wa uchunguzi
translations.hypothesis: Utekelezaji wa azimio hilo utawezesha kuimarisha na kupanua kazi iliyokuwa ikifanywa hapo awali na ile inayofanywa sasa katika ngazi tatu za Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), ili kusaidia nchi kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za utambuzi. Kamati Kuu inatakiwa kutoa ripoti kuhusu maendeleo ya utekelezaji mwaka wa 2025. Hati husika: EB152/6, Kuimarisha uwezo wa utambuzi.

translations.source: Awards for outstanding contributions to public health presented during the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly During a moving ceremony at the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly in Geneva, awards were presented to persons and institutions from around the world for their outstanding contributions to public health. “The 2023 public health prizes and awards celebrate people who have made a significant contribution to global health, and whose work has extended far beyond the call of normal duty,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “At a time when the world faces many challenges, each is an inspiration and a reminder of the progress that can be made to improve health and wellbeing for all.” The call for nominations of candidates for each prize is sent out each year after closure of the World Health Assembly.
translations.reference: Tuzo za michango bora kwa afya ya umma ilitolewa wakati wa mkutano wa sabini na Sita wa afya Duniani. Wakati wa hafla ya kusisimua katika mkutano wa Sabini na Sita wa afya Ulimwenguni huko Jeniva, tuzo zilitolewa kwa watu na taasisi kutoka kote Ulimwenguni kwa michango yao bora kwa afya ya umma. "Zawadi na Tuzo za heshima za afya ya umma za 2023 zinaadhimisha watu ambao wametoa mchango mkubwa kwa afya ya kimataifa, na ambazo kazi yao imeenea zaidi ya wito wa kawaida", alisema Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO. "Wakati ambapo unakabiliwa na changamoto nyingi, kila mmoja ni msukumo na ukumbusho wa maendeleo ambayo yanaweza kufanywa kuboresha afya na ustawi kwa wote" Wito wa uteuzi wa wagombeaji kwa kila zawadi hutumwa kila mwaka baada ya kufungwa kwa mkutano wa afya Duniani.
translations.hypothesis: Zawadi za mchango mkubwa katika afya ya umma zilitolewa wakati wa Mkutano wa Hamsini na Sita wa Shirika la Afya Duniani. Katika sherehe ya kusisimua iliyofanyika wakati wa Mkutano wa Hamsini na Sita wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) mjini Geneva, watu na taasisi kutoka kote ulimwenguni walipokea zawadi kwa mchango wao mkubwa katika afya ya umma. "Zawadi na tuzo za afya ya umma za mwaka wa 2023 huadhimisha watu ambao wamefanya mchango mkubwa katika afya ya kimataifa, na ambao kazi zao zimeenea zaidi ya kile ambacho kawaida kinatarajiwa," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO. "Katika wakati ambapo dunia inakabiliwa na changamoto nyingi, kila mmoja wao ni chanzo cha msukumo na ukumbusho wa maendeleo ambayo yanaweza kufanikishwa ili kuboresha afya na ustawi kwa wote." Mwaliko wa kuwasilisha majina ya wagombea kwa kila tuzo hutumwa kila mwaka baada ya kumalizika kwa Mkutano wa Shirika la Afya Duniani.

translations.source: Nominations can be made by national health administrations of a WHO Member State and by any former recipient of the prizes. At its 152nd session in January 2023, the Executive Board designated the 2023 winners of the prizes, on the basis of proposals made by the dedicated selection panels for each prize. The seven laureates have been selected to celebrate their unique role and contribution for public health in their countries and globally. They come from four WHO Regions – for the Americas, the Eastern-Mediterranean, South-East Asia and the Western Pacific. Five winners are individuals, and three among them are women.
translations.reference: Uteuzi unaweza kufanywa na tawala za kitaifa za afya za nchi mwanachama wa WHO na mpokeaji yeyote wa zamani wa zawadi. Katika kikao chake cha 152 mnamo Januari 2023, halmashauri kuu iliteua washindi wa 2023 wa Tuzo, kwa msingi wa mapendekezo yaliyotolewa na jopo maalumu la utetezi kwa kila Tuzo. Washindi saba wamechaguliwa kusherekea jukumu na mchango wao wa kipekee kwa afya ya umma kwa nchi zao na kimataifa. Wanatoka kanda nne za WHO. Amerika, Mashariki mwa Mediterania, Asia ya kusini- Mashariki na Pasifiki Magharibi. Washindi watano ni watu binafsi na watatu kati yao ni wanawake.
translations.hypothesis: Mapendekezo yanaweza kufanywa na taasisi za afya za kitaifa za nchi ambazo ni wanachama wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), na pia na watu wanyonge wote wa tuzo hizo hapo awali. Katika kikao chake cha 152 mwezi Januari mwaka wa 2023, Bodi ya Utendaji ilichagua washindi wa tuzo hizo za mwaka wa 2023, kulingana na mapendekezo yaliyowasilishwa na kamati za uteuzi zilizoteuliwa kwa kila tuzo. Watu saba waliochaguliwa wamechaguliwa ili kuadhimisha jukumu na mchango wao wa kipekee katika afya ya umma katika nchi zao na ulimwenguni. Wametoka katika maeneo manne ya WHO – Amerika, Mashariki ya Mediterania, Asia ya Kusini-Mashariki, na Pasifiki ya Magharibi. Washindi watano ni watu binafsi, na kati yao, watatu ni wanawake.

translations.source: In addition, the two institutions that have received a 2023 award are led by women. Winners of the 2023 prizes Sasakawa Health PrizeThe 2023 laureates: The Nick Simons Institute from Nepal, and Professor Vichai Tienthavorn from Thailand The Nick Simons Institute is a nongovernmental organization aiming to improve health care in the rural areas of Nepal. Working closely with the Ministry of Health and Population of Nepal, the Institute has trained 7000 medical professionals (such as midwives and anaesthetic assistants) in rural areas, who now provide most-needed services to local communities in the absence of a sufficient pool of general practitioners and specialists. The Institute has supplied essential equipment and provided additional health personnel to alleviate the lack of medical professionals in 44 hospitals, and supported the design of an action plan for better quality services in more than 100 rural hospitals.
translations.reference: Aidha, taasisi hizo mbili ambazo zimepokea tuzo ya 2023 zinaongozwa nawanawake. Washindi wa Tuzo za 2023 za Sasakawa Health Prize washindi wa 2023: Taasisi ya Nick Simons kutoka Nepal, na profesa Vichai Tienthavorn kutoka Thailand Taasisi ya Nick Simons ni shirika lisilo la kiserikali linalolenga kuboresha huduma za afya katika maeneo ya vijijini ya Nepali. Ikifanya kazi kwa karibu na wizara ya afya na idadi ya watu ya Nepali, taasisi imetoa mafunzo kwa wataalamu wa matibabu 7000 (kama vile wakunga, na wasaidizi wa ganzi) katika maeneo yote ya vijijini, ambao sasa wanatoa huduma zinazohitajika zaidi kwa jamii za wenyeji bila kukosekana kwa kundi la kutosha la jumla la watendaji na wataalamu. Taasisi imetoa vifaa muhimu na kutoa watumishi wa ziada wa afya ili kupunguza ukosefu wa wataalamu wa matibabu katika hospitali 44, na kuunga mkono uundaji wa mpango kazi wa huduma bora zaidi katika hospitali zaidi ya 100 za vijijini.
translations.hypothesis: Zaidi ya hayo, taasisi hizo mbili ambazo zimepokea tuzo ya mwaka wa 2023 zinaongozwa na wanawake. Washindi wa tuzo za mwaka wa 2023, Tuzo ya Afya ya Sasakawa: Ni Taasisi ya Nick Simons kutoka Nepal, na Profesa Vichai Tienthavorn kutoka Thailand. Taasisi ya Nick Simons ni shirika lisilo la kiserikali ambalo lina lengo la kuboresha huduma za afya katika maeneo ya vijijini nchini Nepal. Kwa kushirikiana kwa karibu na Wizara ya Afya na Idara ya Watu ya Nepal, taasisi hiyo imewafunza wataalamu 7,000 wa afya (kama vile wajawazito na wasaidizi wa utunzaji wa wagonjwa) katika maeneo ya vijijini, ambao sasa wanatoa huduma muhimu kwa jamii za eneo hilo, hasa kwa kuwa hakuna idadi ya kutosha ya madaktari wa jumla na wataalamu wengine. Taasisi hiyo imetoa vifaa muhimu na imeongeza idadi ya wafanyakazi wa afya ili kupunguza upungufu wa wataalamu wa afya katika hospitali 44, na imesaidia katika kuandaa mpango wa hatua ili kuboresha ubora wa huduma katika zaidi ya hospitali 100 za eneo la vijijini.

translations.source: The Institute also conducts research and advocacy activities to shape perceptions and influence policies that affect rural health workers in Nepal. Professor Vichai Tienthavorn is President of the Praboromarajchanok Institute at the Ministry of Public Health of Thailand. One of the nation-wide initiatives he has led is an innovative health promotion policy to help address thalassemia, with his work resulting in the adoption of an effective national policy for thalassemia prevention and control. He also designed an effective communications tool and screening method to help citizens to adapt their behaviours in order to prevent and control diabetes and hypertension. As a result of this work, a national policy was adopted with significant positive impact on the country’s disease burden.
translations.reference: Pia taasisi hufanya shughuli za utafiti na utetezi ili kuunda mitazamo na kuathiri sera zinazoathiri wahudumu wa afya vijijini nchini Nepali. Profes Vichai Tienthavorn ni Rais wa taasisi ya Praboromarajchanok katika wizara ya afya ya umma ya Thailand. Moja wapo ya mipango ya kitaifa ambayo ameoiongoza ni sera bunifu ya kukuza afya ili kusaidia kushughulikia thalassemia, na kazi yake ikisababishwa kupitishwa kwa sera madhubuti ya kitaifa ya kuzuia na kudhibiti thelassemia. Pia alibuni chombo madhubuti cha mawasiliano na njia ya uchunguzi ili kuwasaidia wananchi kurekebisha tabia zao ili kuzuia na kudhibiti kisukari na shinikizo la damu. Kama matokeo ya kazi hii, sera ya kitaifa ilipitishwa yenye matokeo chanya kwa mzigo wa magonjwa nchini.
translations.hypothesis: Taasisi hiyo pia hufanya utafiti na shughuli za utetezi ili kubadilisha mitazamo na kuathiri sera zinazohusu wafanyakazi wa afya wanaofanya kazi katika maeneo ya vijijini nchini Nepal. Profesa Vichai Tienthavorn ndiye Rais wa Taasisi ya Praboromarajchanok iliyoko Wizara ya Afya ya Thailand. Moja ya mipango ya kitaifa ambayo ameuongoza ni sera mpya ya kukuza afya ili kusaidia kukabiliana na ugonjwa wa thalassemia, na kazi yake imesababisha kupitishwa kwa sera ya kitaifa yenye ufanisi ya kuzuia na kudhibiti ugonjwa huo. Pia, amebuni zana bora ya mawasiliano na njia ya uchunguzi ili kuwasaidia wananchi kubadilisha tabia zao ili kuzuia na kudhibiti ugonjwa wa kisukari na shinikizo la damu. Kutokana na kazi hiyo, sera ya kitaifa ilipitishwa ambayo ilikuwa na athari nzuri kubwa kwa afya ya nchi.

translations.source: Professor Tienthavorn also played an essential role in addressing the challenge of uneven distribution of the health workforce, especially in border and rural areas of Thailand. He led the establishment of partnerships with village schools to recruit high-school students, train them and help them settle back locally after having accomplished an accelerated medical curriculum. United Arab Emirates Health Foundation Prize2023 award laureate: Dr Maria Asuncion Silvestre from the PhilippinesIn addition to being a renowned clinician and researcher, Dr Maria Asuncion Silvestre is a passionate advocate for exclusive breastfeeding and the founder of Kalusugan ng Mag-Ina (Health of Mother and Child) – a Philippine non-governmental organization. Dr Silvestre has leveraged her experience as a community practitioner to conduct research and design a protocol to help improve the health of mothers and newborns. The pioneering protocol she created describes a simple set of actions to be undertaken by health workers attending a mother during delivery and her newborn after birth.
translations.reference: Profesa Tienthavorn pia alichukua jukumu muhimu katika kushughulikia changamoto ya usambazaji usio sawa wa wahudumu wa afya, hususani maeneo ya mipakani na vijijini ya Thailand. Aliongoza kuanzishwa kwa ushirikiano na shule za vijijini ili kuajiri wanafunzi wa shule za upili, kuwafundisha na kuwasaidia kutulia ndani baada ya kukamilisha mtaala wa matibabu ulioharakishwa. Umoja wa Falme za Kiarabu Health Foundation Tuzo ya 2023 mshindi wa Tuzo: Dk Maria Asuncion Silvestre kutoka Ufilipino pamoja na kuwa daktari na mtafiti mashuhuri, Dk Maria Asuncion Silvetre ni mtetezi mwenye shauku ya unyonyeshaji wa maziwa ya mama pekee na mwanzilishi wa Kalusugan ng Mag-Ina (Afya ya Mama na Mtoto) - shirika lisilo la kiserikali la Ufilipino. DK Silvestre ametumia uzoefu wake kama mtendaji wa jamii kufanya utafiti na kubuni itifaki ya kusaidia kuboresha afya ya mama na watoto wachanga. Itifaki ya uanzilishi aliyounda inaeleza seti rahisi ya hatua zinazopaswa kufanywa na wahudumu wa afya wanaomhudumia mama wakati wa kujifungua na mtoto wake mchanga baada ya kuzaliwa.
translations.hypothesis:
Profesa Tienthavorn pia alichukua jukumu muhimu katika kushughulikia changamoto ya usambazaji usawa wa wafanyakazi wa afya, hasa katika maeneo ya mpaka na vijijini nchini Thailand. Aliongoza katika kuunda ushirikiano na shule za vijijini ili kuajiri wanafunzi wa shule ya upili, kuwafunza, na kuwasaidia kurudi na kuishi katika maeneo yao baada ya kumaliza mafunzo ya haraka ya tiba. Tuzo ya Shirika la Afya la Falme za Kiarabu (United Arab Emirates Health Foundation Prize) ya mwaka 2023: Daktari Maria Asuncion Silvestre kutoka nchini Philippines.

Mbali na kuwa daktari na mtafiti maarufu, Daktari Maria Asuncion Silvestre ni mwanaharakati shauku kuhusu kunyonyesha watoto pekee na mwanzilishi wa Kalusugan ng Mag-Ina (Afya ya Mama na Mtoto) – shirika lisilo la kiserikali nchini Philippines. Daktari Silvestre amechukua fursa ya uzoefu wake kama mtoa huduma katika jamii ili kufanya utafiti na kuunda mpango ambao unalenga kuboresha afya ya wajawazito na watoto wachanga. Mpango huo wa kwanza ambao ameuunda unaeleza hatua rahisi ambazo wafanyakazi wa afya wanapaswa kuchukua wakati wa kusaidia mwanamke wakati wa kujifungua na mtoto wake baada ya kuzaliwa.

translations.source: This protocol, which is applicable in all resource settings, helps to bridge the health equity gap in mother-and-child care. In partnership with the national government of the Philippines as well as 17 countries in the WHO Western Pacific Region, she has played a key role in scaling up the First Embrace campaign for Early Essential Newborn Care – a set of simple WHO-recommended and cost-effective interventions. His Highness Sheikh Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah Prize for Research in Health Care for the Elderly and in Health Promotion 2023 award laureates: The National Center for Chronic and Noncommunicable Disease Control and Prevention from China; and Dr Abla Mehio Sibai from Lebanon The National Center for Chronic and Noncommunicable Disease Control and Prevention, part of the Chinese Center for Disease Control and Prevention (China CDC), has hosted a department focusing on the health of older people since 2013.
translations.reference: Itifaki hii, ambayo inatumika katika mipangilio yote ya rasilimali, inasaidia kuziba pengo la usawa wa afya katika utunzaji wa mama na mtoto. Kwa ushirikiano na serikali ya kitaifa ya Ufilipino pamoja na nchi 17 katika Kanda ya Pasifiki ya Magharibi ya WHO, amefanya jukumu muhimu katika kuongeza kampeni ya Kukumbatia kwanza kwa utunzaji muhimu wa waoto Wachanga Mapema- seti ya hatua rahisi zinazopendekezwa na WHO na za gharama nafuu. Muadhama Sheikh Sabah Al- Ahmad Al-Jaber Al- Sabah Tuzo ya utafiti kwa huduma za afya kwa wazee na ukuzaji wa afya Washindi wa tuzo za 2023: Kituo cha kitaifa cha kudhibiti na kuzuia magonjwa ya muda mrefu na yasiyoambukiza kutoka China; Dk Abla Mehio Sibai kutoka Lebanoni Kituo cha kitaifa cha kudhibiti na kuzuia magonjwa ya muda mrefu na yasiyoambukiza, ambacho ni sehemu ya kituo cha kudhibiti na kuzuia magonjwa cha China (CDC cha China), kimeandaa idara inayoangazia afya ya wazee tangu 2013.
translations.hypothesis: Itifaki hii, ambayo inaweza kutumika katika maeneo yote, husaidia kupunguza pengo la usawa katika huduma za afya kwa mama na watoto. Kwa kushirikiana na serikali ya kitaifa ya Pilipino, pamoja na nchi 17 katika eneo la Magharibi la Pasifiki la Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), amechukua jukumu muhimu katika kuongeza idadi ya watu wanaopata kampeni ya "First Embrace" inayolenga huduma za msingi za mapema kwa watoto wachanga – ambayo ni mkusanyiko wa hatua rahisi, zilizopendekezwa na WHO, na zenye gharama nafuu. Tuzo ya "His Highness Sheikh Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah" kwa utafiti katika huduma za afya za wazee na katika kukuza afya kwa mwaka wa 2023, imetolewa kwa: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Kudhibiti na Kuzuia Magonjwa ya Muda Mrefu na Yasiyo ya Kuambukiza kutoka China; na Dkt. Abla Mehio Sibai kutoka Lebanon. Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Kudhibiti na Kuzuia Magonjwa ya Muda Mrefu na Yasiyo ya Kuambukiza, ambacho ni sehemu ya Kituo cha Kudhibiti Magonjwa cha China (China CDC), kimekuwa na idara inayozingatia afya ya watu wazee tangu mwaka wa 2013.

translations.source: It delivers a broad range of programmes and activities that advance health promotion for older people, ranging from better understanding the causes of morbidity and mortality through national surveillance for noncommunicable diseases, surveys, death registries and research, to tailored programmes to promote health literacy and evidence-based policies. Initiatives include a dedicated toolkit for older people, capacity‑building of 2000 primary care staff, a health advocacy week dedicated to older people, and an innovative project to improve the mental and cognitive health of more than half a million older persons in both urban and rural areas. Dr Abla Mehio Sibai is Professor of Epidemiology and Dean of the Faculty of Health Sciences at the American University of Beirut in Lebanon. She has made an outstanding contribution to older people’s health in Lebanon and the region, developing a holistic approach to the promotion of healthy ageing. She led the innovative initiative of enrolling close to 600 older people every year at the University for Seniors at the American University of Beirut, in addition to training public health professionals.
translations.reference: Inatoa mipango na shughuli mbalimbali zinazoendeleza uimarishaji wa afya kwa wazee, kuanzia kuelewa vyema zaidi sababu za magonjwa na vifo kupitia uchunguzi wa kitaifa wa magonjwa yasiyoambukiza, tafiti, sajili za vifo na utafiti, hadi programu maalamu za kukuza ujuzi wa kiafya naushahidi- sera za msingi. Mipango ni pamoja na zana maalumu kwa ajili ya wazee, kujenga uwezo wa wafanyakazi 2000 wa huduma ya msingi, wiki ya utetezi wa afya inayotolewa kwa wazee, na mradi wa ubunifu wa kuboresha afya ya akili na uchunguzi ya wazee zaidi ya nusu milioni kwa maeneo yote ya mijini na vijijini. Dk Abla Mehio Sibai ni profesa wa epidemiolojia na mkuu wa kitivo cha sayansi ya afya katika chuo kikuu cha Marekani Beiruti nchini Lebanoni. Ametoa mchango mkubwa kwa afya ya wazee nchini Lebanoni na kanda, akiendeleza mbinu ya kukuza uzee wenye afya. Aliongoza mpango wa ubunifu kwa kuandikisha karibu wazee 600 kila mwaka katika chuo kikuu cha wazee ndani ya chuo kikuu cha Marekani cha Beiruti, pamoja na kutoa mafunzo kwa wataalamu wa afya ya umma.
translations.hypothesis: Inaendeleza programu na shughuli mbalimbali ambazo husaidia kuimarisha afya ya watu wazima, kuanzia kuelewa vizuri sababu za magonjwa na vifo kupitia mfumo wa kitaifa wa kufuatilia magonjwa yasiyoambukiza, tafiti, daftari za vifo, na utafiti, hadi programu maalum za kukuza ujuzi wa afya na sera zinazotegemea ushahidi. Mpango huu unajumuisha zana maalum kwa watu wazima, kuongeza uwezo wa wafanyakazi 2,000 wa huduma za afya za msingi, wiki ya utetezi wa afya iliyokabidhiwa watu wazima, na mradi wa kipekee wa kuboresha afya ya akili na uwezo wa watu wazima zaidi ya nusu milioni katika maeneo ya mijini na vijijini. Daktari Abla Mehio Sibai ni Profesa wa Epidemiolojia na Dekani wa Shule ya Sayansi za Afya katika Chuo Kikuu cha Kimarekani cha Beirut nchini Lebanon. Amefanya mchango mkubwa katika afya ya watu wazima nchini Lebanon na katika eneo hilo, akibuni mfumo kamili wa kukuza uzee wenye afya. Aliongoza mpango wa kipekee wa kuandikisha takriban watu 600 wazima kila mwaka katika Chuo cha Watu Wazima cha Chuo Kikuu cha Kimarekani cha Beirut, pamoja na kutoa mafunzo kwa wataalamu wa afya ya umma.

translations.source: She co-led the landmark WHO Global Burden of Disease Study in Lebanon (2000) and conducted the first national survey on noncommunicable diseases and risk factors, informing advocacy, policy-making and programme planning for health promotion. Building on her numerous achievements, Dr Sibai has developed the “National Strategy for Older Persons” in Lebanon (2020–2030). Dr Sibai also created the Arab Ageing Network and the Centre for Studies on Ageing to create links between research and policy at the national, regional and international levels. Dr LEE Jong-wook Memorial Prize for Public Health 2023 award laureate: Dr Jorge Francisco Meneses from Guatemala
translations.reference: Aliongoza utafiti wa mzigo wa magonjwa ulimwenguni wa WHO nchini Lebanoni (2000) na kufanya utafiti wa kwanza wa kitaifa kuhusu magonjwa yasiyoambukiza na mambo hatarishi, kuarifu utetezi, utungaji sera na upangaji wa programu kwa ajili ya kukuza afya. Kwa kuzingatia mafanikio yake mengi, Dk Sibai ameandaa "mkakati wa kitaifa kwa wazee" nchini Lebanoni (2020-2023). Dk Sibai pia aliunda mtandao wa wazee wa kiarabu na kituo cha mafunzo ya uzeeni ili kuunda uhusiano kati ya utafiti na sera katika ngazi ya kitaifa, kikanda na kimataifa. Dk LEE Jong-Wook tuzo ya ukumbusho ya afya ya umma Mshindi wa tuzo ya 2023: Dk Jorge Francisco Meneses kutoka Guatemala.
translations.hypothesis: Aliongoza pamoja utafiti muhimu wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) kuhusu mzigo wa magonjwa ulimwenguni katika Lebanon (mwaka wa 2000), na pia alifanya utafiti wa kitaifa wa kwanza kuhusu magonjwa ambayo hayasambazwi kupitia kuambukiza na mambo yanayoweza kusababisha magonjwa, ambayo yaliwezesha utetezi, utayarishaji wa sera, na mipango ya programu za kukuza afya. Akijenga juu ya mafanikio yake mengi, Dkt. Sibai ametengeneza "Mkakati wa Kitaifa wa Watu Wazima" katika Lebanon (kwa kipindi cha 2020–2030). Dkt. Sibai pia amekusudia kuunda Mtandao wa Watu Wazima wa Kiarabu na Kituo cha Utafiti kuhusu Uzee ili kuunganisha utafiti na sera katika ngazi za kitaifa, kikanda, na kimataifa. Mshindi wa Tuzo ya Kumbukumbu ya Dkt. LEE Jong-wook ya Afya ya Umma kwa mwaka wa 2023: Dkt. Jorge Francisco Meneses kutoka Guatemala.

translations.source: Having promoted community participation in hospital care for over 20 years, Dr Jorge Francisco Meneses set up community-based committees focusing on the safety and satisfaction of patients, their families and the community. Given the positive impact of his work in improving the quality of patient care, the model of ethical and patient-centred care that he designed was scaled up at the national level. Nowadays, as the national supervisor for hospitals of Guatemala, he has designed a programme to improve the quality of services for hospital patients and their families. Dr Meneses has recently coordinated an innovative pilot project in the Guatemala South Health Area to build the first national integrated network of health services, with a priority focus on underserved communities. His work led to the adoption of a national strategy of integrated health services networks, the first in Central America.
translations.reference: Baada ya kukuza ushiriki wa jamii katika huduma za hospitali kwa zaidi ya miaka 20, Dk Jorge Francisco Meneses alianzisha kamati za kijamii zinazozingatia usalama na kuridhika kwa wagonjwa, familia zao na jamii. kutokana na matokeo chanya ya kazi yake katika kuboresha ubora wa huduma kwa wagonjwa, kielelezo cha utunzaji wa kimaadili na mgonjwa alioubuni ulikuzwa katika ngazi ya kitaifa. Siku hizi, akiwa kama msimamizi wa kitaifa wa hospitali za Guatemala, amebuni mpango wa kuboresha ubora wa huduma kwa wagonjwa wa hospitlini na familia zao. Dk Meneses hivi karibuni ameratibu mradi wa majaribio wa kibunifu katika eneo la afya la Guatemala kusini ili kujenga mtandao wa kwanza wa kitaifa wa huduma ya afya, kwa kuzingatia kipaumbele kwa jamii ambazo hazijahudumiwa. Kazi yake ilisababisha kupitishwa kwa mkakati wa kitaifa wa mitandao ya huduma ya Afya jumuishi, ya kwanza huko Amerika ya kati.
translations.hypothesis: Baada ya kufanya juhudi za kuhamasisha ushiriki wa jamii katika huduma za hospitali kwa zaidi ya miaka 20, Dkt. Jorge Francisco Meneses aliunda kamati za jamii ambazo zilizingatia usalama na kuridhika kwa wagonjwa, familia zao na jamii kwa ujumla. Kutokana na athari nzuri ya kazi yake katika kuboresha ubora wa huduma kwa wagonjwa, mfumo wa huduma za kimaadili na unaozingatia mgonjwa ambao aliunda ulipanuliwa katika ngazi ya kitaifa. Hivi sasa, kama msimamizi wa kitaifa wa hospitali za Guatemala, amebuni programu ili kuboresha ubora wa huduma kwa wagonjwa wa hospitali na familia zao. Hivi karibuni, Dkt. Meneses amesimamia mradi wa majaribio wa kipekee katika eneo la afya la Kusini mwa Guatemala ili kuunda mtandao wa kitaifa wa kwanza wa huduma za afya, ukizingatia hasa jamii ambazo hazipati huduma za kutosha. Kazi yake ilisababisha utekelezaji wa mkakati wa kitaifa wa mitandao ya huduma za afya, ambao ulikuwa wa kwanza katika Amerika ya Kati.

translations.source: Nelson Mandela Award for Health Promotion 2023 award laureate: Dr Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma from Bahrain In addition to being the Chief Executive Officer of the National Health Regulatory Authority of Bahrain, Dr Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma has held various leadership positions in government and academic institutions in her country. Dr Al Jalahma has played a major role in the development of numerous national and region-wide strategies and plans in the field of primary healthcare, child and adolescent health, chronic diseases and antismoking. In her current role, Dr Al Jalahma has led major successful initiatives, such as the national accreditation system for health institutions, the digital transformation of the National Health Regulatory Authority, and several initiatives leading to increased efficiency and excellence in the health sector.
translations.reference: Tuzo ya Nelson mandela ya kukuza afya Mshindi wa tuzo ya 2023: Dk Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma kutoka Bahrain Pamoja na kuwa afisa mtendaji mkuu wa mamlaka ya kitaifa ya udhibiti wa afya ya Bahrain, Dk Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma ameshika nyadhifa mbalimbali za uongozi katika serikali na taasisi za kitaaluma nchini mwake. Dk Al Jalahma amekuwa na mchango mkubwa katika ukuzaji wa mikakati na mipango mingi ya kitaifa na kikanda katika nyanja ya afya ya msingi, afya ya watoto na vijana, magonjwa sugu na uachaji wa uvutaji sigara. Katika nafasi yake ya sasa, Dk A Jalahma ameongoza mipango mikuu yenye mafanikio, kama vile mfumo wa kitaifa wa ithibati kwa taasisi za afya, na mipango kadhaa inayosababisha kuongezeka kwa fursa na ubora katika sekta ya afya.
translations.hypothesis: Tuzo ya Nelson Mandela ya Utangazaji Afya ya mwaka wa 2023 imetolewa kwa Dk. Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma kutoka Bahrain. Mbali na kuwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Udhibiti wa Afya ya Bahrain, Dk. Al Jalahma ameshikilia nafasi mbalimbali za uongozi katika taasisi za serikali na za kitaaluma nchini mwake. Dk. Al Jalahma amechukua jukumu kubwa katika maendeleo ya mikakati na mipango mbalimbali ya kitaifa na ya kikanda katika uwanja wa huduma za afya za msingi, afya ya watoto na vijana, magonjwa sugu, na kupambana na utumiaji wa sigara. Katika nafasi yake ya sasa, Dk. Al Jalahma amelekeza mipango mikuu yenye mafanikio, kama vile mfumo wa kitaifa wa uthibitisho wa taasisi za afya, mabadiliko ya kidijitali ya Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Udhibiti wa Afya, na mipango kadhaa ambayo imesababisha ongezeko la ufanisi na ubora katika sekta ya afya.

translations.source: She is also a prominent voice for health promotion across various channels throughout all countries of the Gulf Cooperation Council.
translations.reference: Pia yeye ni mtu maarufu kwa ajili kukuza afya katika njia mbalimbali katika nchi zote za Baraza la ushirikiano la Ghuba.
translations.hypothesis: Yeye pia ni msemaji muhimu katika kukuza afya kupitia njia mbalimbali katika nchi zote za Muungano wa Ghuba (Gulf Cooperation Council).

translations.source: WHO and Republic of Korea sign landmark agreement to boost biomanufacturing capacity WHO and the Republic of Korea have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to establish a global training hub in biomanufacturing. This global training centre will serve all low- and middle-income countries (LMICs) to produce biologicals, such as vaccines, insulin, monoclonal antibodies, and cancer medicines. The COVID-19 pandemic highlighted the need to expand the local and regional production of vaccines and other essential health products in LMICs to ensure equitable access. To provide countries with the know-how to rapidly produce mRNA vaccines, WHO, in collaboration with partners, established the mRNA Technology Transfer programme, with the formal inauguration of the Hub facility in South Africa in April 2023.
translations.reference: WHO na Jamhuri ya watu wa Korea zatia saini makubaliano ya kihistoria ili kuongeza uwezo wa utengenezaji wa Viumbe hai WHO na Jamhuri ya watu wa korea zimetia saini mkataba wa maelewano ili kuanzisha kitovu cha mafunzo cha kimataifa katika utengenezaji wa viumbe hai. Kituo hiki cha mafunzo cha kimataifa kitahudumia nchi zote za kipato cha chini na cha kati (LMICs) kuzalisha Biolojia kama vile Insulin, kinga za monokloni na dawa za saratani. Janga la UVIKO-19 liliangazia hitaji la kupanua uzalishaji wa ndani na wa kikanda wa chanjo na bidhaa nyingine muhimu za afya katika LMICs ili kuhakikisha ufikiaji sawa. Ili kuzipa nchi ujuzi wa kuzalisha Chanjo za mRNA kwa haraka, WHO, kwa kushirikiana na washirika, ilianzisha mpango wa uhawilishaji Teknolojia wa mRNA, na uzinduzi rasmi wa kituo cha Hub nchini Afrika Kusini mwezi Aprili 2023.
translations.hypothesis: Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) na Jamhuri ya Korea zimesaini makubaliano muhimu ili kuongeza uwezo wa utengenezaji wa bidhaa za kibayolojia. WHO na Jamhuri ya Korea zimesaini Mkataba wa Makubaliano ili kuanzisha kituo cha kimataifa cha mafunzo katika utengenezaji wa bidhaa za kibayolojia. Kituo hiki cha kimataifa cha mafunzo kitatumika kwa nchi zote zenye kipato cha chini na cha kati (LMICs) ili kuzalisha bidhaa za kibayolojia, kama vile chanjo, insulini, kingamwili za monoclonal, na dawa za saratani. Janga la COVID-19 lilionyesha umuhimu wa kuongeza uzalishaji wa chanjo na bidhaa nyingine muhimu za afya katika nchi za LMICs, ili kuhakikisha upatikanaji sawa. Ili kuwapa nchi ujuzi wa kuzalisha chanjo za mRNA kwa haraka, WHO, kwa kushirikiana na washirika, ilianzisha programu ya uhamisho wa teknolojia ya mRNA, na ufunguzi rasmi wa kituo hicho katika Afrika Kusini mwezi Aprili mwaka wa 2023.

translations.source: This multilateral effort and other recent local production initiatives call for ambitious workforce development strategies to recruit, upskill and retain the staff working at these facilities, with unique competencies required in bioproduction. To address this gap, WHO and the Republic of Korea have engaged in closed collaboration for over a year and are now formalizing their commitment towards the establishment of a global training hub in biomanufacturing. “We are delighted to sign this Memorandum of Understanding to elevate our partnership to the next level and collaborate in the development of a comprehensive training curriculum. We hope this world-class training hub will help to build a skilled workforce and ensure quality health products can be manufactured around the world,” said Dr Yukiko Nakatani, WHO Assistant Director-General, Access to Medicines and Health Products. The Government of the Republic of Korea is offering a large range of national training facilities and programmes covering the full spectrum of biological manufacturing and is expanding its operations to accommodate more trainees from other countries with the construction of a Global Bio Education Campus to be launched in 2025.
translations.reference: Juhudi hizi za kimataifa na mipango mingine ya hivi karibuni ya uzalishaji wa ndani inataka mikakati kabambe ya maendeleo ya wafanyakazi ili kuajiri, kuongeza ujuzi na kuhifadhi wafanyakazi wanaofanya kazi katia vituo hivi,na umahiri wa kipekee unaohitajika katika uzalishaji wa viumbe hai. Ili kukabiliana na pengo hili, WHO na Jamhuri ya korea zimeshirikiana kwa karibu kwa zaidi ya mwaka mmoja na sasa zinarasimisha dhamira yao ya kuanzishwa kwa kitovu cha mafunzo cha kimataifa katika utengenezaji wa viumbe hai. "Tunayo furaha kutia saini mkataba huu wa makubaliano ili kuinua ushirikiano wetu hadi ngazi nyengine na kushirikiana katika utayarishaji wa mtaala mpana wa mafunzo. Tunatarajia kitovu hiki cha mafunzo cha hadhi ya kimataifa kitasaidia kujenga nguvu kazi yenye ujuzi na kuhakikisha bidhaa bora za afya zinaweza kutengenezwa Duniani kote", alisema DK Yukiko Nakatani, mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa WHO, upatikanaji wa dawa na bidhaa za afya. Serikali ya Jamhuri ya Korea inatoa anuwai kubwa ya vifaa vya mafunzo ya kitaifa na programu zinazohusu wigo kamili wa utengenezaji wa kibiolojia na inapanua shughuli zake ili kuchukua wanafunzi zaidi kutoka nchi nyingine kwa ujenzi wa kampasi ya elimu ya viumbe hai ya kimataifa itakayozinduliwa mnamo 2025.
translations.hypothesis: Juhudi hizi za pamoja na mipango mingine ya hivi majuzi ya uzalishaji wa ndani zinahitaji mikakati ya maendeleo ya wafanyakazi yenye malengo makubwa ili kuajiri, kuwajengea ujuzi, na kuwahifadhi wafanyakazi wanaofanya kazi katika vituo hivyo, ambapo kuna mahitaji maalum ya ujuzi katika uzalishaji wa bidhaa za kibayolojia. Ili kushughulikia pengo hili, Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) na Jamhuri ya Korea zimekuwa zikifanya ushirikiano wa karibu kwa zaidi ya mwaka mmoja, na sasa zinaimarisha ahadi zao za kuanzisha kituo cha kimataifa cha mafunzo katika utengenezaji wa bidhaa za kibayolojia. "Tunafurahi kusaini Mkataba huu wa Makubaliano ili kuimarisha ushirikiano wetu na kushirikiana katika kuendeleza programu kamili ya mafunzo. Tunatumai kwamba kituo hiki cha mafunzo cha hali ya juu kitasaidia kuunda wafanyakazi wenye ujuzi na kuhakikisha kwamba bidhaa bora za afya zinaweza kutengenezwa ulimwenguni kote," alisema Dk. Yukiko Nakatani, Naibu Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, anayeshughulikia masuala ya upatikanaji wa dawa na bidhaa za afya. Serikali ya Jamhuri ya Korea inatoa huduma mbalimbali za mafunzo ya kitaifa na programu zinazohusu kila hatua ya utengenezaji wa bidhaa za kibayolojia, na inaongeza shughuli zake ili kuwezesha mafunzo zaidi kwa watu kutoka nchi nyingine, kwa kujenga Chuo Kikuu cha Kimataifa cha Elimu ya Kibayolojia ambacho kitafunguliwa mwaka wa 2025.

translations.source: “I hope this Memorandum of Understanding will enhance cooperation between the Republic of Korea and WHO to strengthen biomanufacturing capacities of LMICs,” said Mr Hwang Seunghyun Director General, Global Vaccine Hub Office at the Ministry of Health and Welfare from Republic of Korea. In parallel, WHO is intensifying regulatory system strengthening to ensure the quality and safety of health products. Stronger regulatory agencies will also enhance confidence in locally produced products and counter misinformation and the availability of unsafe substandard or falsified medicines.
translations.reference: "Ninatumai mkataba huu wa maelewano utaimarisha ushirikiano kati ya Jamhuri ya Korea na WHO ili kuimarisha uwezo na utengenezaji wa viumbe hai wa LMICs", alisema Bw Hwang Seunghyun mkurugenzi mkuu, ofisi za kitovu cha chanjo cha kimataifa katika wizara ya afya na ustawi kutoka Jamhuri ya Korea. Sambamba na hilo, WHO inaimarisha uimarishaji wa mfumo wa udhibiti ili kuhakikisha ubora na usalama wa bidhaa za afya. Mashirika yenye nguvu zaidi ya udhibiti pia yataongeza imani katika bidhaa zinazozalishwa nchini na kukabiliana na taarifa potofu na upatikanaji wa dawa zisizo na viwango, zisizo salama au zilizoghushiwa.
translations.hypothesis: "Natumai makubaliano haya ya pamoja yataimarisha ushirikiano kati ya Jamhuri ya Korea na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) ili kuimarisha uwezo wa utengenezaji wa bidhaa za kibioteknolojia katika nchi zilizoendelea kidogo," alisema Bw. Hwang Seunghyun, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Ofisi ya Kituo cha Kimataifa cha Chanjo, kutoka Wizara ya Afya na Ustawi ya Jamhuri ya Korea. Pamoja na hayo, WHO inazidi kuimarisha mifumo ya udhibiti ili kuhakikisha ubora na usalama wa bidhaa za afya. Mashirika ya udhibiti yenye nguvu pia yataongeza imani katika bidhaa zinazozalishwa ndani ya nchi na kupambana na taarifa potofu, pamoja na kupunguza hatari ya dawa zisizo salama, duni, au bandia.

translations.source: WHO urges governments to stop subsidizing life-threatening tobacco crops On World No Tobacco Day, WHO urges governments to stop subsidizing tobacco farming and support more sustainable crops that could feed millions. “Tobacco is responsible for 8 million deaths a year, yet governments across the world spend millions supporting tobacco farms,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “By choosing to grow food instead of tobacco, we prioritize health, preserve ecosystems, and strengthen food security for all.” More than 300 million people globally are faced with acute food insecurity.
translations.reference: WHO yazitaka serikali kuacha kutoa ruzuku kwa mazao ya Tumbaku yanayohatarisha maisha Katika siku ya kuzuia Tumbaku Duniani, WHO inazitaka serikali kuacha kutoa ruzuku kwa kilimo cha Tumbaku na kuunga mkono mazao endelevu ambayo yanaweza kulisha mamilioni ya watu. "Tumbaku inahusika na vifo milioni 8 kwa mwaka, serikali kote ulimwenguni hutumia mamilioni kusaidia mashamba ya Tumbaku", alisema Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO. "Kwa kuchagua kulima mazao ya chakula badala ya Tumbaku, tunatanguliza afya, kuhifadhi mifumo ya ikolojia, na kuimarisha usalama wa chakula kwa wote" Zaidi ya watu milioni 300 Duniani wanakabiliwa na uhaba wa chakula.
translations.hypothesis: Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) linaomba serikali kusitisha uwekezaji katika kilimo cha tumbaku, ambacho husababisha vifo vya hatari. Katika siku ya kimataifa ya kupinga tumbaku, WHO imewaomba viongozi kusitisha kuwekeza katika kilimo cha tumbaku na kutoa msaada kwa kilimo endelevu ambacho kinaweza kulisha mamilioni ya watu. "Tumbaku husababisha vifo vya watu milioni 8 kila mwaka, lakini serikali duniani kote hutumia mabilioni ya fedha kuunga mkono mashamba ya tumbaku," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO. "Kwa kuchagua kulima chakula badala ya tumbaku, tunapendelea afya, tunahifadhi mazingira, na tunaimarisha usalama wa chakula kwa kila mtu." Zaidi ya watu milioni 300 duniani kote wanakabiliwa na uhaba mkubwa wa chakula.

translations.source: Meanwhile more than 3 million hectares of land across more than 120 countries are being used to grow deadly tobacco, even in countries where people are starving. A new WHO report, “Grow food, not tobacco,” highlights the ills of tobacco growing and the benefits of switching to more sustainable food crops for farmers, communities, economies, the environment, and the world at large. The report also exposes the tobacco industry for trapping farmers in a vicious cycle of debt, propagating tobacco growing by exaggerating its economic benefits and lobbying through farming front groups. Tobacco farming causes diseases to the farmers themselves and more than 1 million child laborers are estimated to be working on tobacco farms, missing their opportunity for an education. “Tobacco is not only a massive threat to food insecurity, but health overall, including the health of tobacco farmers.
translations.reference: Wakati huohuo zaidi ya hekta milioni 3 za ardhi katika zaidi ya 120 zinatumiwa kulima Tumbaku hatari, hata nchi ambazo watu wana njaa. Ripoti mpya ya WHO, "Lima chakula, si Tumbaku", inaangazia matatizo ya ukuzaji wa Tumbaku na faida za kubadili mazao ya chakula endelevu kwa wakulima, jamii, uchumi, mazingira na Dunia kwa ujumla. Pia ripoti hiyo ilifichua sekta ya Tumbaku kwa kuwanasa wakulima katika msululu mbaya wa madeni, kueneza kilimo cha Tumbaku kwa kuzidisha faida zake za kiuchumi na ushawishi kupitia vikundi vya mwanzo vya wakulima. Kilimo cha Tumbaku kinasababisha magonjwa kwa wakulima wenyewe na zaidi ya vibarua milioni 1 wanakadiriwa kufanya kazi kwenye mashamba ya Tumbaku, wakikosa fursa ya kupata elimu. "Tumbaku sio tu ni tishio kwa uhaba wa chakula, lakini afya kwa ujumla, ikiwa ni pamoja na afya ya wakulima wa Tumbaku.
translations.hypothesis: Huku hayo yakijiri, zaidi ya milioni 3 za hekta za ardhi katika zaidi ya nchi 120 zinatumiwa kwa kilimo cha tumbaku, hata katika nchi ambako watu wanaishi katika hali ya ukosefu wa chakula. Ripoti mpya ya Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), yenye kichwa "Lima chakula, si tumbaku," inaangazia madhara ya kilimo cha tumbaku na faida za mchakato wa kubadilisha kilimo cha tumbaku na kuelekea kwenye mazao ya chakula endelevu zaidi kwa wakulima, jamii, uchumi, mazingira, na ulimwengu kwa ujumla. Ripoti hiyo pia inaonyesha jinsi sekta ya tumbaku inavyoweka wakulima kwenye mzunguko mbaya wa deni, na kuendeleza kilimo cha tumbaku kwa kupotosha kuhusu faida zake za kiuchumi na kupitia vikundi vya wakulima. Kilimo cha tumbaku husababisha magonjwa kwa wakulima wenyewe, na inakadiriwa kwamba zaidi ya watoto milioni 1 wanatumiwa kazini katika shamba za tumbaku, na hivyo kukosa fursa ya kupata elimu. "Tumbaku si tu tishio kubwa kwa usalama wa chakula, bali pia kwa afya kwa ujumla, ikiwa ni pamoja na afya ya wakulima wa tumbaku."

translations.source: Farmers are exposed to chemical pesticides, tobacco smoke and as much nicotine as found in 50 cigarettes – leading to illnesses like chronic lung conditions and nicotine poisoning,” said Dr Ruediger Krech, Director of Health Promotion at WHO. Tobacco growing is a global problem. The focus has so far been in Asia and South America, but the latest data show tobacco companies are expanding to Africa. Since 2005, there has been a nearly 20% increase in tobacco farming land across Africa. WHO, the Food and Agriculture Organization and the World Food Programme support the Tobacco Free Farms initiative that will provide help to more than 5000 farmers in Kenya and Zambia to grow sustainable food crops instead of tobacco.
translations.reference: Wakulima wanakabiliwa na viuatilifu vya kemikali, moshi wa Tumbaku na nikotini nyingi kama zinavyopatikana katika sigara 50 na kusababisha magonjwa kama vile hali ya mapafu sugu na sumu ya nikotini", alisema Dk Ruediger Krech, mkurugenzi wa ukuzaji afya katika WHO. Ulimaji wa Tumbaku ni tatizo la kimataifa. Lengo hadi sasa limekuwa barani Asia na Amerika kusini, lakini takwimu za hivi karibuni zinaonyesha makampuni ya Tumbaku yanaenea hadi Afrika. Tangu 2005, kumekuwa na ongezeko la karibu 20% katika ardhi ya kilimo cha Tumbaku kote barani Afrika. WHO, shirika la chakula na kilimo na mpango wa chakula Duniani wanaunga mkono mpango wa mashamba yasiyolipishwa ya Tumbaku ambao utatoa msaada kwa zaidi ya wakulima 5000 nchini Kenya na Zambia kulima mazaoya chakula endelevu badala ya Tumbaku.
translations.hypothesis: "Wafugaji wanaweza kuwahiwa na kemikali za kuua wadudu, moshi wa tumbaku, na kiasi cha nikotini sawa na kilicho katika sigara 50 – jambo ambalo husababisha magonjwa kama vile matatizo ya muda mrefu ya mapafu na sumu ya nikotini," alisema Dkt. Ruediger Krech, Mkurugenzi wa Utangazaji wa Afya katika Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO). Kilimo cha tumbaku ni tatizo la kimataifa. Hata hivyo, kwa sasa, umakini umekuwa zaidi katika Asia na Amerika Kusini, lakini data za hivi karibuni zinaonyesha kwamba kampuni za tumbaku zinaanza kuenea katika Afrika. Tangu mwaka wa 2005, kumekuwa na ongezeko la takriban 20% katika eneo la kilimo cha tumbaku katika Afrika. Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), Shirika la Chakula na Kilimo, na Programu ya Chakula Duniani wanaunga mkono mpango wa "Shamba Bila Tumbaku" ambao utatoa msaada kwa zaidi ya wakulima 5,000 nchini Kenya na Zambia ili wakue mazao endelevu badala ya tumbaku.

translations.source: Every year World No Tobacco Day honours those making a difference in tobacco control. This year one of the Awardees, Ms Sprina Robi Chacha, a female farmer from Kenya, is being recognized for not only switching from growing tobacco to high protein beans, but also training hundreds of other farmers on how to do this to create a healthier community. 182 Parties to the WHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control have committed to “...promote economically viable alternatives for tobacco workers and growers”. A crucial way that countries can fulfill this obligation is by ending subsidies for tobacco growing and supporting healthier crops. By choosing to grow food instead of tobacco, we prioritize health, preserve ecosystems, and increase food security.
translations.reference: Kila mwaka siku ya kutotumia Tumbaku Duniani huwaenzi wale wanaoleta mabadiliko katika udhibiti wa Tumbaku. Mwaka huu mmoja wa waliotunukiwa tuzo hiyo, Bi Sprina Robi chacha, mkulima wa kike kutoka Kenya, anatambulika tu kwa kuhama kutoka kilimo cha Tumbaku kwenda kwenye maharage yenye protini nyingi, lakini pia hutoa mafunzo kwa mamia ya wakulima wengine jinsi ya kufanya hivyo ilikujenga jamii yenye afya bora. Wanachama 182 katika mkataba wa mfumo wa WHO wa kudhibiti Tumbaku wajitolea "...kukuza njia mbadala za kiuchumi kwa wafanyakazi na wakulima wa Tumbaku". Njia bora ambazo nchi zinaweza kutimiza wajibu huu ni kwa kukomesha ruzuku kwa kilimo cha Tumbaku na kuunga mkono mazao yenye afya. Kwa kuchagua kulima chakula badala ya Tumbaku, tunatanguliza afya, kuhifadhi mifumo ya ikolojia, na kuongeza usalama wa chakula.
translations.hypothesis: Kila mwaka, Siku ya Kimataifa ya Kupinga Utumiaji wa Toba huadhimisha watu wanaojitahidi katika juhudi za kudhibiti utumiaji wa tiba. Mwaka huu, mmoja wa watu waliochukuliwa kama mifano, Bi. Sprina Robi Chacha, mkulima kutoka Kenya, anatangazwa kwa mchango wake wa si tu kuacha kilimo cha tiba na kuanza kilimo cha maharage yenye protini nyingi, bali pia kwa kumfunza wakulima wengine mamia ya wengine jinsi ya kufanya hivyo ili kuunda jamii yenye afya bora. Nchi 182 ambazo zimejiunga na Mkataba wa Kimataifa wa WHO kuhusu Udhibiti wa Tiba zimeahidi "...kuendeleza njia mbadala za kiuchumi kwa wafanyakazi na wakulima wa tiba." Mojawapo ya njia muhimu ambazo nchi zinaweza kutimiza ahadi hii ni kwa kuacha kutoa ruzuku kwa kilimo cha tiba na kusaidia kilimo cha mazao yenye afya. Kwa kuchagua kulima chakula badala ya tiba, tunapendelea afya, tunahifadhi mazingira, na tunapanua usalama wa chakula.

translations.source: Landmark report charts route for reorienting economies to deliver health for all In the first-ever report of its kind, the WHO Council on the Economics of Health for All has outlined a bold new path to reorient economies to deliver what matters - health for all. The Council, created by WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus in November 2020 in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, and chaired by Professor Mariana Mazzucato, has spent that last two years rethinking the economy from a health for all perspective, and pushing forcefully the principle that human and planetary health must be at the heart of how we design our social, health and economic systems and policies. The Council has put forward a bold new narrative grounded in new economic wisdom to reorient economies to deliver health for all across four interrelated themes:
translations.reference: Njia muhimu za Chati kwa kuelekeza upya uchumi Kutoa afya kwa wote Katika ripoti ya kwanza kabisa ya aina yake, Baraza la WHO kuhusu uchumi wa afya kwa wote limeelezea njia mpya ya kijasiri ya kuelekeza upya uchumi ili kutoa mambo muhimu- afya kwa wote. Baraza, liliundwa na mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus mnamo Novemba 2020 ili kukabiliana na janga la UVIKO-19, na chini ya uenyekiti wa profesa Mariana Mazzucato, limetumia miaka miwili iliyopita kutafakari upya uchumi kwa afya kwa mtazamo wote, na kusukuma kwa nguvu kanuni kwamba afya ya binadamu na sayari lazima iwe kiini cha jinsi tunavyobuni mifumo na sera zetu za kijamii, kiafya na kiuchumi. Baraza limetoa masimulizi mapya ya ujasiri yanayokitwa katika hekima mpya ya kiuchumi ili kuelekeza upya uchumi ili kutoa afya kwa mada zote nne zinazohusiana:
translations.hypothesis: Ripoti muhimu inaeleza njia ya kuelekeza upya uchumi ili kuhakikisha afya kwa kila mtu. Katika ripoti ya kwanza ya aina yake, Baraza la WHO kuhusu Uchumi wa Afya kwa Wote limeainisha njia mpya na ya ujasiri ya kuelekeza upya uchumi ili kufanikisha kile ambacho ni muhimu: afya kwa kila mtu. Baraza hilo, lililoanzishwa na Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mnamo Novemba 2020, kama jibu kwa janga la COVID-19, na linaliongozwa na Profesa Mariana Mazzucato, limetumia miaka miwili iliyopita kufikiria upya uchumi kutoka kwa mtazamo wa afya kwa wote, na kuendelea kusisitiza kwamba afya ya binadamu na ya sayari lazima iwe msingi wa jinsi tunavyounda mifumo na sera zetu za kijamii, za afya na za kiuchumi. Baraza hilo limekuwa na hadithi mpya na ya ujasiri, iliyojengwa kwenye maarifa mapya ya kiuchumi, ili kuelekeza upya uchumi na kuhakikisha afya kwa wote katika mada nne zinazohusiana:

translations.source: Value - valuing and measuring what matters through new economic metrics; Finance - how to finance health for all as a long-term investment, not a short-term cost; Innovation - how to advance health innovation for the common good; Capacity - how to strengthen dynamic public sector capacity to achieve health for all. “Two years ago, I asked a team of the world’s leading economists and public health experts – all women – to create a paradigm shift.
translations.reference: Thamani - Kuthamini na kupima mambo muhimu kupitia vipimo vipya vya kiuchumi; Fedha - Jinsi ya kufadhili afya kwa wote kama uwekezaji wa muda mrefu, sio gharama ya muda mfupi; Uvumbuzi - Jinsi ya kuendeleza uvumbuzi wa afya kwa manufaa ya wote; Uwezo - Jinsi ya kuimarisha uwezo madhubuti wa sekta ya umma kufikia afya kwa wote. "Miaka miwili iliyopita, niliiomba timu ya wanauchumi wakuu Duniani na wataalamu wa afya ya umma - wote wanawake- kuunda mabadiliko ya dhana.
translations.hypothesis: Thamani - kutambua na kupima mambo muhimu kupitia viashiria vipya vya kiuchumi; Fedha - jinsi ya kuwekeza katika afya kwa kila mtu kama uwekezaji wa muda mrefu, si kama gharama ya muda mfupi; Ubunifu - jinsi ya kukuza ubunifu katika sekta ya afya kwa manufaa ya wote; Uwezo - jinsi ya kuimarisha uwezo wa sekta ya umma ili kufanikisha afya kwa kila mtu. "Miaka miwili iliyopita, niliiomba timu ya wataalamu wa kiuchumi na wataalamu wa afya kutoka kote ulimwenguni - wote ni wanawake - kuleta mabadiliko makubwa."

translations.source: Now, instead of health for all being seen as the servant of economic growth, we have a roadmap for structuring economic activity in a way that will allow us to reach the goal of seeing all people with access to essential health services faster with better results,” said Dr Tedros. “Over the past two years, the WHO Council on the Economics of Health for All has worked to craft a new economic narrative – one that transforms financing for health from an expenditure to an investment,” said the Council’s Chair, Professor Mariana Mazzucato. “We have examined the changes needed – including to the structure of patents, public-private partnerships, and budgets – to design an economy that delivers Health for All. In our final report, we call for new economic policy that is not about market fixing but about proactively and collaboratively shaping markets that prioritize human and planetary health.” Launched today in conjunction with the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly, the report, entitled Health for All: Transforming economies to deliver what matters (https://www.who.int/groups/who-council-on-the-economics-of-health-for-all), provides a new framework built on the above four pillars, with specific recommendations under each – drawing from the Council’s previous work.
translations.reference: Sasa, badala ya afya kwa wote kuonekana kama mtumishi wa ukuaji wa uchumi, tunao muongozo wa kupanga shughuli za kiuchumi kwa namna ambayo itatuwezesha kufikia lengo la kuona watu wote wanapata huduma muhimu za afya kwa haraka na matokeo bora zaidi", alisema Dk Tedros. "Katika kipindi cha miaka miwili iliyopita, Baraza la WHO la uchumi wa afya kwa wote limefanya kazi kutengeneza simulizi mpya ya kiuchumi- ambayo inabadilisha ufadhili wa afya kutoka kwa matumizi hadi uwekezaji",alisema mwenyekiti wa baraza hilo, profesa Mariana Mazzucato. "Tumechunguza mabadiliko yanayohitajika- ikiwa ni pamoja na muundo wa hati miliki, ushirikiano wa umma na binafsi, na bajeti- kubuni uchumi unaotoa afya kwa wote. Katika ripoti yetu ya mwisho, tunatoa wito wa kuwepo kwa sera mpya ya kiuchumi ambayo si kuhusu urekebishaji wa soko lakini kuhusu kuunda masoko kwa vitendo na kwa ushirikiano ambayo yanatanguliza afya ya binadamu na sayari" Iliyozinduliwa leo kwa ushirikiano na Mkutano wa Sabini na Sita wa Afya Duniani, ripoti hiyo, yenye jina la Afya kwa wote: Kubadilish uchumi ili kutoa mambo muhimu (https://www.who.int/groups/who-council-on-the-economics-of-health-for-all), inatoa mfumo mpya uliojengwa juu ya nguzo nne zilizo hapo juu, na mapendekezo mahususi chini ya kila - kutokana na kazi ya awali ya Baraza.
translations.hypothesis: Sasa, badala ya kuona afya kwa wote kama kitu ambacho kinatumika kuendeleza uchumi, tumepata mkakati wa kuweka mfumo wa shughuli za kiuchumi ambao utaturuhusu kufikia lengo la kuona watu wote wakipata huduma muhimu za afya kwa haraka zaidi na matokeo bora,” alisema Dkt. Tedros. “Katika miaka miwili iliyopita, Baraza la WHO kuhusu Uchumi wa Afya kwa Wote limekuwa likifanya kazi ya kuandaa hadithi mpya ya kiuchumi – hadithi ambayo inabadilisha jinsi fedha zinavyotumika katika sekta ya afya, kutoka kwa matumizi kwa uwekezaji,” alisema Profesa Mariana Mazzucato, mwenyekiti wa baraza hilo. “Tumefanya uchunguzi wa mabadiliko yanayohitajika – ikiwa ni pamoja na muundo wa hati miliki, ushirikiano kati ya sekta ya umma na ya kibinafsi, na bajeti – ili kuunda uchumi ambao unawezesha afya kwa wote. Katika ripoti yetu ya mwisho, tunatoa wito wa sera mpya ya kiuchumi ambayo si kuhusu kurekebisha masoko, bali kuhusu kuunda masoko kwa njia ya makusudi na ya pamoja ambayo yanazingatia afya ya binadamu na ya sayari.” Ripoti hiyo, iliyotangazwa leo pamoja na Mkutano wa 76 wa Baraza la Afya Duniani, yenye kichwa "Afya kwa Wote: Kubadilisha uchumi ili kutoa kile ambacho ni muhimu" (https://www.who.int/groups/who-council-on-the-economics-of-health-for-all), inatoa mfumo mpya unaotegemea nguzo nne zilizotajwa hapo juu, na mapendekezo maalum katika kila nguzo, ambayo yanatokana na kazi iliyofanywa hapo awali na baraza hilo.

translations.source: Key recommendations include: We need to value and measure the things that truly matter - human and planetary flourishing - rather than pursuing economic growth and GDP maximization regardless of the consequences. To achieve health for all, governments must rethink value and reshape and redirect the economy based on social and planetary well-being, guided by new metrics. A fundamental overhaul of national and international systems for financing health is needed, so that spending on health is treated as a long-term investment. Delivering Health for All will require both more money, and higher quality financing.Innovation requires collective intelligence—it is never the fruit of just one company or government agency. But unless innovation is governed for the common good, many people remain excluded from its benefits.
translations.reference: Mapendekezo muhimu ni pamoja na: Tunahitaji kuthamini na kupima mambo ambayo kweli ni muhimu- binadamu na sayari kustawi- badala ya kutafuta ukuaji wa uchumi na kuongeza pato la taifa bila kujali matokeo. Ili kufikia afya kwa wote, serikali lazima zifikirie upya thamani na kuunda upya na kutekeleza uchumi upya kwa kuzingatia ustawi wa kijamii na sayari, zikiongozwa na metriki mpya. Marekebisho ya kimsingi ya mifumo ya kitaifa na kimataifa ya kufadhili afya inahitajika, ili matumizi ya afya yachukuliwe kama uwekezaji wa muda mrefu. Kutoa afya kwa wote kutahitaji pesa zaidi, na ufadhili wa hali ya juu zaidi, uvumbuvi unahitaji akili ya pamoja- kamwe si zao la kampuni moja au wakala wa serikali. Lakini uvumbuzi usipotawaliwa kwa manufaa ya wote, watu wengi husalia kutengwa na manufaa yake.
translations.hypothesis: Mapendekezo muhimu ni pamoja na: Tunahitaji kuthamini na kupima mambo ambayo yana umuhimu halisi – ustawi wa binadamu na sayari – badala ya kuendelea kuwafuatilia ukuaji wa kiuchumi na ongezeko la Pato la Taifa (GDP) bila kujali matokeo. Ili kufanikisha afya kwa wote, serikali zinahitaji kufikiria upya kuhusu thamani na kurekebisha na kuelekeza upya uchumi kulingana na ustawi wa jamii na sayari, kwa kutumia viashiria vipya. Ni muhimu kufanya mabadiliko makubwa katika mifumo ya kitaifa na kimataifa ya ufadhili wa afya, ili matumizi ya fedha katika sekta ya afya yatazamwe kama uwekezaji wa muda mrefu. Kutoa afya kwa wote kutahitaji fedha zaidi, na pia ufadhili wa ubora wa juu. Ubunifu unahitaji akili ya pamoja; hauwezi kutokana na kampuni au shirika moja tu la serikali. Hata hivyo, isipokuwa ubunifu unadhibitiwa kwa manufaa ya wengi, watu wengi wanaendelea kukosa faida zake.

translations.source: A new end-to-end health innovation ecosystem that prioritises the common good is needed. As the COVID-19 pandemic has made clear, the quality and capacity of government matters. Effective governments are not the smallest, but those that are well-designed and properly resourced, both financially and in terms of their people and infrastructure. Re-investing in government capacity is crucial to delivering Health for All. The report also provides suggestions on what can be done in practice to implement the changes needed to reorient measures of economic value, the financing of health, innovation and building public sector capacity in the service of health for all.
translations.reference: Mfumo mpya wa uvumbuzi wa afya ya mwisho hadi mwisho ambao unatanguliza manufaa ya wote unahitajika. Kama janga la UVIKO-19 limeweka wazi, ubora na uwezo wa mambo ya serikali. Serikali zenye ufanisi zaidi sio ndogo zaidi, lakini zile ambazo zimeundwa vizuri na zenye rasilimali ipasavyo, kifedha na kwa watu wake na miundombinu. Kuwekeza upya katika uwezo wa serikali ni muhimu katika kutoa afya kwa wote. Pia ripoti inatoa mapendekeo juu ya nini kifanyike kwa vitendo ili kutekeleza mabadiliko yanayohitajika ili kutekeleza upya hatua za thamani ya kiuchumi, ufadhili wa afya, uvumbuzi na kujenga uwezo wa sekta ya umma katika huduma ya afya kwa wote.
translations.hypothesis: Mfumo mpya wa ubunifu katika sekta ya afya, unaozingatia maslahi ya umma, unahitajika. Kama ambavyo janga la COVID-19 limeonyesha, ubora na uwezo wa serikali ni muhimu. Serikali bora siyo zile ndogo, bali zile ambazo zimepangwa vizuri na zina rasilimali za kutosha, kifedha na pia kwa upande wa wafanyakazi na miundombinu. Kuwekeza tena katika uwezo wa serikali ni muhimu kwa ajili ya kuhakikisha afya kwa wote. Ripoti hii pia ina mapendekezo kuhusu hatua ambazo zinaweza kuchukuliwa katika mazoezi ili kutekeleza mabadiliko yanayohitajika ili kubadilisha jinsi thamani ya kiuchumi, ufadhili wa afya, ubunifu, na uwezo wa sekta ya umma unavyoonekana, yote kwa lengo la kuhakikisha afya kwa wote.

translations.source: Among these, the report mentions several examples, including: The mRNA technology hub facility in South Africa: a values-driven system that tries to get the innovation, financing and capacity right ex-ante; Brazil’s public investment in a health-industrial complex that serves the common good; Regional development banks as enablers of change in the Global South; The Wellbeing Economy Alliance – an alliance of several governments and over 600 other organizations working together to transform economic systems in the service of life;
translations.reference: Kati ya hiyo, ripoti inataja mifano kadhaa, ikiwa ni pamoja na: Kituo cha teknolojia ya mRNA nchini Afrika Kusini: Mfumo unaoendeshwa na maadili unaojaribu kupata uvumbuzi, ufadhili na uwezo wa zamani; Uwekezaji wa umma wa Brazili katika sekta ya afya jumuishi inayohudumia manufaa ya wote; Benki za maendeleo za Kikanda kama wawezeshaji wa mabadiliko katika Global South; Muungano wa uchumi wa ustawi- muungano wa serikali kadhaa na zaidi ya mashirika mengine 600 yanayofanya kazi pamoja kubadilisha mifumo ya kiuchumi katika huduma ya maisha;
translations.hypothesis: Katika ripoti hiyo, kuna mifano kadhaa iliyotajwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na: Kituo cha teknolojia ya mRNA nchini Afrika Kusini: mfumo unaoongozwa na maadili ambao unajaribu kuhakikisha kwamba ubunifu, ufadhili, na uwezo vinapatikana mapema; Uwekezaji wa serikali ya Brazil katika sekta ya viwanda ya afya ambayo inalenga kuwasaidia wananchi; Benki za maendeleo za kikanda kama viungo muhimu vya mabadiliko katika nchi za Kusini mwa Dunia; Muungano wa Uchumi wa Ustawi – muungano wa serikali kadhaa na zaidi ya mashirika 600 ambayo yanafanya kazi pamoja ili kubadilisha mifumo ya kiuchumi ili kuendeleza maisha.

translations.source: Approaches to financing national action plans (NAPs) on antimicrobial resistance through multi sector joint budgeting, given that most NAPs remain unfunded. The recommendations included in the report could change the way countries view and finance health. WHO calls on policy-makers, civil society, and members of the health and economics communities to give full consideration to the recommendations and use them as a compass to develop new economic policies and structures that can move us along the road to making health for all a reality.
translations.reference: Mbinu za kufadhili mipango ya kitaifa ya utekelezaji (NAPs) juu ya ukinzani wa antimicrobial kupitia bajeti ya pamoja ya sekta nyingi, ikizingatiwa kuwa NAP nyingi bado hazijafadhiliwa. Mapendekezo yaliyojumuishwa katika ripoti yanaweza kubadilisha mtazamo wa nchi na kufadhili afya. WHO inatoa wito kwa watunga sera, jumuia za kirai, na wanachama wa jumuia za afya na uchumi kuzingatia kikamilifu mapendekezo na kuyatumia kama dira kuunda sera mpya za kiuchumi na miundo ambayo inaweza kutusogeza kwenye njia ya kufanya afya kwa wote ni ukweli.
translations.hypothesis: Mbinu za kuwezesha utekelezaji wa mipango ya kitaifa (NAPs) kuhusu suala la upinzani wa dawa za kuzuia maambukizi, kwa kutumia mfumo wa bajeti ya pamoja unaohusisha sekta mbalimbali, ikizingatiwa kwamba mipango mingi ya NAPs bado haipati ufadhili. Mapendekezo yaliyomo katika ripoti hiyo yanaweza kubadilisha jinsi nchi zinavyoona na kuwekeza katika afya. Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) wanakualika watunga sera, mashirika ya jamii, na wataalamu wa afya na uchumi, kuchunguza kwa makini mapendekezo hayo na kuyatumia kama mwongozo katika kuunda sera na mifumo mipya ya kiuchumi ambayo itatuwezesha kufikia lengo la afya kwa wote.

translations.source: Renowned artists Renée Fleming and Pretty Yende appointed as WHO Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health WHO is delighted to announce the appointment of internationally acclaimed artists Renée Fleming and Pretty Yende as Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health. This prestigious announcement was made as part of WHO's 75th Anniversary commemoration during the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly on 22 May 2023. Renée Fleming, one of the most celebrated singers of our time, and Pretty Yende, an extraordinary soprano known for her dazzling performances, have been selected for their artistic achievement and advocacy for improved health outcomes through creative means. On 8 April 2023, Fleming and Yende performed for a special concert titled Healing Arts, dedicated to WHO's 75th anniversary in Geneva, Switzerland.
translations.reference: Wasanii mashuhuri Renee Fleming na Pretty Yende waliteuliwa kuwa mabalozi wa Nia njema wa WHO kwa sanaa na afya WHO inafuraha kutangaza kuteuliwa kwa wasanii wanaotambulika kimataifa Renee Fleming na Pretty Yende kuwa mabalozi wa Nia njema kwa sanaa na afya. Tangazo hili la kifahari lilitolewa kama sehemu ya maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya WHO wakati wa mkutano wa sabini na sita wa afya Duniani tarehe 22 Mei 2023. Renee Fleming, mmoja wa waimbaji mashuhuri zaidi wa kizazi kipya, na Pretty Yende, mwanasoprano wa ajabu anaejulikana kwa uimbaji wake wa kuvutia, wamechaguliwa kwa mafanikio yao ya kisanii na utetezi wa matokeo bora ya afya kupitia mbinu za kibunifu. Tarehe 8 Aprili 2023, Fleming na Yende walitumbuiza katika tamasha maalumu lililoitwa Sanaa ya uponyaji, lililoadhimishwa kwa maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya WHO huko Jeniva, Uswizi.
translations.hypothesis: Wasanii mashuhuri, Renée Fleming na Pretty Yende, wamechaguliwa kuwa Balozi wa Hisani wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) katika masuala ya sanaa na afya. WHO imefurahia kutangaza uteuzi wa wasanii hawa, ambao wana maarufu kimataifa, kama Balozi wa Hisani katika masuala ya sanaa na afya. Tangazo hili muhimu limefanywa kama sehemu ya maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya WHO, wakati wa Mkutano wa 76 wa Baraza la Afya Duniani, mnamo tarehe 22 Mei, 2023. Renée Fleming, mmoja wa waimbaji maarufu zaidi wa zama zetu, na Pretty Yende, mwimbaji wa soprano wa kipekee anayejulikana kwa maonyesho yake ya kuvutia, wamechaguliwa kwa mafanikio yao ya kitaalamu na kwa utetezi wao wa kuboresha matokeo ya afya kupitia njia za ubunifu. Mnamo tarehe 8 Aprili, 2023, Fleming na Yende walifanya tamasha maalum lililojulikana kama "Sanaa ya Uponyaji," lililowekwa ili kuadhimisha miaka 75 ya WHO, jijini Geneva, Uswizi.

translations.source: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General, said, "WHO is honoured to have Renée Fleming and Pretty Yende join as Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health. Their unparalleled talent, dedication to the arts, and commitment to advancing health and well-being make them ideal ambassadors for this important cause. Their involvement will inspire individuals, communities and policy-makers to recognize and harness the transformative power of the arts in the pursuit of better health for all. "Fleming brings a wealth of expertise to her new role. She has captivated audiences worldwide with her luminous soprano voice and compelling artistry.
translations.reference: Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO, alisema, "WHO ina heshima kubwa kuwa na Renee Fleming na Pretty Yende kujiunga kama mabalozi wa Nia Njema kwa sanaa na afya. Vipaji vyao visivyo na kifani, kujitolea kwa sanaa, na kujitolea katika kuendeleza afya na ustawi huwafanya kuwa mabalozi bora kwa ajili ya kazi hii muhimu. Ushiriki wao utawatia moyo watu binafsi, jamii na watunga sera kutambua na kutumia nguvu ya mabadiliko ya sanaa katika kutafuta afya bora kwa wote. "Fleming analeta ujuzi mwingi kwa jukumu lake jipya. Amevutia hadhira Dunuani kote kwa sauti yake nyororo ya soprano na usanii wa kuvutia.
translations.hypothesis: Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, alisema, "WHO inafurahia kumkaribisha Renée Fleming na Pretty Yende kama Balozi wa Hisani katika sekta ya sanaa na afya. Talanta yao isiyolinganishika, kujitolea kwao katika sanaa, na dhamira yao ya kukuza afya na ustawi huwafanya kuwa balozi bora kwa ajili ya lengo hili muhimu. Ushawishi wao utawahamasisha watu binafsi, jamii, na watunga sera kutambua na kutumia nguvu ya mabadiliko ya sanaa katika kusaka afya bora kwa wote." Fleming analeta ujuzi mwingi katika nafasi yake mpya. Amewavutia wasikilizaji ulimwenguni kote kwa sauti yake ya soprano ya ajabu na ubunifu wake wa kipekee.

translations.source: Beyond her remarkable vocal talent, Fleming has been a fervent advocate for research at the intersection of the arts and health. Her presentations worldwide with scientists and practitioners, her leading role in major initiatives, and her association with WHO demonstrate her commitment to harnessing the transformative power of the arts to better society. "I am elated that the preeminent global health agency is recognizing the powerful impact of the arts in health, and I am deeply honoured to be entrusted to share this message," said Fleming. “Every day, advances in neuroscience and clinical research reveal more about the benefits of arts therapies, experiences, and education, with implications for well-being throughout the human life span. However, we have only just begun to realize the amazing potential of this work, and I look forward to expanding awareness and access as a WHO Goodwill Ambassador.
translations.reference: Zaidi ya kipaji chake cha ajabu cha sauti, Fleming amekuwa mtetezi wa bidii wa utafiti katika makutano wa sanaa na afya. Mawasilisho yake Duniani kote na wanasayansi na watendaji, jukumu lake kuu katika mipango mikuu na ushirikiano wake na WHO unaonyesha kujitolea kwake kutumia nguvu ya mabadiliko ya sanaa kwa jamii bora. "Nimefurahi kwamba wakala mkuu wa afya Duniani unatambua athari kubwa ya sanaa katika afya, na nina heshima kubwa kukabidhiwa kushiriki ujumbe huu", Fleming alisema. "Kila siku, maendeleo katika sayansi ya Neva na utafiti wa kimatibabu yanaonyesha zaidi kuhusu manufaa ya matibabu ya sanaa, uzoefu, na elimu, na athari kwa ustawi katika muda wote wa maisha ya Binadamu. Hata hivyo, ndio tumeanza kutambua uwezo wa ajabu wa kazi hii, na nina tazamia kupanua ufahamu na ufikiaji kama balozi wa Nia Njema wa WHO.
translations.hypothesis:
Fleming, pamoja na kipaji chake cha kipekee katika uimbaji, amekuwa mshabiki mkubwa wa utafiti unaochunguza uhusiano kati ya sanaa na afya. Mapokezi yake duniani kote, ambapo alishirikiana na wanasayansi na wataalamu, jukumu lake muhimu katika miradi mikuu, na uhusiano wake na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) yanaonyesha kujitolea kwake kutumia nguvu ya mabadiliko ya sanaa ili kuboresha jamii.

"Ninafurahi kwamba shirika kubwa la afya duniani linatambua athari kubwa ya sanaa katika afya, na ninahusika sana kupewa jukumu la kusambaza ujumbe huu," alisema Fleming. "Kila siku, maendeleo katika sayansi ya ubongo na utafiti wa kimatibabu yanaonyesha zaidi kuhusu faida za tiba, uzoefu, na elimu ya sanaa, ambayo ina athari kubwa kwa ustawi wa binadamu katika maisha yake yote. Hata hivyo, bado tunaanza tu kutambua uwezo mkubwa wa kazi hii, na ninatarajia kuongeza ufahamu na upatikanaji wa huduma hizi kama Balozi wa Hisani wa WHO."

translations.source: "Pretty Yende has mesmerized audiences with her exquisite voice and stunning performances. As a soprano with a deep understanding of the power of music, she has demonstrated her commitment to using her talent to improve society. Yende's passion for sharing the healing aspects of music and her dedication to social causes align perfectly with WHO’s Arts and Health agenda. Yende said, "I am delighted to be appointed a WHO Goodwill Ambassador for Arts and Health. I hope to help establish a foundation for continued investigation into the arts being a fundamental ingredient in improving our physical, mental, and social well-being.
translations.reference: "Pretty Yende ameshangaza watazamaji kwa sauti yake ya kupendeza na maonyesho ya kupendeza. Kama mwanasoprano mwenye uelewa wa kina wa nguvu ya muziki, ameonyesha kujitolea kwake kutumia kipaji chake kuboresha jamii. Shauku ya Yende ya kushiriki vipengele vya uponyaji vya muziki na kujitolea kwake kwa masuala ya kijamii yanaendana kikamilifu na ajenda ya sanaa na afya ya WHO. Yende alisema, "Nimefurahi kuteuliwa kuwa balozi wa nia njema wa WHO kwa sanaa na afya. Natumai kusaidia kuanzisha msingi wa uchunguzi unaoendelea kuhusu sanaa kuwa kiungo muhimu katika kuboresha ustawi wetu wa kimwili, kiakili na kijamii.
translations.hypothesis: "Pretty Yende amevutia hadhira kwa sauti yake nzuri sana na maonyesho yake ya kuvutia. Kama mwimbaji wa soprano mwenye uelewa mkubwa wa nguvu ya muziki, amejionyesha kuwa amejitolea kutumia talanta yake ili kuboresha jamii. Shau la Yende la kushiriki faida za uponyaji za muziki na kujitolea kwake kwa masuala ya kijamii vinakubaliana kikamilifu na mpango wa WHO kuhusu sanaa na afya. Yende alisema, "Ninafurahi sana kupewa nafasi ya kuwa Mjumbe wa Hisani wa WHO kwa ajili ya sanaa na afya. Natumai kusaidia kuanzisha msingi wa utafiti endelevu kuhusu jinsi sanaa inavyoweza kuwa sehemu muhimu katika kuboresha afya yetu ya kimwili, akili na kijamii."

translations.source: I am grateful to WHO for paving the way for new research and providing their global platform to spread the word and generate research on the connection of arts and health. "I look forward to all the possibilities to do essential work in my native South Africa and globally for a better and healthier tomorrow," added Yende. The appointments of Fleming and Yende underscore the profound link between arts and health. Engagement in creative activities, such as music, art, and dance, positively impacts physical, mental health, social well-being, and overall quality of life. Through their roles as Goodwill Ambassadors, Fleming and Yende will promote the integration of arts into health-care systems, advocate for access to creative arts therapies, and champion the importance of artistic expression in improving health outcomes globally.
translations.reference: Ninaishukuru WHo kwa kuandaa njia ya utafiti mpya na kutoa jukwaa lao la kimataifa la kueneza ujumbe na kuendesha utafiti kuhusu uhusiano wa sanaa na afya. "Nina tazamia uwezekano wote wa kufanya kazi muhimu katika nchi yangu ya asili ya Afrika Kusini na Duniani kote kwa kesho iliyobora na yenye afya", aliongezea Yende. Uteuzi wa Flemingo na Yende unasisitiza uhusiano kati ya sanaa na afya. Kujihusisha katika shughuli za ubunifu, kama vile muziki, sanaa, na densi, huathiri vyema afya ya mwili, akili, ustawi wa jamii na ubora wa maisha kwa ujumla. Kupitia majukumu yao kama mabalozi wa nia njema, Fleming na Yende wanatukuza ujumuishaji wa sanaa katika mifumo ya utunzaji wa afya, kutetea ufikiaji wa matibabu ya sanaa ya ubunifu, na kutetea umuhimu wa kujieleza kwa kisanii katika kuboresha matokeo ya afya ulimwenguni.
translations.hypothesis: Ninashukuru kwa shirika la WHO kwa kuweka msingi wa utafiti mpya na kwa kutumia jukwaa lake la kimataifa kueneza habari na kuchochea utafiti kuhusu uhusiano kati ya sanaa na afya. "Ninatarajia fursa zote za kufanya kazi muhimu katika nchi yangu, Afrika Kusini, na pia kimataifa, ili kuleta kesho bora na yenye afya," aliongeza Yende. Mteuziwa wa Fleming na Yende unaonyesha uhusiano muhimu kati ya sanaa na afya. Kushiriki katika shughuli za ubunifu, kama vile muziki, sanaa, na ngoma, huathiri chanya afya ya kimwili, akili, ustawi wa kijamii, na ubora wa maisha kwa ujumla. Katika nafasi zao kama Balozi wa Hisani, Fleming na Yende watakuza ujumuishaji wa sanaa katika mifumo ya huduma za afya, watatetea upatikanaji wa tiba za sanaa, na watasisitiza umuhimu wa kujieleza kupitia sanaa katika kuboresha matokeo ya afya duniani kote.

translations.source: WHO launches global network to detect and prevent infectious disease threats WHO and partners are launching a global network to help protect people from infectious disease threats through the power of pathogen genomics. The International Pathogen Surveillance Network (IPSN) will provide a platform to connect countries and regions, improving systems for collecting and analyzing samples, using these data to drive public health decision-making, and sharing that information more broadly. Pathogen genomics analyzes the genetic code of viruses, bacteria and other disease-causing organisms to understand how infectious they are, how deadly they are, and how they spread.
translations.reference: WHO inazindua mtandao wa kimataifa kwa Kugundua na kuzuia vitisho vya magonjwa ya kuambukiza WHO na washirika wanazindua mtandao wa kimataifa ili kusaidia kulinda watu dhidi ya vitisho vya magonjwa ya Pathogen genomics. Mtandao wa kimataifa wa ufuatiliaji wa pathogen (IPSN) utatoa jukwaa la kuunganisha nchi na kanda, kuboresha mifumo ya kukusanya na kuchambua sampuli, kwa kutumia data hizi kuendesha maamuzi ya afya ya umma, na kushiriki taarifa hiyo kwa upana zaidi. Pathogen genomics huchanganua kanuni za kijeni za virusi, bakteria, na viumbe vingine vinavyosababisha magonjwa ili kuelewa jinsi vinavyoambukiza, ni hatari kiasi gani, na jinsi gani wanavyoenea.
translations.hypothesis: Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) limeanzisha mtandao wa kimataifa ili kuchunguza na kuzuia hatari za magonjwa ya kuambukiza. WHO na washirika wake wameanzisha mtandao huu wa kimataifa ili kusaidia kulinda watu dhidi ya hatari za magonjwa ya kuambukiza kwa kutumia teknolojia ya uchambuzi wa jenetiki ya vimelea. Mtandao wa Kimataifa wa Ufuatiliaji wa Vimelea (IPSN) utatoa jukwaa la kuunganisha nchi na mikoa, na hivyo kuboresha mifumo ya kukusanya na kuchambua sampuli, kutumia data hizo ili kuongoza maamuzi ya afya ya umma, na kusambaza taarifa hizo kwa wengine. Uchambuzi wa jenetiki ya vimelea unachunguza msimbo wa kijeni wa virusi, bakteria, na vimelea vingine vinavyosababisha magonjwa ili kuelewa jinsi ambavyo vinaambukiza, jinsi ambavyo vinaweza kuwa hatari, na jinsi ambavyo husambaa.

translations.source: With this information, scientists and public health officials can identify and track diseases to prevent and respond to outbreaks as part of a broader disease surveillance system, and to develop treatments and vaccines. The IPSN, with a Secretariat hosted by the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, brings together experts worldwide at the cutting-edge of genomics and data analytics, from governments, philanthropic foundations, multilateral organizations, civil society, academia and the private sector. All share a common goal: to detect and respond to disease threats before they become epidemics and pandemics, and to optimize routine disease surveillance. The goal of this new network is ambitious, but it can also play a vital role in health security: to give every country access to pathogen genomic sequencing and analytics as part of its public health system,” said WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “As was so clearly demonstrated to us during the COVID-19 pandemic, the world is stronger when it stands together to fight shared health threats.”
