translations.reference: Kwa taarifa hii, wanasayansina maafisa wa afya ya umma wanaweza kutambua na kufuatilia magonjwa ili kuzuia na kukabiliana na milipuko kama sehemu ya mfumo mpana wa ufuatiliaji wa magonjwa, na kutengeneza matibabu na chanjo. IPSN, pamoja na sekretarieti inayosimamiwa na kitovu cha WHO cha ufuatiliaji wa majanga na magonjwa ya mlipuko, inaleta pamoja wataalamu Duniani kote katika makali ya genomics ya uchunguzi wa Data, kutoka serikalini, taasisi za wahisani, mashirika ya kimataifa, mashirika ya kiraia, wasomi na sekta binafsi. Wote wana lengo moja: Kugundua na kukabiliana na matishio ya magonjwa kabla hayajawa majanga na magonjwa ya mlipuko, na kuboresha ufuatiliaji wa mara kwa mara wa magonjwa. Lengo la mtandao huu mpya ni dhabiti, lakini pia linaweza kuchukua jukumu muhimu katika usalama wa afya: kutoa kila nchi ufikiaji wa mpangilio na uchanganuzi wa Pathogen genomic kama sehemu ya mfumo wake wa afya ya umma", alisema mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO DK Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Kama ilivyonyeshwa wazi kwetu wakati wa janga la UVIKO-19, ulimwengu unakuwa na nguvu wakati unasimama pamoja kupigana na matishio ya kiafya pamoja"
translations.hypothesis: Kwa taarifa hii, wanasayansi na maafisa wa afya wanaweza kutambua na kufuatilia magonjwa ili kuzuia na kukabiliana na mlipuko, kama sehemu ya mfumo mpana wa ufuatiliaji wa magonjwa, na pia kuendeleza tiba na chanjo. IPSN, ambayo ina makao yake katika kitengo cha WHO cha Utafiti wa Janga na Epidemiki, huleta pamoja wataalamu kutoka kote ulimwenguni ambao wako mstari wa mbele katika teknolojia ya umbizo la viumbe (genomics) na uchambuzi wa data, kutoka serikali, mashirika ya hisani, mashirika mengi, jamii, taasisi za elimu na sekta binafsi. Wote wana lengo moja: kutambua na kukabiliana na hatari za magonjwa kabla ya kuwa magonjwa makubwa na milipuko, na pia kuboresha ufuatiliaji wa kawaida wa magonjwa. Lengo la mtandao huu mpya ni kubwa, lakini linaweza pia kucheza jukumu muhimu katika usalama wa afya: kutoa kila nchi fursa ya kupata uchambuzi wa umbizo la viumbe (genomic sequencing) kama sehemu ya mfumo wake wa afya ya umma,” alisema Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dk. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “Kama ilivyothibitishwa wazi kwetu wakati wa janga la COVID-19, dunia inakuwa imara zaidi wakati tunasimama pamoja ili kupambana na hatari za afya ambazo tunazoshiriki.”

translations.source: COVID-19 highlighted the critical role pathogen genomics plays in responding to pandemic threats. Without the rapid sequencing of the SARS-COV-2 genome, vaccines would not have been as effective, or have been made available so quickly. New, more transmissible variants of the virus would not have been as quickly identified. Genomics lies at the heart of effective epidemic and pandemic preparedness and response, as well as part of the ongoing surveillance of a vast range of diseases, from foodborne diseases and influenza to tuberculosis and HIV. Its use in monitoring the spread of HIV drug resistance, for example, has led to antiretroviral regimes that have saved countless lives.
translations.reference: UVIKO-19 ilionyesha jukumu muhimu la Pathogen genomics katika kukabiliana na vitisho vya janga. Bila mpangilio wa haraka wa jenomu ya SARS-COV-2, chanjo hazingekuwa na ufanisi, au zingepatikana kwa haraka sana. Aina mpya, zinaweza kuambukizwa zaidi za virusi haingetambuliwa haraka. Genomics iko katika kiini cha janaga na utayari wa janga na muitikio mzuri, vilevile sehemu ya ufuatiliaji unaoendelea wa anuwai ya magonjwa, kutoka kwa magonjwa yanayosababishwa na chakula na mafua na kifua kikuu na VVU. Matumizi yake katika kufuatilia ueneaji wa ukinzani wa dawa za VVU, kwa mfano, imesababisha muda wa kurefusha maisha ambazo zimeokoa maisha mengi.
translations.hypothesis: COVID-19 ilionyesha jukumu muhimu ambalo teknolojia ya umbizo la viumbe (genomics) inacheza katika kukabiliana na hatari za janga. Bila utekelezaji wa haraka wa umbizo la jeni la SARS-COV-2, chanjo zingekuwa hazifai au zingepatikana kwa kasi ndogo. Aina mpya za virusi ambazo zinaambukiza kwa urahisi zaidi zingepingwa kutambuliwa kwa haraka. Teknolojia ya umbizo la viumbe ni muhimu katika maandalizi na majibu madhubuti dhidi ya magonjwa ya kuenea haraka na majanga, pamoja na katika ufuatiliaji unaoendelea wa magonjwa mengi, kuanzia magonjwa yanayosababishwa na chakula na homa ya kawaida hadi kifua kikuu na UKIMWI. Matumizi yake katika kufuatilia kuenea kwa ukinzani wa dawa dhidi ya UKIMWI, kwa mfano, yamepelekea matumizi ya tiba za kuzuia UKIMWI ambazo zimeokoa maisha ya watu wengi.

translations.source: “Global collaboration in pathogen genomic surveillance has been critical as the world fights COVID-19 together,” said Dr Rajiv J. Shah, President of The Rockefeller Foundation. “IPSN builds upon this experience by creating a strong platform for partners across sectors and borders to share knowledge, tools, and practices to ensure that pandemic prevention and response is innovative and robust in the future.” Despite recent scale-up in genomics capacity in countries as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, many still lack effective systems for collecting and analyzing samples or using those data to drive public health decision-making. There is not enough sharing of data, practices, and innovations to build a robust global health surveillance architecture. Budgets that soared during the pandemic, allowing a rapid build-up of capabilities, are now being slashed, even in the wealthiest countries.
translations.reference: "Ushirikiano wa kimataifa katika uchunguzi wa Pathogen genomics umekuwa muhimu wakati ulimwengu unapambana na UVIKO-19 pamoja", alisema Dk Rajiv J. Shah, Rais wa wakfu wa Rockefeller. "IPSN inajenga juu ya uzoefu huu kwa kuunda jukwaa thabiti kwa washirika katika sekta na mipaka ili kubadilishana maarifa, zana na mazoea ili kuhakikisha kuwa kuzuia na kukabiliana na janga ni ubunifu na thabiti katika siku zijazo". Licha ya kuongezeka kwa hivi karibuni kwa uwezo wa jeni katika nchi kutokana na janga la UVIKO-19, nyingi bado hazina mifumo madhubuti ya kukusanya na kuchambua sampuli au kutumi data hizo kuendesha maamuzi ya afya ya umma. Hakuna ushiriki wa kutosha wa data, mazoea, na ubunifu ili kujenga usanifu thabiti wa ufuatiliaji wa afya Duniani. Bajeti ambazo zilipanda wakati wa janga hilo, na kuruhusu ujanibishaji wa haraka wa uwezo, sasa zinapunguzwa, hata katika nchi tajiri zaidi.
translations.hypothesis: "Ushirikiano wa kimataifa katika ufuatiliaji wa maumbile ya magonjwa umekuwa muhimu sana wakati dunia inapopigania dhidi ya COVID-19 pamoja," alisema Dk Rajiv J. Shah, Rais wa Shirika la Rockefeller. "IPSN inajenga juu ya uzoefu huu kwa kuunda jukwaa thabiti ambalo litawawezesha washirika kutoka sekta na nchi tofauti kushirikiana, kubadilishana maarifa, zana, na mbinu, ili kuhakikisha kwamba juhudi za kuzuia na kukabiliana na magonjwa ya mlipuko zitakuwa za kisasa na za ufanisi katika siku zijazo." Licha ya ongezeko la hivi karibuni la uwezo katika teknolojia ya maumbile katika nchi nyingi kutokana na janga la COVID-19, bado nyingi hazina mifumo yenye ufanisi ya kukusanya na kuchambua sampuli, au ya kutumia data hizo ili kuongoza maamuzi ya afya ya umma. Hakuna ushirikiano wa kutosha wa data, mbinu, na ubunifu ili kujenga mfumo thabiti wa ufuatiliaji wa afya duniani. Bajeti ambazo zilikua sana wakati wa janga hilo, na zilizoruhusu kuimarika haraka kwa uwezo, sasa zinapunguzwa, hata katika nchi zilizo na uchumi mkubwa.

translations.source: “Argentina is deeply invested in building our own country capacity in pathogen genomics and the capacity of other countries,” said Josefina Campos, Director of the National Genomics and Bioinformatics Center at ANLIS Malbrán, Argentina. “Diseases do not respect borders: a disease threat in one country is also a threat to others. We look forward to collaborating with IPSN members to achieve our common goal of preventing illness and saving lives.” The IPSN will tackle these challenges through a global network, connecting geographies and disease-specific networks, to build a collaborative system to better detect, prevent and respond to disease threats. Members will work together in dedicated groups focusing on specific challenges, supported by funding through the IPSN to scale-up ideas and projects in pathogen genomics.
translations.reference: "Argentina imewekeza sana katika kujenga uwezo wa nchi yetu katika Pathogen genomics na uwezo wa nchi nyingine", alisema Josefina Campos, mkurugenzi wa kituo cha kitaifa cha Genomics na Bioinformatics katika ANLIS Malbr, Argentina. "Magonjwa hayaheshimu mipaka: Tishio la ugonjwa katika nchi moja pia ni tishio kwa nchi nyingine. Tunatazamia kushirikiana na wanchama wa IPSN kufikia lengo letu la pamoja la kuzuia magonjwa na kuokoa maisha" IPSN itakabiliana na changamoto hizi kupitia mtandao wa kimataifa, unaounganisha jografia na mitandao mahususi ya magonjwa, ili kujenga mfumo shirikishi wa kutambua vyema, kuzuia na kukabiliana na vitisho vya magonjwa. Wanachama watafanya kazi pamoja katika vikundi vilivyojitolea vinavyozingatia changamoto maalumu, zinazoungwa mkono na ufadhili kupitia IPSN ili kuongeza mawazo na miradi katika Pathogen genomics.
translations.hypothesis: "Argentina imejitolea sana katika kuimarisha uwezo wetu wa kitaifa katika umbizo wa jeni za vimelea na pia uwezo wa nchi nyingine," alisema Josefina Campos, Mkurugenzi wa Kituo cha Taifa cha Umbizo wa Jeni na Biolojia ya Kompyuta katika ANLIS Malbrán, Argentina. "Magonjwa hayazingatii mipaka: hatari ya ugonjwa katika nchi moja pia ni hatari kwa nchi zingine. Tunatarajia kushirikiana na wanachama wa IPSN ili kufikia lengo letu la pamoja la kuzuia magonjwa na kuokoa maisha." IPSN itashughulikia changamoto hizi kupitia mtandao wa kimataifa, unaounganisha maeneo mbalimbali na mitandao iliyoelekezwa kwa magonjwa mahususi, ili kuunda mfumo wa ushirikiano ambao utasaidia zaidi katika kutambua, kuzuia, na kukabiliana na hatari za magonjwa. Wanachama watashirikiana katika vikundi maalum ambavyo vitazingatia changamoto mahususi, na vitapokea ufadhili kutoka kwa IPSN ili kuendeleza mawazo na miradi katika umbizo wa jeni za vimelea.

translations.source: By connecting countries, regions, and wider stakeholders, the IPSN will help to increase critical capacity, amplify regional and country-level voices, and strengthen their priorities. About the IPSN launch The IPSN will be formally launched on the sidelines of the World Health Assembly in Geneva. The launch event takes place on 20 May 2023, 17:00 – 19:30h (CET) in the InterContinental Geneva, and is open to media. It includes keynote speeches from:
translations.reference: Kwa kuunganisha nchi, kanda, na washikadau wengi zaidi, IPSN itasaidia kuongeza uwezo muhimu, kukuza sauti za kikanda na ngazi ya nchi, na kuimarisha vipaumbele vyao. Kuhusu uzinduzi wa IPSN IPSN itazinduliwa rasmi kando ya mkutano wa afya Duniani huko Jeniva. Tukio la uzinduzi litafanyika tarehe 20 Mei 2023, 17:00 - 19:00 (CET) katika intakontinento Jeniva, na upo wazi kwa vyombo vya havbari. Inajumuisha hotuba kuu kutoka:
translations.hypothesis: Kwa kuunganisha nchi, mikoa, na wadau wengine muhimu, IPSN itasaidia kuongeza uwezo muhimu, kuongeza sauti za kikanda na za kitaifa, na kuimarisha vipaumbele vyao. Kuhusu uzinduzi wa IPSN: IPSN itazinduliwa rasmi katika mkutano wa Mkutano wa Afya wa Dunia (World Health Assembly) unaofanyika mjini Geneva. Tukio la uzinduzi litafanyika tarehe 20 Mei 2023, kuanzia saa 17:00 hadi 19:30 (saa za Ulaya ya Kati), katika hoteli ya InterContinental Geneva, na linawakaribisha vyombo vya habari. Tukio hilo litajumuisha hotuba kuu kutoka kwa:

translations.source: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Director-General, World Health Organization; Dr Mike Ryan, Executive Director, WHO Health Emergencies Programme; and Dr Chikwe Ihekweazu, Assistant Director-General, World Health Organization, Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence. There will also be a panel with high-level speakers from Member State and IPSN funders, including; Dame Jenny Harries, Chief Executive, UK Health Security Agency;
translations.reference: Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugeni mkuu, shirika la afya Duniani; DK Mike Ryan, mkurugenzi mtendaji, mpango wa dharura wa afya wa WHO; na Dk Chikwe Ihekweazu, mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi, shirika la afya Duniani, kitovu cha ujsusi wa majanga na magonjwa. Pia kutakuwa na jopo lenye wazungumzaji wa ngazi ya juu kutoka kwa wafadhili wa nchi wanachama na IPSN, wakiwemo; Dame Jenny Harries, mkurugenzi mtendaji, shirika la usalama wa afya la Uingereza;
translations.hypothesis: Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO); Dkt. Mike Ryan, Mkurugenzi Mtendaji wa Programu ya Dhaifu za Afya za WHO; na Dkt. Chikwe Ihekweazu, Naibu Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Shirika la Afya Duniani, Kituo cha Utafiti wa Janga na Epidemiki. Pia kutakuwa na jopo la wazungumzaji wa ngazi ya juu kutoka nchi wanachama na wafadhili wa IPSN, ikiwa ni pamoja na: Dame Jenny Harries, Afisa Mkuu Mtendaji wa Shirika la Usalama wa Afya la Uingereza.

translations.source: Dr Jean Kaseya, Director-General, Africa Centers for Disease Control and Prevention; Dr Naveen Rao, Senior Vice President, Rockefeller Foundation; Dr Alexander Pym, Director of Infectious Disease, Wellcome Trust; Professor Tulio de Oliveira, Director, Centre for Epidemiology at Stellenbosch University, South Africa; Björn Kümmel, Deputy Head of Unit, Global Health, Federal Ministry of Health, Germany;
translations.reference: Dk Jean Kaseya, mkurugenzi mkuu, vituo vya Afrika vya kudhibiti na kuzuia magonjwa; Dk Naveen Rao, makamu wa Rais muandamizi,wakfu wa Rockefeller Dk Alexander Pym, mkurugenzi wa magonjwa ya kuambukiza, Wellcome Trust; Profesa Tulio de Oliveira, mkurugenzi, kitivo cha Epidemiolojia katika chuo kikuu cha Stellenbosch, Afrika Kusini; Bjorn Kummel, naibu mkuu wa kitengo, afya ulimwenguni, wizara ya afya ya ushirikiano, Ujerumani;
translations.hypothesis: Dkt. Jean Kaseya, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Kituo cha Afrika cha Kudhibiti Magonjwa na Udhibiti wa Afya; Dkt. Naveen Rao, Makamu wa Rais Mkuu wa Shirika la Rockefeller; Dkt. Alexander Pym, Mkurugenzi wa Magonjwa ya Kuambukiza, Shirika la Wellcome Trust; Profesa Tulio de Oliveira, Mkurugenzi wa Kituo cha Epidemiolojia katika Chuo Kikuu cha Stellenbosch, Afrika Kusini; Björn Kümmel, Naibu Mkuu wa Kitengo cha Afya ya Kimataifa, Wizara ya Afya ya Shirikisho la Ujerumani;

translations.source: Professor Leo Yee Sin, Executive Director of the National Centre for Infectious Diseases; Singapore; Dr Mario Moreira, President, Fiocruz, Brazil; and Dr Josefina Campos, Director of the National Genomics and Bioinformatics Center at ANLIS Malbrán, Argentina. The event will take place in a hybrid format, providing an opportunity for IPSN members and broader audiences to engage with the IPSN and its activities. About the IPSNThe IPSN is a new global network of pathogen genomic actors, hosted by the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, to accelerate progress on the deployment of pathogen genomics and improve public health decision-making.
translations.reference: Profesa Leo Yee Sin, mkurugenzi mtendaji wa kituo cha kitaifa cha magonjwa ya kuambukiza; Singapore; Dk Mario Moreira, Rais, Fiocruz, Brazili; na Dk Josefina Campos, mkurugenzi wa kituo cha kitaifa cha Genomics na Bioinformatics katika ANLIS Malbr, Argentina. Tukio litafanyika katika umbo la mseto, likitoa fursa kwa wanachama wa IPSN na hadhira kubwa zaidi kujihusisha na IPSN na shughuli zake. Kuhusu IPSN, IPSN ni mtandao mpya wa kimataifa wa wahusika wa Pathogen genomis, unaoandaliwa na kituo cha ujasusi cha WHO cha magonjwa na milipuko, ili kuharakisha maendeleo ya uwekaji wa Pathogen genomics na kuboresha maamuzi ya afya ya umma.
translations.hypothesis: Profesa Leo Yee Sin, Mkurugenzi Mtendaji wa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Magonjwa Yanayoambukiza, Singapore; Dkt. Mario Moreira, Rais wa Fiocruz, Brazil; na Dkt. Josefina Campos, Mkurugenzi wa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Umri wa Geni na Biolojia ya Kompyuta katika ANLIS Malbrán, Argentina. Tukio hilo litafanyika kwa mtindo wa mchanganyiko, na hivyo kutoa fursa kwa wanachama wa IPSN na hadhira pana kujishirikisha na IPSN na shughuli zake. Kuhusu IPSN: IPSN ni mtandao mpya wa kimataifa unaojumuisha wataalamu wa umri wa geneti wa vimelea, unaoshughulikiwa na Kituo cha WHO cha Uelewa wa Janga na Epidemiki, ili kuongeza kasi ya maendeleo katika utumiaji wa umri wa geneti wa vimelea na kuboresha ufanyaji wa maamuzi katika afya ya umma.

translations.source: The IPSN envisions a world where every country has equitable access to sustained capacity for genomic sequencing and analytics as part of its public health surveillance system. It sets out to create a mutually supportive global network of genomic surveillance actors that amplifies and accelerates the work of its members to improve access and equity. The IPSN consists of three main operational bodies that bring together different sets of stakeholders, supported by a Secretariat at the WHO Pandemic Hub. Partners collaborate in Communities of Practice (COPs) to solve common challenges, aiming to increase harmonization and innovation in pathogen genomics. In the Country Scale-Up Accelerator (CSUA), stakeholders work together to align efforts and enable South-South exchange to scale-up country capacity building.
translations.reference: IPSN inatazamia ulimwengu ambapo kila nchi ina ufikiaji sawa na uwezo endelevu wa mpangilio wa jeni na uchanganuzi kama sehemu ya mfumo wake wa ufuatiliaji wa afya ya umma. Inasaidia kuunda mtandao wa kimataifa unaosaidia na watendaji wa ufuatiliaji wa jeni ambao huongeza na kuharakisha kazi ya wanachama wake ili kuboresha ufikiaji na usawa. IPSN ina mashirika makuu matatu ya utendaji mbayo yanaleta pamoja seti tofauti za washikadau, wakiungwa mkono na sekretarieti katika kituo cha magonjwa cha WHO. Washirika hushirikiana katika jumuia za mazoezi (COPs) kutatua changamoto zinazofanana, zinazolenga kuongeza upatanishi na uvumbuzi katika Pathogen genomis. Katika kiharakisha cha kuongeza kasi ya nchi (CSUA), Wadau wanafanya kazi pamoja ili kuoanisha juhudi na kuwezesha ubadilishanaji wa kusini-kusini ili kuongeza uwezo wa nchi.
translations.hypothesis: Shirika la IPSN linatazamia dunia ambapo kila nchi ina uwezo sawa na endelevu wa kufanya uchunguzi na uchambuzi wa maumbile, kama sehemu ya mfumo wake wa ufuatiliaji wa afya ya umma. Linalenga kuunda mtandao wa kimataifa unaounga mkono kila mmoja, unaojumuisha wadau mbalimbali katika ufuatiliaji wa maumbile, ili kuongeza na kuharakisha kazi ya wanachama wake, na hivyo kuboresha upatikanaji na usawa. IPSN linaundwa na taasisi tatu kuu za utendaji ambazo huleta pamoja makundi tofauti ya wadau, na kusimamiwa na ofisi ya utendaji iliyopo katika Kituo cha WHO cha janga. Washirika hushirikiana katika vikundi vya utaalamu (Communities of Practice - COPs) ili kutatua changamoto za kawaida, na lengo la kuongeza utaratibu na ubunifu katika uchunguzi wa maumbile ya vimelea. Katika mpango wa kuongeza uwezo wa nchi (Country Scale-Up Accelerator - CSUA), wadau hufanya kazi pamoja ili kuunganisha juhudi na kuwezesha ushirikiano kati ya nchi za Kusini na Kusini, ili kuongeza uwezo wa nchi.

translations.source: The COP and CSUA bring together organizations from across sectors, income levels, and geographies, with a commitment to international cooperation and equity, and deep expertise in either genomics or country scale-up of surveillance systems. The third body is the Funders Forum to coordinate philanthropic, multi-lateral and governmental donors around increased political attention and financing efficiency of pathogen genomic surveillance. The Funders Forum also catalyses additional grant funding for projects of IPSN members. The establishment of the IPSN has been supported by German government funding to the WHO Pandemic Hub. About the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence
translations.reference: COP na CSUA huleta pamoja mashirika kutoka sekta mbalimbali, viwango vya mapato, na jografia, kwa kujitolea kwa ushirikiano wa kimataifa na usawa, na utaalamu wa kina katika aidha genomics au upanuzi wa mifumo ya ufuatiliaji wa nchi. Chombo cha tatu ni jukwaa la wafadhili kuratibu wafadhili wahisani, wa pande nyingi na wa kiserikali kuhusu kuongezeka kwa umakini wa kisiasa na ufanisi wa ufadhili wa uchunguzi wa Pathogen genomics. Pia jukwaa la wafadhili huchochea ufadhili wa ziada wa ruzuku kwa miradi ya wanachama wa IPSN. Uanzishaji wa IPSN umeungwa mkono na ufadhili wa serikali ya Ujerumani kwa kituo cha magonjwa cha WHO. Kuhusu kituo cha WHO cha ujasusi wa ugonjwa na mlipuko
translations.hypothesis: Shirika la COP na CSUA huleta pamoja mashirika kutoka sekta mbalimbali, viwango tofauti vya kipato, na maeneo mbalimbali, yakiwa na nia ya ushirikiano wa kimataifa na usawa, na pia yana utaalamu mkubwa katika umboji wa jeni (genomics) au katika kuendeleza mifumo ya ufuatiliaji katika ngazi ya kitaifa. Mwili wa tatu ni Jukwaa la Wadhamini (Funders Forum), ambalo huunganisha wafadhili kutoka sekta za hisani, mashirika mengi, na serikali ili kuongeza umakini wa kisiasa na ufanisi wa fedha katika ufuatiliaji wa umboji wa jeni wa magonjwa. Jukwaa la Wadhamini pia huongeza ufadhili wa ziada kwa miradi ya wanachama wa IPSN. Uanzishwaji wa IPSN umesaidiwa na ufadhili kutoka serikali ya Ujerumani kwa Kituo cha WHO cha janga. Kuhusu Kituo cha WHO cha Uelewa wa Janga na Epidemiki.

translations.source: Forming part of the WHO Health Emergencies Programme, the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence (the WHO Pandemic Hub), facilitates a global collaboration of partners from multiple sectors that supports countries and stakeholders to address future pandemic and epidemic risks with better access to data, better analytical capacities, and better tools and insights for decision-making. With support from the Government of the Federal Republic of Germany, the WHO Pandemic Hub was established in September 2021 in Berlin, in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, which demonstrated weaknesses around the world in how countries detect, monitor and manage public health threats. The WHO Pandemic Hub works closely with Member States and WHO regional and country offices to strengthen their data-sharing capacities and enable partners from around the world to collaborate and co-create tools to gather and analyse data for early warning surveillance. With a presence in more than 150 countries, six regional offices, and its Geneva headquarters, WHO’s reach gives us the ability to treat pandemic, epidemic and public health risks with equal urgency and diligence around the globe. By linking local, regional, and global initiatives, the WHO Pandemic Hub fosters a collaborative environment for innovators, scientists and experts from across a wide spectrum of disciplines, allowing us to leverage and share cutting-edge technology and anchoring our work in the needs of stakeholders around the world.
translations.reference: Kama sehemu ya mpango wa dharura wa afya wa WHO, kitovu cha ujasusi wa ugonjwa na milipuko (kituo cha magonjwa cha WHO), huwezesha ushirikiano wa kimataifa wa washirika katika sekta nyingi ambazo zinasaidia nchi na wadau kushughulikia hatari za majanga na magonjw ya siku zijazo kwa ufikiaji bora wa data, uwezo bora wa uchanganuzi, na zana bora na maarifa ya kufanya maamuzi. Kw msaada wa serikali ya shirikisho la Ujerumani, kituo cha magonjwa cha WHO kilianzishwa mnamo Septemba 2021 huko Belini, ili kukabiliana na janga la UVIKO-19, ambalo linaonyesha udhaifu kote ulimwenguni katika jinsi nchi hugundua, kufuatilia na kudhibiti vitisho vya afya ya umma. KItuo cha magonjwa cha WHO kinafaya kazi kwa karibu na nchi wanachama na ofisi za WHO za kikanda na nchiili kuimarisha uwezo wao wa kushiriki data na kuwawezesha washirika kutoka kutoka Duniani kote kushirikiana na kuunda zana za kukusanya na kuchambua data kwa ajili ya ufuatiliaji wa onyo la mapema. Ikiwa na uwepo katika zaidi ya nchi 150, ofisi sita za kikanda, na makao yake makuu ya Jeniva, ufikisji wa WHO hutupatia uwezo wa kutibu hatari za janga, mlipuko na afya ya umma kwa haraka na bidii sawa kote ulimwenguni. Kwa kuunganisha mipango ya nchi, kikanda na kimataifa, kituo cha magonjwa cha WHO kinakuza mazingira shirikishi kwa wavumbuzi, wanasayansi na wataalamu kutoka katika nyanja mbalimbali za taaluma, na kuturuhusu kuimarisha na kushiriki teknolojia ya kisasa na kuimarisha kazi yetu katika mahitaji wa wadau Duniani kote.
translations.hypothesis: Kituo cha WHO kwa Ajili ya Uelewa wa Janga na Epidemiki (kifuatacho kama Kituo cha WHO cha Janga), ambacho ni sehemu ya Mpango wa Dhaifu za Afya za WHO, huwezesha ushirikiano wa kimataifa kati ya washirika kutoka sekta mbalimbali, na husaidia nchi na wadau kushughulikia hatari za jumuiya na magonjwa ya kuenea kwa urahisi kwa kuongeza upatikanaji wa data, uwezo bora wa uchambuzi, na zana na ufahamu bora wa kufanya maamuzi. Kwa usaidizi kutoka Serikali ya Shirikisho la Ujerumani, Kituo cha WHO cha Janga kilianzishwa mnamo Septemba 2021 mjini Berlin, kama jibu kwa janga la COVID-19, ambalo lilionyesha udhaifu duniani kote katika jinsi nchi zinavyogundua, kufuatilia, na kusimamia hatari za afya ya umma. Kituo cha WHO cha Janga hufanya kazi kwa karibu na Nchi Wanachama na ofisi za kikanda na za nchi za WHO ili kuimarisha uwezo wao wa kushiriki data, na kuwezesha washirika kutoka kote ulimwenguni kushirikiana na kuunda pamoja zana za kukusanya na kuchambua data kwa ajili ya ufuatiliaji wa mapema. Kwa uwepo katika zaidi ya nchi 150, ofisi sita za kikanda, na makao makuu yake mjini Geneva, uwezo wa WHO hutuwezesha kushughulikia hatari za jumuiya, magonjwa ya kuenea kwa urahisi, na afya ya umma kwa dharura na umakini sawa kote ulimwenguni. Kwa kuunganisha mipango ya ndani, kikanda, na kimataifa, Kituo cha WHO cha Janga huunda mazingira ya ushirikiano kwa wataalamu, wanasayansi, na wataalam kutoka katika fani mbalimbali, na hivyo kutuwezesha kutumia na kushiriki teknolojia ya kisasa na kuhakikisha kwamba kazi yetu inazingatia mahitaji ya wadau kote ulimwenguni.

translations.source: Building on expertise across disciplines, sectors, and regions, it will leverage WHO’s convening power to foster global solutions built on an architecture of global collaboration and trust.
translations.reference: Ikijengwa juu ya utaalamu katika taaluma, sekta, na kanda, itaongeza nguvu ya kuitisha ya WHO kukuza masuluhisho ya kimataifa yaliyojengwa juu ya usanifu wa ushirikiano wa kimataifa na uaminifu.
translations.hypothesis: Kwa kutumia uzoefu unaopatikana katika fani mbalimbali, sekta tofauti, na maeneo mbalimbali, shirika hilo litatumia uwezo wake wa kuleta pamoja watu ili kukuza suluhisho za kimataifa ambazo zitatumika kwa msingi wa ushirikiano na imani ya pamoja.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly to focus on “saving lives, driving health for all” as WHO turns 75 As the world faces ongoing health and humanitarian emergencies, the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly will focus on driving forward health for all. This year’s session of the World Health Assembly will determine the immediate and longer-term future of WHO, starting with the program budget for the next two years, key decisions about the sustainable financing of the Organization and changes put in place to improve WHO’s processes and accountability. Delegates will also deliberate about the critical role that WHO has in the Global Health Emergency Architecture. The backdrop to these issues is the organization’s 75th anniversary, with the highlights of its collective global health achievements since WHO’s creation in 1948.
translations.reference: Mkutano wa sabini na sita wa afya Ulimwenguni kuangazia "Kuokoa maisha, kutoa afya kwa wote" wakati WHO inatimiza miaka 75 Wakati Dunia inakabiliwa na dharura zinazoendelea za afya na Kibinadamu, mkutano wa sabini na sita wa afya Duniani utazingatia kuendeleza afya kwa wote. Kikao cha mwaka huu cha baraza la afya Duniani kitaamua mustakabali wa haraka na wa muda mrefu wa WHO, kuanzia bajeti ya programu kwa miaka miwili ijayo, maamuzi muhimu kuhusu ufadhili endelevu wa shirika hilo na mabadiliko yaliwekwa ili kuboresha michakato ya WHO na uwajibikaji. Pia wajumbe watajadili kuhusu jukumu muhimu ambalo WHO inalo katika usanifu wa dharura wa afya ya Ulimwengu. Msingi wa masuala haya ni maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya shirika hilo, pamoja na mambo muhimu ya mafanikio yake ya pamoja ya afya Duniani tangu kuundwa kwa WHO mwaka 1948.
translations.hypothesis: Mkutano wa 76 wa Baraza la Afya la Dunia utazingatia "kuokoa maisha na kukuza afya kwa wote," huku Shirika la Afya la Dunia (WHO) likiwa na miaka 75. Huku dunia ikiendelea kukumbana na dharura za kiafya na kibinadamu, Mkutano wa 76 wa Baraza la Afya la Dunia utalenga kukuza afya kwa wote. Mkutano wa mwaka huu wa Baraza la Afya la Dunia utaamua mustakabali wa mara moja na wa muda mrefu wa WHO, kuanzia na bajeti ya programu ya miaka miwili ijayo, maamuzi muhimu kuhusu utoaji wa fedha endelevu kwa Shirika hilo, na mabadiliko yaliyotolewa ili kuboresha taratibu na uwajibikaji wa WHO. Wawakilishi pia watajadili jukumu muhimu ambalo WHO lina katika mfumo wa kimataifa wa kukabiliana na dharura za kiafya. Msingi wa masuala haya ni maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya shirika hilo, pamoja na mafanikio yake mbalimbali katika afya ya kimataifa tangu kuanzishwa kwa WHO mwaka wa 1948.

translations.source: It will review last year’s progress, accomplishments and challenges along with future priorities across the key pillars of WHO’s work: Universal Health Coverage, Emergencies, Promoting Health and Well-being. WHA76 will convene 21-30 May at the Palais des Nations in Geneva. “As we mark WHO’s 75th anniversary, we can be proud of our past achievements, but we must be mindful of lessons learned, as we transition from the emergency phase of COVID-19, and create a future where every person has access to the health services they need,” said Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “This means strengthening the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response and resilience, supporting countries on the road to universal health coverage, and building a stronger, sustainably-funded and accountable WHO. "To kickstart WHA76 on Sunday 21 May, the fourth edition of Walk the Talk: Health for All challenge will start at Place des Nations at 8:30 am CEST (warm-up starts at 7:30 am CEST), to promote physical and mental health and celebrate the importance of partnership during the WHO’s 75th anniversary.
translations.reference: Itakagua maendeleo ya mwaka jana, mafanikio na changamoto pamoja na vipaumbele vya siku zijazo katika nguzo muhimu za kazi za WHO: Huduma ya afya kwa wote, dharura, kukuza afya na ustawi. WHA 76 utafanyika tarehe 21-30 Mei katika Palais des Nations huko Jeniva. "Tunapoadhimisha miaka 75 ya WHO, tunaweza kujivunia mafanikio yetu ya zamani, lakini lazima tuzingatie mafunzo tuliyojifunza, tunapohama kutoka awamu ya dharura ya UVIKO-19, na kuunda mustakabali ambapo kila mtu anaweza kupata huduma za afya wanazostahitaji", alisema mkurugenzi mkuu Dkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Hii ina maanisha kuimarisha usanifu wa kimataifa wa maandalizi ya dharura ya afya, muitikio na ustahimilivu, kusaidia nchi kwenye njia ya kufikia huduma ya afya kwa wote, na kujenga WHO yenye nguvu, inayofadhiliwa na kuwajibika. Ili kuanza WHA 76 siku ya Jumapili 21 Mei, toleo la nne la Walk the Talk: Afya kwa changamoto zote litaanza Place des Nations saa 8:30 asubuhi CEST (maandalizi huanza saa 7:30 asubuhi CEST), ili kukuza afya ya mwili na akili na kusherehekea umuhimu wa ushirikiano wakati wa maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya WHO.
translations.hypothesis:
Mkutano huo utaangazia maendeleo, mafanikio na changamoto za mwaka uliopita, pamoja na vipaumbele vya siku zijazo katika nguzo kuu za kazi za WHO: Ufidhulisi wa Afya kwa Wote, Dhaifu, Kukuza Afya na Ustawi. Mkutano wa WHA76 utafanyika kuanzia Mei 21 hadi 30 katika Jengo la Palais des Nations mjini Geneva.

"Tukiadhimisha miaka 75 ya WHO, tunaweza kujivunia mafanikio yetu ya zamani, lakini lazima tujikumbuke masomo ambayo tumeyapata, tunapohamia kutoka katika hatua ya dharura ya COVID-19, na tuunda mustakabali ambapo kila mtu atapata huduma za afya anazohitaji," alisema Mkurugenzi Mkuu, Dk. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Hii inamaanisha kuimarisha mfumo wa kimataifa wa utayarifu, majibu na uimara katika kesi za dharura za afya, kusaidia nchi katika safari yao ya kufikia ufidhulisi wa afya kwa wote, na kujenga WHO yenye nguvu, inayofadhiliwa kwa uendelevu na inayowajibika."

Ili kuanzisha rasmi mkutano wa WHA76 siku ya Jumapili, Mei 21, toleo la nne la kampeni "Walk the Talk: Health for All" litafanyika katika eneo la Place des Nations kuanzia saa 8:30 asubuhi (mazoezi ya awali yataanza saa 7:30 asubuhi), ili kukuza afya ya kimwili na ya akili na kusherehekea umuhimu wa ushirikiano wakati wa maadhimisho ya miaka 75 ya WHO.

translations.source: At about 2:00 pm CEST, following a family photo with Heads of Delegations, the Assembly high-level welcome at Palais des Nations will feature speeches from the WHO Director-General, Heads of State and special guests. List of speakers below). During this session, the DG will present life-time achievement awards to two global health leaders. On Monday 22 May, the Director-General will give his main address at approximately 10:00 am. On Friday, 26 May, the WHO Director-General will be joined by representatives of five global foundations, to present five public health awards and prizes to the seven laureates for 2023. They come from Bahrain, China, Guatemala, Lebanon, Nepal, Thailand and the Philippines.
translations.reference: Saa 2:00 usiku CEST, kufuatia picha ya familia na wakuu wa Wajumbe, Bunge la kukaribishwa kwa kiwango cha juu huko Palais des Nations litakuwa na hotuba kutoka kwa kurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Wakuu wa Nchi na wageni maalum. Orodha ya wasemaji hapa chini). Wakati wa kikao hiki, DG atatoa tuzo za mafanikio ya maisha ya viongozi wawili wa afya Duniani. Jumatatu tarehe 22 Mei, mkurugenzi mkuu atatoa hotuba yake kuu takribani saa 10:00 asubuhi. Mnamo Ijumaa, Mei 26, Mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO ataungana na wawakilishi wa taasisi tano za kimataifa, kutoa tuzo tano za afya ya umma na zawadi kwa washindi saba wa 2023. Wanatoka Bahrain, China, Guatemala, Lebanoni, Nepali, Thailand na Ufilipino.
translations.hypothesis: Takriban saa 2:00 PM (saa za Ulaya Magharibi), baada ya kupiga picha za pamoja na viongozi wa makongamano, sherehe ya karibuni ya mkutano huo itakayofanyika katika Palais des Nations itajumuisha hotuba kutoka kwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, viongozi wa nchi, na wageni maalum (orodha ya wasemaji imetajwa hapa chini). Katika kikao hiki, Mkurugenzi Mkuu atatoa tuzo za heshima kwa viongozi wawili muhimu katika afya ya kimataifa. Mnamo Jumatatu, Mei 22, Mkurugenzi Mkuu atatoa hotuba yake kuu takriban saa 10:00 AM. Mnamo Ijumaa, Mei 26, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO atakuwa pamoja na wawakilishi wa mashirika matano ya kimataifa, ili kuwasilisha tuzo na zawadi tano za afya ya umma kwa washindi saba wa mwaka wa 2023. Washindi hao wanatoka Bahrain, China, Guatemala, Lebanon, Nepal, Thailand, na Philippines.

translations.source: Key issues Key discussions and decisions are expected on: A review of WHOs work in health emergencies, including the International Health Regulations and strengthening WHO preparedness for and response to health emergencies; Strategies and global action on areas such as women’s, children’s and adolescents’ health, rehabilitation, universal health coverage and primary health care, traditional medicine, infection prevention and control, substandard and falsified medicines, health of refugees and migrants, non-communicable diseases, mental health, social determinants, nutrition and disabilities; Approval of the WHO Programme Budget for 2024-2025, including the decision to increase assessed contributions and other matters emanating from the Working Group on Sustainable Financing.
translations.reference: Masuala muhimu Majadiliano na maamuzi muhimu yanayotarajiwa ni kuhusu: Mapitio ya kazi za WHO katika dharura za afya, ikiwa ni pamoja na kanuni z afya za kimataifa na kuimarisha utayari wa WHO kwa na kukabiliana na dharura za kiafya; Mikakati na hatua za kimataifa kuhusu maeneo kama vile afya ya wanawake, watoto na vijana, ukarabati, huduma ya afya kwa wote na huduma ya msingi ya afya, tiba asilia, kinga na udhibti wa maambukizi, dawa duni na potofu, afya ya wakimbizi na wahamiaji, magonjwa yasiyoambukiza; afya ya akili; viashiria vya kijamii, lishe na Ulemavu; Kupitishwa kwa bajeti ya mpango wa WHO ya 2024-2025, ikijumuisha uamuzi wa kuongeza michango,iliyotathminiwa na masuala mengine yanayotokana na kikundi kazi cha ufadhili endelevu.
translations.hypothesis: Masuala muhimu: Majadiliano na maamuzi muhimu yanatarajiwa kuhusiana na: Ukaguzi wa kazi ya Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) katika hali za dharura za afya, ikiwa ni pamoja na Kanuni za Kimataifa za Afya na kuimarisha uwezo wa WHO wa kujiandaa na kujibu hali za dharura za afya; Mikakati na hatua za kimataifa katika maeneo kama vile afya ya wanawake, watoto na vijana, urekebishaji, huduma za afya za kila mtu, huduma za afya za msingi, dawa za jadi, kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi, dawa za ubora duni na za bandia, afya ya wakimbizi na wahamiaji, magonjwa yasiyoambukiza, afya ya akili, mambo ya kijamii yanayoathiri afya, lishe na ulemavu; Idhini ya Bajeti ya Programu ya WHO kwa mwaka wa 2024-2025, ikiwa ni pamoja na uamuzi wa kuongeza michango iliyopangwa na masuala mengine yanayotokana na Kikundi Kazi cha Ufadhili Endelevu.

translations.source: Daily Strategic roundtables will take place at lunch time from Monday to Saturday in Room XVIII. These events will host discussions among assembly delegates, partner agencies, representatives of civil society and WHO experts on public health priorities. Sessions run from 22-27 May, from 13:00 to 14:15 CEST and can be followed online. As WHO’s highest decision-making body, the Health Assembly sets out the Organization’s policy and approves its budget. WHA is attended by delegations from all WHO 194 Member States.
translations.reference: Meza za duara za kimkakati kila siku zitafanyika wakati wa chakua cha mchana kuanzia Jumatatu hadi Jumamosi katika chumba namba XVIII. Matukio haya yataandaa mijadala, kati ya wajumbe wa mkutano, mashirika washirika, wawakilishi wa Asasi za kiraia na wataalamu wa WHO kuhusu vipaumbele vya afya ya umma. Vipindi vitaanza tarehe 22-27 Mei, 13:00 hdi 14:15 CEST na vinaweza kufuatiliwa mtandaoni. Kama chombo cha juu zaidi cha kufanya maamuzi cha WHO, baraza la afya linaweka sera ya shirika na kuidhinisha bajeti yake. WHA inahudhuriwa na wajumbe kutoka nchi 194 wanachama wa WHO.
translations.hypothesis: Mikutano ya kila siku ya majadiliano ya kimkakati itafanyika wakati wa chakula cha mchana kuanzia Jumatatu hadi Jumamosi katika Ukumbi XVIII. Mikutano hii italeta pamoja wawakilishi wa baraza, mashirika washirika, wawakilishi wa jamii ya raia na wataalamu wa WHO ili kujadili masuala muhimu ya afya ya umma. Vikao vitafanyika kuanzia Mei 22 hadi 27, kuanzia saa 13:00 hadi 14:15 (saa za Ulaya Kati), na vinaweza kufuatiliwa mtandaoni. Kama chombo kikuu cha kufanya maamuzi cha WHO, Baraza la Afya huunda sera za Shirika na kuidhinisha bajeti yake. Mkutano wa WHA hushirikiwa na ujumbe kutoka nchi zote 194 ambazo ni wanachama wa WHO.

translations.source: The Health Assembly’s agenda is preceded by the 30th meeting of the Programme, Budget and Administration Committee of the Executive Board, which will meet on 17-19 May, 2023. After the Assembly, the 153th meeting of the Executive Board will take place from 31 May to 1 June. The Health Assembly is open to registered and accredited Member States, Associate Members, Observers, invited representatives of the UN and other participating inter-governmental organizations and non-State actors. WHA76 will be webcast live from the WHO website. The provisional agenda, preliminary timetable, Assembly documents and daily journal can be accessed here.Media accreditation and updates for the World Health Assembly
translations.reference: Ajenda ya baraza la afya inatanguliwa na mkutano wa 30 wa kamati ya programu, bajeti na utawala ya halmashauri kuu, ambayo itakutana tarehe 17-19 Mei, 2023. Baada ya baraza, mkutano wa 153 wa halmashauri kuu utafanyika kuanzia tarehe 31 Mei hadi tarehe 1 Juni. Baraza la afya liko wazi kwa nchi wanachama zilizosajiliwa na zilizoidhinishwa, wanachama washiriki, waangalizi, wawakilishi walioalikwa wa UN na mashirika mengine ya kiserikali na watendaji wasio wa kiserikali wanashiriki. WHA76 itarushwa moja kwa moja kutoka kwa tovuti ya WHO. Ajenda ya muda, ratiba ya awali, hati za Bunge na jarida la siku zinaweza kupatikana hapa. Uidhinishaji wa vyombo vya habari na masasisho kwa ajili ya Bunge la Afya Duniani
translations.hypothesis: Ajenda ya Mkutano wa Afya itangamizwa na mkutano wa 30 wa Kamati ya Programu, Bajeti na Utawala ya Bodi Kuu, ambao utafanyika kuanzia tarehe 17 hadi 19 Mei, 2023. Baada ya mkutano huo, mkutano wa 153 wa Bodi Kuu utafanyika kuanzia tarehe 31 Mei hadi 1 Juni. Mkutano wa Afya unawakaribisha nchi wanachama zilizosajiliwa na zilizoidhinishwa, wanachama wenza, wadhibiti, wawakilishi walioalikwa kutoka Umoja wa Mataifa na mashirika mengine ya kimataifa yanayoshiriki, pamoja na wadau wengine ambao si serikali. Mkutano wa WHA76 utasomewa moja kwa moja kupitia tovuti ya WHO. Ajenda ya awali, ratiba ya awali, nyaraka za mkutano, na taarifa za kila siku zinaweza kupatikana hapa. Maelezo kuhusu uthibitishaji wa vyombo vya habari na taarifa za hivi punde kuhusu Mkutano wa Afya wa Kimataifa.

translations.source: Media accreditation for WHA76 will be handled by the United Nations of Geneva. Register via Indico. To collect your badge: On Friday 19 May (working hours: 9:00 am to 16:30 pm CEST) at Villa Feuillantines, Place des Nations . Details and address : https://unece.org/important-information-how-obtain-your-badge On Saturday 20 May: UN Palais des Nations at Pregny Gate (opposite ICRC Building) from 13:00 to 17:00 CEST. On Sunday 21 May, you shall collect your media badge at the UN Palais des Nations at Pregny Gate (opposite ICRC Building) from 9:00am to 16:00 pm CEST
translations.reference: Idhini ya vyombo vya habari kwa WHA76 itashughulikiwa na Umoja wa mataifa wa Geneva. Kujiandikisha kupitia Indico. Kukusanya beji yako: Ijumaa tarehe 19 Mei (saa za kazi: 9:00 asubuhi hadi 16:30 jioni CEST, katika Villa Feuillantines, Place des Nations. Maelezo na anwani: https://unece.org/important-information-how-obtain-your-badge Jumamosi tarehe 20 Mei: UN palais des Nations katika Predny Gate (mkabala na jengo la ICRC) kuanzia saa 13:00 hadi 17:00 CEST. Jumapili tarehe 21 Mei, utajipatia beji yako ya vyombo vya habari katika Umoja wa mataifa palais des Nations kwenye Pregny Gate (mkabala na jengo la ICRC) kuanzia saa 9:00 asubuhi hadi16:00 jioni CEST.
translations.hypothesis: Uthibitisho wa vyombo vya habari kwa mkutano wa WHA76 utasimamiwa na Umoja wa Mataifa wa Geneva. Jisajili kupitia mfumo wa Indico. Ili kupata kitambulisho chako: Ijumaa, Mei 19 (saa za kazi: 9:00 asubuhi hadi 16:30 jioni, saa za Ulaya Magharibi - CEST) katika Villa Feuillantines, Place des Nations. Maelezo na anwani: https://unece.org/important-information-how-obtain-your-badge. Jumamosi, Mei 20: katika Jengo la Umoja wa Mataifa la Palais des Nations, mlango wa Pregny (kwa upande wa jengo la ICRC), kuanzia saa 13:00 hadi 17:00, saa za Ulaya Magharibi (CEST). Jumapili, Mei 21, utapata kitambulisho chako cha vyombo vya habari katika Jengo la Umoja wa Mataifa la Palais des Nations, mlango wa Pregny (kwa upande wa jengo la ICRC), kuanzia saa 9:00 asubuhi hadi 16:00 jioni, saa za Ulaya Magharibi (CEST).

translations.source: Next week - 22-26 May- to collect the media badges: Villa Les Feuillantines at Place des Nations. Updates on the Health Assembly will be posted on the WHO website and relevant materials will be sent to the global media list. Register for updates. Photographs and videos WHO photos are available for media use via the WHO photo library.
translations.reference: Wiki ijayo - 22-26 Mei- kukusanya beji za vyombo vya habari: Villa Les Feuillantines katika Place des Nations. Masasisho kwenye baraza la afya yatachapishwa kwenye tovuti ya WHO na nyaraka muhimu zitatumwa kwa orodha ya vyombo vya habari vya kimataifa. Kujiandikishs kwa sasisho. Picha na Video Picha za WHO zinapatikana kwa matumizi ya vyombo vya habari kupitia maktaba ya picha ya WHO.
translations.hypothesis: Wiki ijayo - kuanzia tarehe 22 hadi 26 Mei - ili kuchukua vibali vya vyombo vya habari: katika eneo la Villa Les Feuillantines, lililopo Place des Nations. Habari za hivi punde kuhusu Mkutano wa Afya zitapachikwa kwenye tovuti ya WHO, na nyenzo muhimu zitatumwa kwa orodha ya vyombo vya habari duniani kote. Jisajili ili kupokea taarifa za hivi punde. Picha na video: Picha za WHO zinapatikana kwa matumizi ya vyombo vya habari kupitia maktaba ya picha ya WHO.

translations.source: Register once for media access to the WHO photo library by clicking “media registration” on this page. For questions related to WHO photos email [email protected] Recorded broadcast video material and other press content will be available for media to download on Canto. For any questions related to live video transmission please email [email protected]. Social mediaWHO will provide regular updates from the World Health Assembly via Twitter –follow @WHO and hashtag #WHA76.Follow WHO’s other social media accounts for updates from #WHA76: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube
translations.reference: Jisajili mara moja kwa ufikiaji wa vyombo vya habari kwa maktaba ya picha ya WHO kwa kubofya "usajili wa vyombo vya habari" kwenye ukurasa huu. Kwa maswali yanayohusiana na barua pepe ya picha za WHO [barua pepe imelindwa] Nyenzo za video zilizorekodiwa na maudhui mengine ya vyombo vya habari yatapatikana kwa vyombo vya habari kupakua kwenye Canto. Kwa maswli yoyote yanayohusiana na utangazaji wa video mbashara tafadhali tuma barua pepe [barua pepe imehifadhiwa]. Mitandao ya kijamii WHO itatoa taarifa za mara kwa mara kutoka kwa Bunge la Afya Ulimwenguni kupitia Twitter- fuata @WHO na alama ya reli #WHA76.Fuata akaunti zingine za mitandao ya kijamii za WHO kwa sasisho kutoka #WHA76: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube
translations.hypothesis: Jisajili mara moja ili upate ufikiaji wa picha za Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) kwa kubofya "usajili wa vyombo vya habari" kwenye ukurasa huu. Kwa maswali yoyote kuhusu picha za WHO, tafadhali tuma barua pepe kwa [email protected].  Vifaa vya video vilivyorekodiwa na nyenzo zingine za habari zitapatikana kwa vyombo vya habari ili kuzipakua kwenye jukwaa la Canto. Kwa maswali yoyote kuhusu usambazaji wa video moja kwa moja, tafadhali tuma barua pepe kwa [email protected]. Vyombo vya habari vya kijamii: WHO itatoa taarifa za kawaida kutoka kwa Mkutano wa Baraza la Afya Duniani (World Health Assembly) kupitia Twitter – fuatilieni @WHO na tumia hashtag #WHA76. Fuatilieni akaunti zingine za WHO za vyombo vya habari vya kijamii ili kupata taarifa kutoka #WHA76: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube.

translations.source: Urgent action needed to tackle stalled progress on health-related Sustainable Development Goals WHO is releasing the 2023 edition of its annual World Health Statistics report with new figures on the impact of COVID-19 pandemic and the latest statistics on progress towards the health-related Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). The report with data up to 2022 underscores a stagnation of health progress on key health indicators in recent years compared with trends seen during 2000-2015. It also alerts us to the growing threat of noncommunicable diseases (NCDs) and climate change, and calls for a coordinated and strengthened response. COVID-19 cost in lost lives and health progress The report documents updated statistics on the toll of the pandemic on global health, contributing to the ongoing decline in progress towards the SDGs.
translations.reference: Hatua za haraka zinahitajika ili kukabiliana na maendeleo yaliyokwama kwenye malengo ya maendeleo endelevu yanayohusiana na afya. WHO inachapisha toleo la 2023 la ripoti yake ya kila mwaka ya Takwimu za afya Duniani yenye takwimu kuhusu athari za janga la UVIKO-19 na takwimu za hivi karibuni kuhusu malengo ya mendeleo endelevu (SDGs) yanayohusiana na afya. Ripoti iliyo na Data hadi 2022 inasisitiza kudorora kwa maendeleo ya afya kwenye viashiria muhimu vya afya katika miaka ya hivi karibuni ikilinganishwa na mitindo iliyoonekana katika 2000-2015. Pia inatutahadharisha kuhusu tishio linaloongezeka la magonjwa yasiyo yakuambukiza (NCDs) na mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, na kutoa wito wa muitikio ulioratibiwa na kuimarishwa. UVIKO-19 imegharimu maisha na maendeleo ya kiafya, ripoti hiyo inaandika takwimu zinazohusishwa kuhusu hali ya janga hili kwenye afya kimataifa, na hivyo kuchangia kupungua kwa maendeleo kuelekea SDGs.
translations.hypothesis: Hatua za haraka zinahitajika ili kushughulikia ukoma wa maendeleo katika malengo ya Maendeleo Endelevu yanayohusiana na afya. Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) linachapisha toleo la mwaka wa 2023 la ripoti yake ya kila mwaka ya Takwimu za Afya Duniani, ambayo ina takwimu mpya kuhusu athari za janga la COVID-19 na takwimu za hivi punde kuhusu maendeleo kuelekea malengo ya Maendeleo Endelevu (SDGs) yanayohusiana na afya. Ripoti hiyo, ambayo ina data hadi mwaka wa 2022, inaonyesha kwamba maendeleo ya afya yamekwama katika miaka ya hivi karibuni, ikilinganishwa na mwelekeo uliokuwa unashuhudiwa kati ya mwaka wa 2000 na 2015. Pia, ripoti hiyo inatuonya kuhusu hatari inayokua ya magonjwa yasiyoambukiza (NCDs) na mabadiliko ya tabianchi, na inatoa wito wa majibu ya umoja na yenye nguvu. Gharama za COVID-19: Maisha yaliyopotea na maendeleo ya afya. Ripoti hiyo ina takwimu zilizosasishwa kuhusu athari za janga hilo kwenye afya ya kimataifa, na hivyo kuchangia kupungua kwaendeleo kuelekea malengo ya SDGs.

translations.source: During 2020-2021, COVID-19 resulted in a staggering 336.8 million years of life lost globally. This equates to an average of 22 years of life lost for every excess death, abruptly and tragically cutting short the lives of millions of people. Since 2000, we saw significant improvements in maternal and child health with deaths falling by one-third and one-half, respectively. The incidence of infectious diseases such as HIV, tuberculosis (TB) and malaria also declined, along with a lowered risk of premature deaths from NCDs and injuries. Together, these contributed to an increase in global life expectancy from 67 years in 2000 to 73 years in 2019.
translations.reference: Katika kipindi cha 2020-2021, UVIKO-19 ilisababisha vifo vya kushangaza vya miaka milioni 336.8 Duniani kote. Hii ni sawa na wastani wa miaka 22 ya maisha kupotea kwa kila kifo kupita kiasi, ghafla na kwa kusikitisha kukatisha maisha ya mamilioni ya watu. Tangu mwaka 2000, tuliona maboresho makubwa katika afya ya uzazi na watoto huku vifo vikishuka kwa theluthi moja na nusu mtawalia. Matukio ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza kama vile VVU, kifua kikuu (TB) na Malaria pia yalipungua, pamoja na kupungua kwa hatari ya vifo vya mapema kutokana na NCDs na majeruhi. Kwa pamoja, haya yalichangia ongezeko la umri wa kuishi Duniani kutoka miaka 67 mwaka 2000 hadi 73 mwaka 2019.
translations.hypothesis: Katika kipindi cha 2020-2021, janga la COVID-19 lilisababisha kupoteza miaka milioni 336.8 ya maisha duniani. Hii inamaanisha kwamba, kwa wastani, kila mtu aliyefariki kutokana na janga hilo, alipoteza miaka 22 ya maisha, na hivyo kukatisha maisha ya mamilioni ya watu kwa ghafla na kwa kusikitisha. Tangu mwaka 2000, tumeshuhudia maendeleo makubwa katika afya ya mama na watoto, ambapo vifo vimepungua kwa theluthi moja na nusu, mtawalia. Pia, idadi ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza kama vile HIV, kifua kikuu (TB), na malaria ilipungua, pamoja na kupungua kwa hatari ya vifo vya mapema kutokana na magonjwa sugu na majeraha. Pamoja, mambo haya yamechangia kuongezeka kwa wastani wa maisha duniani, kutoka miaka 67 mwaka 2000 hadi miaka 73 mwaka 2019.

translations.source: However, the pandemic has put many health-related indicators further off-track and contributed to inequalities in access to high-quality health care, routine immunizations and financial protection. As a result, improving trends in malaria and TB have been reversed, and fewer people were treated for neglected tropical diseases (NTDs). “The World Health Statistics is WHO’s annual check-up on the state of the world’s health. The report sends a stark message on the threat of noncommunicable diseases, which take an immense and increasing toll on lives, livelihoods, health systems, communities, economies and societies,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “The report calls for a substantial increase in investments in health and health systems to get back on track towards the Sustainable Development Goals.”
translations.reference: Hata hivyo, janga hili limeweka viashiria vingi vinavyohusiana na afya mbali zaidi na kuachangia ukosefu wa usawa katika upatikanaji wa huduma za afya za hali ya juu, chanjo za kawaida na ulinzi wa kifedha. Matokeo yake, uboreshaji wa mwelekeo wa Malaria na TB umebadilishwa, na watu wachache walitibiwa magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyosahaulika (NTDs). "Takwimu za afya ulimwenguni ni ukaguzi wa kila mwaka wa WHO juu ya hali ya afya ya Ulimwenguni. Rioti hiyo inatoa ujumbe mzito kuhusu tishio la magonjwa yasiyoambukiza, ambayo yanaathiri sana maisha, mifumo ya afya, jumuia, uchumi na jamii", alisema Dkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO. "Ripoti hiyo inataka ongezeko kubwa la uwekezaji katika mifumo ya afya na afya ili kurejea katika muelekeo wa malengo ya maendeleo endelevu"
translations.hypothesis: Hata hivyo, janga hilo limepelekea viashiria vingi vya afya kuwa hatari zaidi na limechangia ukosefu wa usawa katika upataji wa huduma bora za afya, chanjo za kawaida, na ulinzi wa kifedha. Kutokana na hayo, maendeleo mazuri yaliyokuwa yamefanyika katika udhibiti wa malaria na kifua kimelegea, na watu wachache walipokea matibabu kwa magonjwa ya kigeni yasiyoyeyushwa (NTDs). "Takwimu za Afya za Dunia ni tathmini ya kila mwaka ya WHO kuhusu hali ya afya duniani. Ripoti hii inatoa onyo kali kuhusu hatari ya magonjwa yasiyoambukiza, ambayo yanaathiri sana na yanazidi kuathiri maisha, uwezo wa kuishi, mifumo ya afya, jamii, uchumi, na jamii," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO. "Ripoti hii inatoa wito wa kuongezeka kwa uwekezaji mkubwa katika afya na mifumo ya afya ili kurudi kwenye njia sahihi kuelekea Malengo ya Maendeleo Endelevu."

translations.source: NCDs ̶ an ever-increasing health threat for future generationsDespite overall health progress, the share of deaths caused annually by NCDs has grown consistently and is now claiming nearly three quarters of all lives lost each year. If this trend continues, NCDs are projected to account for about 86% of the 90 million annual deaths by mid-century; consequently, 77 million of these will be due to NCDs – a nearly 90% increase in absolute numbers since 2019. Stagnating progress calls for acceleration More recent trends show signs of slowdown in the annual rate of reduction (ARR) for many indicators. For example, the global maternal mortality ratio needs to decline by 11.6% per year between 2021 and 2030 to meet the SDG target. Similarly, the net reduction in TB incidence from 2015 to 2021 was only one-fifth of the way to the 2025 milestone of WHO’s End TB Strategy.
translations.reference: NCDs - Tishio la kiafya linaloongezeka kwa vizazi vijavyo licha ya maendeleo ya afya kwa ujumla, sehemu ya vifo vinavyosababishwa na magonjwa yasiyoambukiza kila mwaka imeongezeka mara kwa mara na sasa inadai karibu robo tatu ya maisha yote hupoteza kila mwaka. Kama hali hii itaendelea, NCDs yanakadiriwa kuchangia takribani 86% ya vifo milioni 90 vya kila mwaka kufikia katikati ya karne; kwa hiyo milioni 77 kati ya hivi vinatokea na NCDs- karibu ongezeko la 90% la idadi kamili tangu 2019. Maendeleo yanayodumaa yanahitaji kuongeza kasi Mitindo ya hivi karibuni zaidi inaonyesha dalili za kushuka kwa kiwango cha mwaka cha kupunguza (ARR) kwa viashirio vingi. Kwa mfano, uwiano wa vifo vya uzazi Duniani unahitaji kupungua kwa 11.6% kwa mwaka kati ya 2021 na 2030 ili kufikia lengo la SDG. Vilevile, kupungua kwa jumla kwa matukio ya TB kutoka 2015 hadi 2021 ilikuwa moja ya tano tu ya hatua ya 2025 ya mkakati wa kukomesha kifua kikuu wa WHO.
translations.hypothesis:
Magonjwa sugu (NCDs) – tishio linaloongezeka kwa afya kwa vizazi vijavyo.

Licha ya maendeleo ya jumla katika afya, idadi ya vifo vinavyosababishwa na magonjwa sugu kila mwaka imeendelea kuongezeka, na sasa yanaongeza takriban theluthi mbili ya vifo vyote vinavyotokea kila mwaka. Ikiwa hali hii itaendelea, inatarajiwa kwamba magonjwa sugu yataongeza takriban asilimia 86 ya vifo milioni 90 vinavyotokea kila mwaka ifikapo katikati ya karne hii; kwa hivyo, milioni 77 ya vifo hivyo yatakuwa kutokana na magonjwa sugu – ongezeko la takriban asilimia 90 katika idadi halisi tangu mwaka wa 2019. Maendeleo yasiyoboreshwa yanahitaji kuongezwa kasi.

Mawanda ya hivi karibuni yanaonyesha dalili za kupungua kwa kasi ya kupungua (ARR) kwa viashiria vingi. Kwa mfano, uwiano wa vifo vya uzazi duniani unahitaji kupungua kwa asilimia 11.6 kila mwaka kati ya mwaka wa 2021 na 2030 ili kukidhi lengo la SDG. Vile vile, kupungua kwa jumla kwa idadi ya wagonjwa wa kifua kikuu (TB) kutoka mwaka wa 2015 hadi 2021 kulikuwa takriban theluthi moja tu ya lengo lililowekwa kwa mwaka wa 2025 katika mkakati wa WHO wa kumaliza kifua kikuu.

translations.source: Despite a reduction in exposure to many health risks – such as tobacco use, alcohol consumption, violence, unsafe water and sanitation, and child stunting – progress was inadequate and exposure to some risks such as air pollution remains high. Alarmingly, the prevalence of obesity is rising with no immediate sign of reversal. Furthermore, expanded access to essential health services has slowed compared to pre-2015 gains, coupled with no significant progress in reducing financial hardship due to health-care costs. This drastically limits our ability to achieve Universal Health Coverage by 2030. “The COVID-19 pandemic is an important reminder that progress is neither linear nor guaranteed,” warns Dr Samira Asma, WHO Assistant Director-General for Data, Analytics and Delivery for Impact.
translations.reference: Licha ya kupungua kwa uwezekano wa hatari nyingi za kiafya- kama vile matumizi ya Tumbaku, unywaji pombe, Vurugu, na udumavu wa watoto- maendeleo hayakuwa ya kutosha na kukabiliwa na hatari kama vile uchafuzi wa hewa bado upo juu. Cha kutisha, kuenea kwa fetma kuongezeka bila dalili ya haraka ya kubadilika. Zaidi ya hayo, kupanuka kwa upatikanaji wa huduma muhimu za afya kumepungua ikilinganishwa na mafanikio ya kabla ya 2015, pamoja na hakuna maendeleo makubwa katika kupunguza matatizo ya kifedha na gharama za huduma za afya. Hii inapunguza kwa kiasi kikubwa uwezo wetu wa kufikia huduma ya afya kwa wote ifikapo 2030. Janga la UVIKO-19 ni ukumbusho muhimu kwamba maendeleo si ya mstari wala si ya uhakika", anaonya Dkt Samira Asma, mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa WHO kwa Data, uchaguzi, na utoaji wa athari.
translations.hypothesis: Licha ya kupungua kwa hatari nyingi za kiafya – kama vile utumiaji wa tumbaku, matumizi ya pombe, vurugu, maji na usafi usio salama, na ukuaji hafifu wa watoto – maendeleo yaliyopatikana hayakutosha, na hatari zingine kama vile uchafuzi wa hewa bado zinaendelea kuwa kubwa. Kwa kusikitisha, idadi ya watu wenye uzito kupita kiasi inaendelea kuongezeka, na hakuna dalili za mabadiliko ya haraka. Zaidi ya hayo, upatikanaji wa huduma muhimu za afya umeongezeka kwa kasi ndogo kuliko ilivyokuwa kabla ya mwaka wa 2015, pamoja na ukosefu wa maendeleo makubwa katika kupunguza ugumu wa kifedha unaotokana na gharama za huduma za afya. Hii inapunguza sana uwezo wetu wa kufikia huduma za afya kwa kila mtu ifikapo mwaka wa 2030. "Janga la COVID-19 ni kikumbusho muhimu kwamba maendeleo hayakuwa ya moja kwa moja wala yasiyohakikishwa," anasema Dk. Samira Asma, Naibu Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO anayeshughulikia data, uchambuzi na utoaji wa matokeo.

translations.source: “To stay on track towards the 2030 SDG agenda, we must act decisively and collectively to deliver a measurable impact in all countries.” This year’s report includes for the first time a dedicated section on climate change and health, and we anticipate that this will be of more relevance in the report going forward. For this issue and all other areas timely, reliable and disaggregated data are critical to track progress and improve national and global health policies. Editor’s note: The World Health Statistics report is the World Health Organization’s (WHO) annual compilation of the most recent available data on health and health-related indicators. For inquiries, contact [email protected]
translations.reference: "Ili kukaa kwenye mstari kuelekea ajenda ya 2030 ya SDG, lazima tuchukue hatua madhubuti na kwa pamoja ili kuleta athari inayoweza kupimika kwa nchi zote" Ripoti ya mwaka huu inajumuisha kwa mara ya kwanza sehemu maalumu kuhusu mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa na afya, na tunatarajia kwamba hii itakuwa na umuhimu zaidi katika ripoti inayoendelea. Kwa suala hili na maeneo mengine yote kwa wakati, Data ya kuaminika na iliyogawanywa ni muhimu kufuatilia maendeleo na kuboresha sera za afya za kitaifa na kimataifa. Dokezo la mhariri: Ripoti ya takwimu za afya Duniani ni mkusanyo wa kila mwaka wa shirika la afya Duniani (WHO) wa Data zinazopatikana hivi karibuni kuhusu afya na viashirio vinavyohusiana na afya. Kwa maswali, wasiliana na [barua pepe imehifadhiwa]
translations.hypothesis: "Ili tuendelee kufikia malengo ya ajenda ya SDG ya mwaka 2030, lazima tuwe na hatua thabiti na za pamoja ili tupate matokeo yanayoweza kupimika katika nchi zote." Ripoti ya mwaka huu ina sehemu maalum kuhusu mabadiliko ya tabianchi na afya, na tunatarajia kuwa sehemu hii itakuwa muhimu zaidi katika ripoti zijazo. Kwa suala hili na katika maeneo mengine yote, data sahihi, ya kuaminika, na iliyogawanywa ni muhimu ili kufuatilia maendeleo na kuboresha sera za afya za kitaifa na za kimataifa. Kumbukumbu kutoka kwa mhariri: Ripoti ya Takwimu za Afya Duniani ni mkusanyiko wa kila mwaka wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) wa data ya hivi punde zaidi kuhusu afya na viashiria vinavyohusiana na afya. Kwa maswali, wasiliana kupitia [email protected]

translations.source: WHO Director-General announces Global Health Leaders Awards Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum and Peter Piot awarded for lifelong commitment to health WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus will present two lifetime achievement awards to recognize outstanding contributions to advancing global health during the high-level opening session of the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly. The Director-General’s Global Leaders Awards, which were established in 2019, will go to Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum and Peter Piot. Both recipients are distinguished scientists and public health leaders who were closely involved in the discovery of Ebola virus disease before advancing to leadership positions in global health.
translations.reference: Mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO ataoangoza tuzo za viongozi wa afya Duniani Jean-Jacques-Muyembe-Tamfum na Peter Piot walitunukiwa tuzo ya kujitolea kwa maisha yote kwa afya Mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus atatoa tuzo mbili za mafanikio ya maisha ili kutambua michango bora katika kuendeleza afya Duniani wakati wa ufunguzi wa ngazi ya juu wa mkutano wa Sabini na sita wa afya Duniani. Tuzo za mkurugenzimkuu kwa tuzo za viongozi Duniani, ambazo zilianzishwa mwaka 2019, zitakwenda kwa Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum na Peter Piot. Wapokeaji wote ni wanasayansi mashuhuri na viongozi wa afya ya umma ambao walihusika kwa karibu katika ugunduzi wa virusi vya Ebola kabla ya kusonga mbele hadi nyadhifa za uongozi katika afya ya kimataifa.
translations.hypothesis:
Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) atangaza tuzo za viongozi wa afya duniani. Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum na Peter Piot wanatuzwa kwa kujitolea kwao kwa muda wote katika sekta ya afya.

Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, atatoa tuzo mbili za heshima kwa watu ambao wamefanya mchango mkubwa katika kuendeleza afya duniani, wakati wa kikao cha uzinduzi muhimu cha Mkutano wa 76 wa Shirika la Afya Duniani. Tuzo za viongozi wa afya duniani, ambazo zilianzishwa mwaka wa 2019, zitatolewa kwa Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum na Peter Piot. Wote wawili ni wanasayansi mashuhuri na viongozi wa afya ya umma ambao walihusika sana katika ugunduzi wa ugonjwa wa virusi vya Ebola kabla ya kuendelea na nafasi za uongozi katika sekta ya afya duniani.

translations.source: The award honours their lifetime achievements in public health. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum from the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) is being recognized for his innovation, leadership and ground-breaking contributions to the management and treatment of diseases such as Ebola virus disease. He has played a critical role in improving health outcomes in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, the African region, and the global community. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum is the Director General of the DRC’s National Institute of Biomedical Research in Kinshasa, full Professor of Microbiology at the University of Kinshasa Medical School and the inaugural president of the Congolese Academy of Science. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum was part of the team that discovered the Zaïre ebolavirus during the first recorded outbreak in 1976, in Equateur Province, Central DRC.
translations.reference: Tuzo hiyo inaheshimu mafanikio yao ya maisha katika afya ya umma. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum kutoka Jamhuri ya kidemokrasia ya Kongo (DRC) anatambulika kwa uvumbuzi, uongozi na michango yake ya msingi katika usimamizi na matibabu ya magonjwa kma vile ugonjwa wa Ebola. Amekuwa na jukumu muhimu katika kuboresha matokeo ya afya katika Jamhuri ya kidemokrasia ya kongo, kanda ya Afrika, na jumuia ya kimataifa. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum ni mkurugenzi mkuu wa taasisi ya kitaifa ya utafiti wa Tiba kibiolojia ya DRC huko Kinshasa, profesa kamili wa Biolojia katika chuo kikuu cha Kinshasa shule ya afya na Rais wa kuanzishwa kwa chuo kikuu cha Sayansi cha Kongo. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum alikuwa sehemu ya timu iliyogundua virusi vya Ebola vya Zaire wakati wa mlipuko wa kwanza uliorekodiwa mnmo 1976, katika jimbo la Ikweta, katikati mwa DRC.
translations.hypothesis: Tuzo hiyo inamtambua kwa mafanikio yake ya maisha yote katika afya ya umma. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum kutoka Jamhuri ya Kidemokrasia ya Kongo (DRC) ananong'onwa kwa ubunifu wake, uongozi wake, na michango yake ya msingi katika usimamizi na matibabu ya magonjwa kama vile ugonjwa wa virusi vya Ebola. Amekuwa na jukumu muhimu katika kuboresha matokeo ya afya katika Jamhuri ya Kidemokrasia ya Kongo, eneo la Afrika, na jumuiya ya kimataifa. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum ni Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Taasisi ya Kitaifa ya Utafiti wa Kibayolojia ya DRC iliyoko Kinshasa, Profesa Kamili wa Microbiology katika Shule ya Tiba ya Chuo Kikuu cha Kinshasa, na Rais wa kwanza wa Chuo cha Sayansi cha Kongo. Profesa Muyembe-Tamfum alikuwa miongoni mwa timu iliyogundua virusi vya ebolavirus vya Zaïre wakati wa mlipuko wa kwanza uliorekodiwa mwaka wa 1976, katika Mkoa wa Equateur, Jamhuri ya Kidemokrasia ya Kongo.

translations.source: He later helped design one of the first effective treatments against the virus and the deployment of experimental Ebola virus disease vaccines. He has worked tirelessly to build the Democratic Republic of the Congo’s scientific capacity, establishing multiple research facilities in the country, and has played key roles with WHO in fighting infectious diseases. Professor Piot from Belgium is being recognized for his extraordinary leadership in the response to the HIV/AIDS epidemic and other significant global health challenges. He has played a vital role in launching major global health initiatives such as UNAIDS, the Global Fund, and others that have improved health outcomes around the world. Under his leadership, UNAIDS became the chief advocate for worldwide action against AIDS, also spearheading UN reform by bringing together 10 different UN organizations.
translations.reference: Baadae alisaidia kubuni moja wapo ya matibabu ya kwanza ya ufanisi dhidi ya virusi na kupelekwa kwa chanjo ya majaribio ya ugonjwa wa Ebola. Amefanya kazi bila kuchoka kujenga uwezo wa kisayansi wa Jamhuri ya kidemokraia ya Kongo, kuanzisha vituo vingi vya utafiti nchini humo, na amefanya majukumu muhimu na WHO katika kupambana na magonjwa ya kuambukiza. Profesa Piot kutoka Ubelgiji anatambuliwa kwa uongozi wa ajabu katika kukabiliana na janga la VVU/ UKIMWI na changamoto nyingine muhimu za afya Duniani. Amekuwa na jukumu muhimu katika kuzindua mipango mikuu ya afya ya kimataifa kama vile UNAIDS, mfuko wa Dunia, na mengineyo ambayo imeboresha matokeo ya afya Duniani kote. Chini ya uongozi wake, UNAIDS imekuwa mtetezi mkuu wa hatua za kimataifa dhidi ya UKIMWI, pia akiongoza mageuzi kwa kuyaleta pamoja mashirika 10 tofauti ya umoja wa mataifa.
translations.hypothesis: Baadaye, alisaidia katika kubuni mojawapo ya tiba za kwanza zenye ufanisi dhidi ya virusi hivyo, na pia katika utekelezaji wa chanjo za majaribio za ugonjwa wa Ebola. Amefanya kazi kwa bidii ili kuimarisha uwezo wa kisayansi wa Jamhuri ya Kidemokrasia ya Kongo, akianzisha vituo vingi vya utafiti nchini humo, na amechukua majukumu muhimu na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) katika mapambano dhidi ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza. Profesa Piot kutoka Ubelgiji anatangazwa kwa uongozi wake wa kipekee katika kukabiliana na janga la HIV/AIDS na changamoto nyingine muhimu za afya duniani. Amekuwa na jukumu muhimu katika kuanzisha mipango mikubwa ya afya duniani kama vile UNAIDS, Global Fund, na mengine ambayo yameboresha matokeo ya afya duniani kote. Chini ya uongozi wake, UNAIDS ilikuwa mhimili mkuu wa juhudi za kimataifa za kupambana na UKIMWI, na pia iliongoza mageuzi ya Umoja wa Mataifa kwa kuunganisha mashirika kumi tofauti ya Umoja huo.

translations.source: Professor Piot also played a part in the earlier discovery of the Ebola virus, and the containment of the first known outbreak, participating in field epidemiological investigations. He has chaired a number of high-level initiatives, served in numerous high-level advisory roles, including on COVID-19, and has received multiple awards. Professor Piot is the Special Advisor to the EC President, a Professor of Global Health and former Director of the London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine. “These outstanding individuals embody lifelong dedication, relentless advocacy, a commitment to equity, and selfless service of humanity and people’s health,” said WHO Director-General, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “In a time of multiple emergencies, health crises, and conflict, we recognize that leadership in public health and science are more important than ever to advance global health.
translations.reference: Pia profesa Piot alishiriki katika ugunduzi wa awali wa virusi vya Ebola, na kuzuia mlipuko wa kwanza ulipojulikana, alishiriki katika uga wa uchunguzi wa magonjwa. Ameongoza idadi ya mipango ya ngazi ya juu, alihudumu katika majukumu mengi ya ngazi ya juu ya ushauri, ikiwa ni pamoja na UVIKO-19 na amepokea tuzo nyingi. Profesa Piot ni mshauri muhimu wa Rais wa EC, profesa wa afya Ulimwenguni na mkurugenzi wa zamani wa shule ya London ya uafi na tiba ya kitropiki. "Watu hawa mashuhuri wanajumuisha kujitolea kwa maisha yote, utetezi usio na kuchoka, kujitolea kwa usawa, na huduma ya kujitolea kwa Ubinadamu na afya ya watu", alisema Mkurugunzi mkuu wa WHO, Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Katika wakati wa dharura nyingi, migogoro ya afya, na migogoro tunatambua kwamba uongozi katika afya ya umma na sayansi ni muhimu zaidi kuliko hapo awali ili kuendeleza afya Duniani.
translations.hypothesis: Profesa Piot pia alihusika katika ugunduzi wa awali wa virusi vya Ebola, na katika kuzuia mlipuko wa kwanza uliorekodiwa, ambapo alishiriki katika utafiti wa epidemiolojia wa uga. Amekuwa mwenyekiti wa mipango mbalimbali ya kiwango cha juu, ameshika nafasi mbalimbali za ushauri wa kiwango cha juu, ikiwa ni pamoja na zile zinazohusiana na COVID-19, na amepokea tuzo nyingi. Profesa Piot ni Mshauri Maalum kwa Rais wa Tume ya Ulaya, Profesa wa Afya ya Kimataifa, na alikuwa Mkurugenzi wa Shule ya Afya na Tiba ya Tropiki ya London. "Watu hawa wa kipekee huonyesha kujitolea kwa maisha yote, utetezi usio na mwisho, kujitolea kwa usawa, na huduma ya kujitolea kwa binadamu na afya ya watu," alisema Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO, Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Katika wakati huu wa dharura nyingi, migogoro ya afya, na migogoro, tunatambua kwamba uongozi katika afya ya umma na sayansi ni muhimu zaidi kuliko hapo awali ili kuendeleza afya ya kimataifa."

translations.source: Our awardees today personify that passion.” “Their combined stories and successes show how much the world has progressed in terms of collaboration at the global, regional and country levels to strengthen health emergency preparedness, response and resilience. These outstanding scientists will continue to inspire us every day,” he added The ceremony for the awards form part of the high-level opening session of the 76th World Health Assembly being held on Sunday 21 May 2023 in Geneva.
translations.reference: Washindi wetu leo wanawakilisha shauku hiyo" "Simulizi na mafanikio yao ya pamoja yanaonyesha jinsi ulimwengu umepiga hatua katika suala la ushirikiano katika ngazi ya kimataifa, kikanda na nchi ili kuimarisha maandalizi ya dharura ya afya, majibu na ustahimilivu. Wanasayansi hawa mashuhuri wataendelea kukutia moyo", aliongezea sherehe ya tuzo hizo ni sehemu ya kikao cha ngazi ya juu cha ufunguzi wa mkutano wa 76 wa afya Duniani unaofanyika Jumapili tarehe 21 Mei 2023 huko Jeniva.
translations.hypothesis:
Washindi wetu wa leo ni mfano wa shauku hiyo. "Hadithi zao na mafanikio yao yanaonyesha jinsi dunia ilivyopiga hatua katika ushirikiano wa kimataifa, kikanda na kitaifa ili kuimarisha utayarifu, utendaji na uimara katika kukabiliana na dharura za afya. Wanasayansi hawa bora watatuendelea kutuangaza kila siku," aliongeza.

Sherehe ya tuzo hizo ni sehemu ya kikao cha ufunguzi cha ngazi ya juu cha Mkutano wa 76 wa Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO), ambao unafanyika siku ya Jumapili, Mei 21, 2023, mjini Geneva.

translations.source: WHO congratulates Benin and Mali for eliminating trachoma as a public health problem WHO has validated Benin and Mali as having eliminated trachoma as a public health problem, making them the fifth and sixth countries in WHO’s African Region to achieve this significant milestone. Countries that previously received WHO validation for trachoma elimination are Ghana (June 2018), Gambia (April 2021), Togo (May 2022) and Malawi (September 2022). “WHO congratulates the health authorities of Benin and Mali and their network of global and local partners for these milestones”, said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “Following Benin’s and Mali’s success, trachoma remains endemic in 23 countries in WHO’s African Region, bringing us a step closer towards the elimination target for trachoma set in the road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030.”
translations.reference: WHO inazipongeza Benini na Mali kwa kutokomeza Trakoma kama tatizo la afya ya umma. WHO imeziidhinisha Benini na Mali kama zimetokomeza Trakoma kama tatizo la afya ya umma, na kuzifanya kuwa nchi za tano na sita katika kanda ya Afrika ya WHO kufikia hatua hii muhimu. Nchi ambazo hapo awali zilipokea uthibitisho wa WHO wa kutokomeza Trakoma ni Ghana (Juni 2018), Gambia (Aprili 2021), Togo(Mei 2022) na Malawi (Septemba 2022). "WHO inazipongeza mamlaka za afya za Benini na Mali na mtandao wao wa washirika wa kimataifana wa ndani kwa hatua hizi muhimu", alisema Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO. "Kufuatia mafanikio ya Benini na Mali, Trakoma imesalia kuwa ugonjwa katika nchi 23 katika kanda ya Afrika ya WHO, na kutuletea hatua karibu na lengo la kutokomeza Trakoma lililowekwa katika muongozo wa magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyosahaulika 2021-2022".
translations.hypothesis:
Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) linawashukuru Benin na Mali kwa kuondoa ugonjwa wa trachoma kama tatizo la afya ya umma. WHO imethibitisha kwamba Benin na Mali zimefanikiwa kuondoa ugonjwa wa trachoma kama tatizo la afya ya umma, na hivyo kuwa nchi ya tano na ya sita katika eneo la Afrika la WHO kufikia hatua hii muhimu. Nchi nyingine ambazo zimepokea idhini ya WHO kwa kuondoa ugonjwa wa trachoma ni Ghana (Juni 2018), Gambia (Aprili 2021), Togo (Mei 2022) na Malawi (Septemba 2022).

"WHO inawashukuru viongozi wa afya wa Benin na Mali na wadau wao wa kimataifa na wa ndani kwa mafanikio haya," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO. "Baada ya mafanikio ya Benin na Mali, ugonjwa wa trachoma bado unaenea katika nchi 23 katika eneo la Afrika la WHO, na hivyo kutuweka karibu zaidi na lengo la kuondoa ugonjwa huo, kama ilivyoainishwa katika mpango wa magonjwa ya kaskazini ya kitropiki wa mwaka 2021-2030."

translations.source: Globally, Benin and Mali join 15 other countries that have been validated by WHO for having eliminated trachoma as a public health problem. These are Cambodia, China, the Gambia, Ghana, Islamic Republic of Iran, Lao People’s Democratic Republic, Malawi, Mexico, Morocco, Myanmar, Nepal, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Togo and Vanuatu. Trachoma elimination using WHO’s SAFE strategy Both Benin and Mali implemented the WHO-recommended SAFE strategy to eliminate trachoma with the support of WHO and partners. The SAFE strategy consists of surgery to treat late trachoma complications; antibiotics to clear infection; facial cleanliness; and environmental improvement, particularly improving access to water and sanitation, to reduce transmission.
translations.reference: Duniani kote, Benini na Mali zinaungana na nchi nyingine 15 ambazo zimethibitishwa na WHO kwa kutokomeza Trakoma kama tatizo la afya ya umma. Nchi hizo ni, Kambodia, China, Gambia, Ghana, Jamhuri ya Kiislamu ya Irani, Jamhuri ya kidemokrasia ya watu wa Lao,Malawi, Meksiko, Moroko, Myanmar, Nepali, Omani, Saudi Arabia, Togo na Vanuatu. Utokomezaji wa Trakoma kwa kutumia mkakati SALAMA wa WHO Benini na Mali zote zilitekeleza makakti SAFE uliopendekezwa na WHO ili kuondoa Trakoma kwa msaada wa WHO na washirika. Mkakati SAFE unajumuisha upasuaji wa kutibu matatizo ya Trakoma ya muda mrefu; viuavidudu ili kuondoa maambukizi; usafi wa uso; na uboreshaji wa usafi wa mazingira, hasa kuboresha upatikanaji wa maji na usafi wa mazingira, ili kupunguza maambukizi.
translations.hypothesis:
Kiwanda, Benin na Mali zimejiunga na nchi 15 nyingine ambazo zimeidhinishwa na Shirika la Afya Duniani (WHO) kwa kuwa zimefanikiwa kuondoa ugonjwa wa trachoma kama tatizo la afya ya umma. Nchi hizo ni: Kambodia, China, Gambia, Ghana, Jamhuri ya Kiislamu ya Iran, Jamhuri ya Watu wa Lao, Malawi, Meksiko, Morocco, Myanmar, Nepal, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Togo na Vanuatu.

Kuondoa ugonjwa wa trachoma kwa kutumia mkakati wa SAFE wa WHO.
Benin na Mali zote zilitumia mkakati wa SAFE unaopendekezwa na WHO ili kuondoa ugonjwa wa trachoma, kwa usaidizi wa WHO na washirika. Mkakati wa SAFE unajumuisha: upasuaji wa kutibu matatizo ya hatari ya trachoma; matibabu ya dawa za kuzuia maambukizi; usafi wa uso; na uboreshaji wa mazingira, hasa kuboresha upatikanaji wa maji na usafi, ili kupunguza usambazaji wa ugonjwa huo.
